name: Rob Bonta
subject: BREAKING: I just sued Trump, again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
This is illegal, it’s wrong, and I’m fighting back.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250513&t=1&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)
Breaking news:
**I just filed TWO new lawsuits against the Trump administration for trying to unlawfully impose immigration enforcement requirements** on billions of dollars in annual U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) grants.
California receives over $15.7 billion in federal grant funding from DOT to support and maintain our roads, highways, railways, airways, and bridges, as well as around $20 billion in DHS grants to prepare for, protect against, respond to, and recover from terrorist attacks and other catastrophes.
**President Trump is threatening to yank these critical funds if states do not fall in line with his demands to carry out his anti-immigrant agenda, including mass deportations by ICE.**
He’s treating these funds, which have _nothing_ to do with immigration enforcement and _everything_ to do with the safety of our communities, as a political bargaining chip to bully state and local governments into submission. But this is not a game.
It’s illegal, it’s wrong, and I’m fighting back.
**[I’ll continue taking the President to court each time he breaks the law and puts Californians’ interests on the line. If you’re with me, will you pitch in $5 to fuel our people-powered campaign now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250513?refcode=em20250513-1786&amount=5&refcode2=1786_1088799_VfJwf2&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250513?refcode=em20250513-1786&amount=5&refcode2=1786_1088799_VfJwf2&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250513&t=3&refcode2=1786_1088799_VfJwf2&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1786%2E1088799%2EVfJwf2)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: A Night with Emily's List
body:
The power of electing more women and how we can get there.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ca08bc9c4cfb/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6419451?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# A Night with Emily’s List
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1a4d479370&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [EMILYs List](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f2e9fe06ee&e=edbde6c9b1) — the nation’s largest resource for women in politics — hosted its 40th **We Are EMILY National Gala** in Washington, D.C. What an honor to be in a room with women who have been fighting on the frontlines everyday. Speaker Emerita and U.S. Rep. Nancy Pelosi, U.S. Sen. Angela Alsobrooks, U.S. Rep. Sarah McBride, candidate for governor in New Mexico Deb Haaland, and former U.S. Rep. Gabrielle Giffords were just a few of the inspiring women I had the honor of hearing from. We recognized the impact of women’s leadership across the last four decades, as well as the unfinished work that lies ahead. Democratic pro-choice women are at the center of every important fight against MAGA extremism, including the fight to win back power this cycle, but they cannot do it alone.
**“Stand with us. Women’s issues are America’s issues. And democracies cannot be strong if the rights of women are under attack.” -Vice President Kamala Harris**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| While in D.C. I also had the opportunity to personally pass your questions from our community-wide Town Hall in Spartanburg. I hope we receive some answers. The top responses were:
1. **Are you doing all you can to help keep checks and balances in place?**
2. **Do you plan to hold an in-person Town Hall?**
3. **What will happen with my social security?**
4. **Why did you vote for the SAVE Act?**

---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [Click here to watch my video on the D.C. trip to Timmons’ office!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f4069f2b97&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# SC Childcare Crisis & Local Solutions
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Insufficient child care has been identified as a major workforce barrier impacting businesses and the economy in South Carolina. The crisis has an estimated $23 billion aggregate annual burden on businesses across the state, according to a [2023 report by ReadyNation, an initiative of the Council for a Strong America.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a577bd92ad&e=edbde6c9b1) And it’s estimated that over 30,000 south Carolinians are out of the workforce right now bc of childcare issues. But local solutions are getting traction — The Democratic Women of Greenville held their monthly meeting this month on childcare, highlighting potential solutions across the Upstate. For example, in Spartanburg our First Steps program is expanding the services of Quality Counts to more programs partnering with public schools who offer 3K and 4k. OneSpartanburg and the Mary Black Foundation have partnered to create over [100 new childcare seats through facilities investments. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=83eeafa750&e=edbde6c9b1)In Greenville, the [First Steps](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=cf303250ea&e=edbde6c9b1) program is focusing on faith-based and in home solutions. Fewer than 50 churches in Greenville County offer child care; however, there are more than 200 churches in the county.
On [**Frogmore Stew**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6f6eb79a25&e=edbde6c9b1) this week, I had the privilege of interviewing Tina Belge, pictured above at the childcare meeting. Tina is a candidate for Greenville City Council, a city planner and policy consultant from Greenville with two small children giving her a unique perspective. We discuss solution-based ideas for the childcare crisis in Greenville with a focus on private-public partnership. Stay tuned!

| | | | | | | | | | | | **Protect Public Media -**[**CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVES**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=32d846ecfa&e=edbde6c9b1) The Administration has issued an Executive Order to block support for PBS and NPR, cancelled grants that support the creation of children's educational programming, and plans to claw back funding. **We must act now.**[ Tell Congress to reject](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=003d21abb9&e=edbde6c9b1) the dismantling of public media.
| **Personhood bill back to hearing****Spartanburg** Representative Robert Harris [**has submitted a letter**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=433d09f606&e=edbde6c9b1) requesting a hearing for [**House Bill 3537**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4a00de694a&e=edbde6c9b1). This harmful legislation would redefine “person” to include a fertilized egg at any stage of development. [Click here to contact representatives on this committee. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e7f66085d4&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |

| | | | | | | | | | | | The 2025 Legislative Session is officially over! Here’s what went down during the final week, and how we can keep moving forward until the session reconvenes next year:
**SC Family Caucus 29 loses 29 members** 29 House lawmakers resigned from the Family Caucus due to tensions with Chairman Rep. John McCravy. The mass departures followed months of dissatisfaction, fueled by allegations of dirty campaigning and homophobic, antisemitic, and sexist remarks made by McCravy, which he denies. [Click here to read more. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=65ec397629&e=edbde6c9b1)
[**Free school meals for children**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b750258139&e=edbde6c9b1)**PASSES into LAW** [**Senate Bill 425**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e93c27e7a8&e=edbde6c9b1) , a bill that expands access to free school lunches has been officially ratified and signed by the Governor, marking a transformative win for children and families across SC!
**Democrats unable to remove Secretary Curtis Loftis, GOP members rally behind him** South Carolina’s treasurer will keep his job despite the state Senate voting last week to remove him from office for his role in a $1.8 billion accounting blunder. Rep. Heather Bauer rose from her seat to ask her democratic colleagues to take up the [bill she introduced](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5082c429c2&e=edbde6c9b1) and start the impeachment process. However, the request required unanimous approval by the chamber which Republicans quickly denied. [Click here to read more.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=49dd393036&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0b3cbf40cf&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e9231c6acc&e=edbde6c9b1)
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b9bcd9ba68&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | The United States and China [agreed to roll back](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1ec03f6961&e=edbde6c9b1) most of the tariffs each nation had imposed on the other and declared a 90-day truce in their trade war. The deal was [celebrated by financial markets](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5c8d57f5aa&e=edbde6c9b1), which soared in response. However, political strategists are wincing at the foreign policy pitter-patter that has shaken markets, ruined relationships, and sent the Trump administration to [a record low in approval ratings.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8e24409c3d&e=edbde6c9b1) Meanwhile, our very own Congressman, William Timmons continues to rubber stamp the Trump administration while focusing on his DOGE subcommittee’s investigation of [“men in women’s sports.”](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=58045e40fa&e=edbde6c9b1) Timmons cares more about waging culture wars than the issues actually facing his constituents.

| I had the honor of attending the Recognition of Mother’s Day service at my family’s church, Trinity Methodist. It was joyous and restful day with my incredible mom. Happy Mother’s Day to all!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |

| |

| We celebrated 10 years of women supporting women with Elysian this weekend! We honored Anita Zucker, Rep. Gilda Cobb-Hunter, Rep. Beth Bernstein and Madame President of Kosovo. Thank you to Karen Floyd and Rep. Rita Allison for the generous invite and to all who traveled to come to Spartanburg for this special weekend.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| I had the honor of joining former and current elected officials for dinner Saturday night in Spartanburg with Rep. Annie McDaniel, chair of Legislative Black Caucus, Sen. Tameika Devine, Rep. Gilda Cobb-Hunter, the longest serving member of the House, former Rep. Mandy Powers Norrell, and former Rep. Harold Mitchell.

OneSpartanburg and the Mary Black Foundation have partnered to create over Greenville, the program is focusing on faith-based and in home solutions. Fewer than 50 churches in Greenville County offer child care; however, there are more than 200 churches in the county. On this week, I had the privilege of interviewing Tina Belge, pictured above at the childcare meeting. Tina is a candidate for Greenville City Council, a city planner and policy consultant from Greenville with two small children giving her a unique perspective. We discuss solution-based ideas for the childcare crisis in Greenville with a focus on private-public partnership. Stay tuned! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser with Representative Justin PearsonMay 29 at 6:00 pm Chapman Cultural Center Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage. | | | | | | | | | | | | SCDP Blue Palmetto DinnerMay 30th at 7pm in Columbia Join Democrats across South Carolina for the South Carolina Democratic Party's premier annual fundraising event. You won't want to miss this year's Blue Palmetto Dinner with a keynote from Governor Wes Moore of Maryland. The event begins at 7pm. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | South Carolina Democratic ConventionMay 30-31st in Columbia Join Democrats across South Carolina for the 2025 Convention Weekend. The weekend includes the Blue Palmetto Dinner with Governor Wes Moore , Clyburn’s Fish Fry with newly-announced Governor Tim Walz, and the Saturday convention to elect leadership. | | May 14 Indivisible Upstate Meeting at SCDP. 15 Rockets Red Glare book signing by Billy Webster. 16 WREN Sine Die Webinar at noon. 20 SPCDP Tiny Town Hall Middle Tyger Library at 6pm. 29 Fighting for Freedom Fundraiser. 30 & 31 South Carolina Democratic Convention. 2 SPCDP Monthly Meeting. June 9 Greenville Dem Women Monthly Meeting. Stay tuned for more info! June 13th-15th Southern Workers Action Summit. 14 Indivisible Upstate Veterans Rally. Stay tuned for more info! June 28 Greenville Black Pride Festival. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Protect Public Media - The Administration has issued an Executive Order to block support for PBS and NPR, cancelled grants that support the creation of children's educational programming, and plans to claw back funding. We must act now. the dismantling of public media. | Personhood bill back to hearingSpartanburg Representative Robert Harris requesting a hearing for . This harmful legislation would redefine “person” to include a fertilized egg at any stage of development. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The 2025 Legislative Session is officially over! Here’s what went down during the final week, and how we can keep moving forward until the session reconvenes next year: SC Family Caucus 29 loses 29 members 29 House lawmakers resigned from the Family Caucus due to tensions with Chairman Rep. John McCravy. The mass departures followed months of dissatisfaction, fueled by allegations of dirty campaigning and homophobic, antisemitic, and sexist remarks made by McCravy, which he denies. into LAW , a bill that expands access to free school lunches has been officially ratified and signed by the Governor, marking a transformative win for children and families across SC! Democrats unable to remove Secretary Curtis Loftis, GOP members rally behind him South Carolina’s treasurer will keep his job despite the state Senate voting last week to remove him from office for his role in a $1.8 billion accounting blunder. Rep. Heather Bauer rose from her seat to ask her democratic colleagues to take up the and start the impeachment process. However, the request required unanimous approval by the chamber which Republicans quickly denied. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The United States and China most of the tariffs each nation had imposed on the other and declared a 90-day truce in their trade war. The deal was , which soared in response. However, political strategists are wincing at the foreign policy pitter-patter that has shaken markets, ruined relationships, and sent the Trump administration to Meanwhile, our very own Congressman, William Timmons continues to rubber stamp the Trump administration while focusing on his DOGE subcommittee’s investigation of Timmons cares more about waging culture wars than the issues actually facing his constituents. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I had the honor of attending the Recognition of Mother’s Day service at my family’s church, Trinity Methodist. It was joyous and restful day with my incredible mom. Happy Mother’s Day to all! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We celebrated 10 years of women supporting women with Elysian this weekend! We honored Anita Zucker, Rep. Gilda Cobb-Hunter, Rep. Beth Bernstein and Madame President of Kosovo. Thank you to Karen Floyd and Rep. Rita Allison for the generous invite and to all who traveled to come to Spartanburg for this special weekend. | | | | | | | | | | | | I had the honor of joining former and current elected officials for dinner Saturday night in Spartanburg with Rep. Annie McDaniel, chair of Legislative Black Caucus, Sen. Tameika Devine, Rep. Gilda Cobb-Hunter, the longest serving member of the House, former Rep. Mandy Powers Norrell, and former Rep. • For nearly 30 years, Black voters in Louisiana had to contend with a congressional map that prevented them from electing a candidate of their choice in all but one of the state’s six congressional districts, in a textbook violation of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act.
• Multiple federal courts saw it as such, and with support from our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), Louisiana voters successfully challenged that gerrymandered map in court. The state legislature enacted a VRA-compliant map in January 2024, which is currently in place and includes two Black-opportunity districts.
• A conservative federal court wrongly struck down Louisiana’s newly enacted VRA-compliant map, ignoring recent U.S. Supreme Court precedent in _Allen v. Milligan_ (another case in which our affiliate, the NRF, played a central role) — which requires Louisiana to have a map with two congressional districts where voters can be equally heard.
• Our affiliate, the NRF, provided financial support and litigation strategy throughout the court processes in Louisiana. In March, the fair maps movement went before the U.S. Supreme Court, making the case for why the current map — which provides equal representation for all voters — must be kept in place. The NRF submitted a brief asking the Court to protect Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map.
**When the Court issues a ruling in the days ahead, it will either uphold a fair map, safeguard representative redistricting, and foster a healthy democracy — or it will undermine essential voting rights in Louisiana and nationwide.**
[**No matter the outcome, All On The Line will keep doing what it does best — fighting for a truly representative democracy where all eligible voters can make their voices heard. Can you make a donation to support this mission-critical work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107644525/545368465/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA7_email_20250513-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA7-OM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250513-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA7-OM_&utm_campaign=OTDLA7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkZGMzYTkzLTVhMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CqJ7ZMulVrtvQ2oX4MwvPbsa2Il0Uv8ScR_wjiTqhws=)

name: DNC HQ
subject: House Republicans’ budget:
body:
---
Derek, House Republicans are pushing a budget that includes the largest cut to health care and food assistance in American history. That means we’re one step closer to millions of people being unable to access health care or put food on the table. _All while Donald Trump is reportedly busy accepting a luxury jet from Qatar._ Democrats have been sounding the alarm about this bill — holding more than 100 town halls across the country, including in districts where Republicans won’t show up to meet with their own constituents. At the same time, we’re focused on taking back Congress and electing Democratic leaders who will actually fight for the people they represent, not rip away their health care and food assistance. **[If that work is worth $3 to you and you’re in a position to pitch in to help fund it, we’re asking you to make that contribution to the DNC now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250513_3434_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3434_22930333_HnQ-nG&akid=3434%2E22930333%2EHnQ-nG)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250513_3434_fr&refcode2=3434_22930333_HnQ-nG&akid=3434%2E22930333%2EHnQ-nG)**

subject: My new leadership position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---
**_...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority._**
---
We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible._
---
**That is why, in my capacity as the _NEW_ Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! **
---
_If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match._
---
[**Please make a contribution of ANY amount to claim your 500% MATCH now that I’ve been officially appointed as the Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership._**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/8yEmcwt_MYwWAw80vCao9DEJd6b0VYuA5LghQ4wuk_STdEEdOl9BOoXh-8DNXLMeprue5HKdHK_p0JStPdjXRgPIFnG-BTJlx1uswstzGsP1eOQ-i7lP4kf9n4Kx9LBXagZvLsJtBCgj46vPhvbtUpHgqO_TMZViDTQvTU6z2L7qcfQbHPAUqCwT47tJ-yTPHPmH0pecNBXBeIk4ZVs5OzvfUXvaWhaxO1GveMj-_jeyXB3IZLOHf2XaAyIyPd8UwprTOvg0vF5wJBaKRWdtE-gIRokYlQKngOYbDIqPWm-pnrcJqJbpXs-srPhOW6AYZj1UZAhbTPzgs0r8FTRhNBAdqxBpp9wXqpmJyNPhEYP_4VmQNeVuuv_CRkdu3glIAB1b5qW7iPyq2m4NgEp6t-8Sv8FuQpou6Mc8ZSUILlRP5dkF3mNZQ9B7GBgiut2wNM-7_aNO0fbC1eRMVyKh1Amr8kRYIPWPxVDl7o5sU8l-QeRQi-yaNc8SU2FEH9IuaXcQP8swukKsiGJ7bEOjU9TdWt5_XitIxrJAZfXHA3GeVyHK56kXR-tuD0mdmGsDmTj0qbu-OSlayc0TnZ5lNJVwMHd9PCyTeBT1Ww-RlnLZIo-Y3s_X5bHnP9T8DyEn4FLKDaNsoobsxnH5kj8dsBNSWZtKe1mkrEmDEtH6l_vnC74tJs5gFs4bI55Rl4PAhmyZrup567BFC9LjiV1G-WfsQ7wZ9J4o168XzVnmhjBbfj-xuDSmxBgBW0g4LPcO0P3b9f3JT_8r8xLQSrWNFaXS9kDW2853ArPyNQqpKEdMPU5bRibpBLh1xTjn/3DrK5XFzQsgj5R7WSdhWGBaRBNdtzhVd/8)

clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. | | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

clean_body: Sign his thank you card before he leaves the Department of Government Efficiency! | | | | | | Have you heard the news, Peter? Elon Musk’s LAST DAY** leading D.O.G.E. operations is coming up at the end of May. | | | | | | | With Elon at the helm, the Department of Government Efficiency is closing in on in American tax dollars saved. And we just hit the 100-day point in President Trump’s second term last month. There aren’t many rich and powerful people in this world who would sacrifice their public reputation for a greater good, like Elon has. So we want to | | | | | Let’s finish what Elon started and help D.O.G.E. deliver $5 TRILLION in savings by 2029. For America, Team Fry | | | | | | | | | Meet Russell: Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | Team Fry is incredibly grateful for your generosity and support. If you’re not in a position to donate, we would NEVER want you to do so. You can still make an impact by signing up to volunteer below! | | | | | We have new merchandise lines set to release throughout the course of 2025. Click the link below to visit Team Fry’s official online store and grab your gear today! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | * | | | | | | | | | |

subject: 3 Million Pills. One Arrest. Now What?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
A cartel leader was arrested in Salem. This fight just got personal for Oregon.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/cartel-bust?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250513_ORGOP_CartelBust&utm_id=campaignengine)
---
---
| | Friend, This isn’t some distant border issue. **It’s here.**
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/7-96C39Xe9fR/cVprcnJ0R2dodXJQYlRRd0lZQ0x6WFlLUDdrVHZ0S3Jkbmx3NmZDZnRiajkvTGZKZHJxd3pseGRPQVRjaVNMRnYvb1JZNDB2bGtpMU9Db0tYcUpERzJORWxMbGw3YkF0azhVVHp3dFhFcm89S0/)
---
| | _**A cartel kingpin was just arrested in Salem in connection with the largest fentanyl takedown in DEA history.**_ **Over 3 million deadly pills were seized across five states. Thousands of lives saved.** But here’s the truth: **This is just the tip of the spear. And if we don’t stay on offense, they’ll be right back – flooding our streets, poisoning our kids, and laughing at our weakness.** That’s why we’re launching an all-out effort to take this fight to the next level. [**_And we’re asking YOU to step up. Right now. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/Da9YBWYVeYsN/cVprcnJ0R2dodXJQYlRRd0lZQ0x6WFlLUDdrVHZ0S3Jkbmx3NmZDZnRiajkvTGZKZHJxd3pseGRPQVRjaVNMRnYvb1JZNDB2bGtpMU9Db0tYcUpERzJORWxMbGw3YkF0azhVVHp3dFhFcm89S0/)
---
| | | [ RUSH A DONATION TO STOP THE FENTANYL CRISIS ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/arz-tjL64LcW/cVprcnJ0R2dodXJQYlRRd0lZQ0x6WFlLUDdrVHZ0S3Jkbmx3NmZDZnRiajkvTGZKZHJxd3pseGRPQVRjaVNMRnYvb1JZNDB2bGtpMU9Db0tYcUpERzJORWxMbGw3YkF0azhVVHp3dFhFcm89S0/)
---
| | We’re building a war chest to elect Republicans who will secure our communities, shut down the cartels, and treat this crisis like the national emergency it is. **Enough weakness. Enough excuses.** **Democrats opened the border. They let this poison in. They made Oregon a target.** Now it’s up to us – _America First conservatives, law-and-order Republicans, and Oregonians who just want safe neighborhoods_ – _to fight back and finish what law enforcement started._ The cartel was here. We hit them once. clean_body: A cartel leader was arrested in Salem. This fight just got personal for Oregon. | | | | | | Friend, This isn’t some distant border issue. It’s here. | | | | A cartel kingpin was just arrested in Salem in connection with the largest fentanyl takedown in DEA history. Over 3 million deadly pills were seized across five states. Thousands of lives saved. But here’s the truth: This is just the tip of the spear. And if we don’t stay on offense, they’ll be right back – flooding our streets, poisoning our kids, and laughing at our weakness. That’s why we’re launching an all-out effort to take this fight to the next level. | | | | | We’re building a war chest to elect Republicans who will secure our communities, shut down the cartels, and treat this crisis like the national emergency it is. Enough weakness. Enough excuses. Democrats opened the border. They let this poison in. They made Oregon a target. Now it’s up to us – America First conservatives, law-and-order Republicans, and Oregonians who just want safe neighborhoods – to fight back and finish what law enforcement started. The cartel was here. We hit them once. | | | | | Thank you, Oregon Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. ---
Friend,
---
Arizona’s Attorney General just got the green light to **_dodge_** deportations of illegal aliens:
---
**“Hobbs vetoes GOP bills that would force cooperation with ICE”** [SOURCE: _AZ Mirror_]
---
Meanwhile, that same Attorney General in Arizona is trying to imprison me as an _innocent_ man for 20 YEARS.
---
That perfectly sums up the current state of the Democrat Party...
---
**Democrats are trying to destroy and imprison President Trump’s closest confidantes like me, all while they shield MS-13 gang members and assault ICE agents.**
---
And because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, the corrupt Democrat Attorney General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.
---
But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the MS-13-loving Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon, he’s calling on _**YOU**_ to join the cause to save me.
---

That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this is. And now I am **_humbly_** echoing the President’s call to “save” me.
---
_Of course, if you cannot give at this time, please do not feel any pressure! Take care of yourself._

| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zthefjjag5gr8fb46s97c5u9ddurvec040ktif80_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o72clh2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3g7r0llf0hj4ab63ve5p28qpucek4crv0r42l30_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o72clh2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zli3n9p1f7ejbmeui0b2gocjt1oaeqjns697q638_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o72clh2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.

**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zteghhie7citup6hq66i3s48hk59r92a5lhah548_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zet8el2n6j07m4tvrh3e0s85lpv91elu1bflmm28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqsu81ilkebc5g6h7o0r9r1tl711es8dohtrj6n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpfd6q66s33r8r915hhegkuo9tc3g3n1di0elub8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu6v49bqq94476n90p9r6eqab5evt6c0pj12u5ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zag3j2gm4qdlivtj0ou345msrk4r1d3ro9isjto0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkdaq50nstjfnejvf5on22jpaaaddv3d1dhnifto_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrm56n2aaqisdqk4f0bbrs3itvtna0teo85qepn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9i66o73cph2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Thank you, Michael Henry Republican for New York Attorney General PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Danielle Franz
subject: MAGA, MAHA, and now MABA
body:
There’s been a lot of discussion around making America great or healthy, but where is the discussion around one of the oldest conservative policies

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpa6d8pjc748eukv3bkmfbtk37dar22ijlq70qn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
Friend,

There’s been a lot of discussion around making America great or healthy, but where is the discussion around one of the oldest conservative policies, making America beautiful?

Currently, the Left dominates that conversation. But these are usually the big city types who’ve never actually experienced _**real**_ nature.

_Do you think they should be the ones creating environmental policy?_

Conservatives need to fill this ideological gap in the environmental movement that is preventing effective, durable action.

**The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is on a mission to build the conservative environmental movement.**

We believe economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand and that everyone should feel empowered to take a seat at the table in discussions concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, agriculture, and more.

**I’m inviting you to join ACC’s mission to[Make America Beautiful Again](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4si0k5tinao0844mhubapatqklji0k2a1m015hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs) by donating today.**
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6fkade3j45mtfslhd515q9lujnfaf1mnfgrhjlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
The best conservation policies don’t come from top-down regulation.

It comes from **bottom-up innovation** — driven by young leaders, policy experts, and advocates who care about both prosperity and the planet.

American Conservation Coalition supports state-level conservation efforts and private-public partnerships through the Make America Beautiful Again Trust Fund to drive smarter environmental policy.

**Our goal is to empower Americans to get involved with conservation efforts and champion local ecosystems.**

These are the people who know what’s best for their environment, not bureaucrats in Washington, D.C.

But we need your help to continue our efforts and grow our impact nationwide.

[Will you chip in $10, $35, $100, or more today to our efforts to Make America Beautiful Again? Click here to donate. >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb866u1j8gj20u8mva10g8ijnfla1t3im1ov37co_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk5s5mjdkaaj3l3u3ibabsfr51v8olm88bu4ma88_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgh4lf9tgv4tmob26oeio9dak343j0cefviae8u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn2rj3eh8odgbebb6fagonc2gd3t91p5jkmv3a78_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zckiellekua9ekal3ueap96t8bt8h8j2cn7ha1i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr8mblgep62o1b6bs1l5089v7iehv96hveru0ke0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2a246c2qrmvfjcftljedki0gqr8ld2c61q1d3fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
**The American Conservation Coalition is showing the country that conservation is not a Leftist issue — it’s an American one.**

America is the most beautiful country on the planet, and that’s part of what makes this country so great.

All of our work is to ensure that future generations can enjoy the same beauty we do today and that our forebears did before us.

As Teddy Roosevelt said, **_“We have fallen heirs to the most glorious heritage a people ever received, and each one must do his part if we wish to show that the nation is worthy of its good fortune.”_** Now it’s time for you and me to do our part.

[Help the American Conservation Coalition Make America Beautiful Again — not with slogans, but with action!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsv3bl8gng8boukr0hv968ij35btj7r3st2fsof8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
[Make America Beautiful Again](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6090ick5081eh0v5v4gstu6llpti1jo9r1rap7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c1h2bs)
Thank you,

Danielle Franz, CEO

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkucbr8p1dnap3q842fh4ctfhdlo86bvb8fnf28_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c9h2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuekkgp7pfdjds77cgeu92sdb0jvlal5b96p7iv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c9h2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvsl6b6qp4gstf5vhtdgp4lrj6a9q2eavjmrq0eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h60ob6c9h2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Worse than an illegal alien?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Democrats would rather imprison me than deport an illegal alien!

Democrats would rather imprison me than deport an illegal alien!
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8v6tl36gu0qaqid77qdns2r4rvrmnb4tig5hgv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h68pj1c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Arizona’s Attorney General just got the green light to **_dodge_** deportations of illegal aliens:
---
**“Hobbs vetoes GOP bills that would force cooperation with ICE”** [SOURCE: _AZ Mirror_]
---
Meanwhile, that same Attorney General in Arizona is trying to imprison me as an _innocent_ man for 20 YEARS.
---
That perfectly sums up the current state of the Democrat Party...
---
**Democrats are trying to destroy and imprison President Trump’s closest confidantes like me, all while they shield MS-13 gang members and assault ICE agents.**
---
And because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, the corrupt Democrat Attorney General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.
---
But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the MS-13-loving Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon, he’s calling on _**YOU**_ to join the cause to save me.
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvgnjlpqdql4movl45p3buibu7telvd6efps3ti0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h68pj1c9h2bs)
__
---

That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this is. And now I am **_humbly_** echoing the President’s call to “save” me.
---
_Of course, if you cannot give at this time, please do not feel any pressure! Take care of yourself._
---
[**So, if you can, please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $50,000 I need to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z75r1s841qstl3u75qie8si6stq4vk4om80uneb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h68pj1c9h2bs)

name: Team Downing
subject: 2A Patriot Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress

name: Danielle Franz
subject: MAGA, MAHA, and now MABA
body:
There’s been a lot of discussion around making America great or healthy, but where is the discussion around one of the oldest conservative policies

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdgoeukb6i79ond0bsd7l3g5kuujc3jkc4g9q1fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
Friend,

There’s been a lot of discussion around making America great or healthy, but where is the discussion around one of the oldest conservative policies, making America beautiful?

Currently, the Left dominates that conversation. But these are usually the big city types who’ve never actually experienced _**real**_ nature.

_Do you think they should be the ones creating environmental policy?_

Conservatives need to fill this ideological gap in the environmental movement that is preventing effective, durable action.

**The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is on a mission to build the conservative environmental movement.**

We believe economic and environmental success go hand-in-hand and that everyone should feel empowered to take a seat at the table in discussions concerning conservation, clean energy, sportsmen’s rights, agriculture, and more.

**I’m inviting you to join ACC’s mission to[Make America Beautiful Again](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziis3q6dbqt77c686qbvvt1ka4jll4biff2i8q5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs) by donating today.**
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrhb1b9llr65d4vkl0d0em5q49tnksskl2gs8an0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
The best conservation policies don’t come from top-down regulation.

It comes from **bottom-up innovation** — driven by young leaders, policy experts, and advocates who care about both prosperity and the planet.

American Conservation Coalition supports state-level conservation efforts and private-public partnerships through the Make America Beautiful Again Trust Fund to drive smarter environmental policy.

**Our goal is to empower Americans to get involved with conservation efforts and champion local ecosystems.**

These are the people who know what’s best for their environment, not bureaucrats in Washington, D.C.

But we need your help to continue our efforts and grow our impact nationwide.

[Will you chip in $10, $35, $100, or more today to our efforts to Make America Beautiful Again? Click here to donate. >>>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqbt82ds71m9083krtbj2242c0sqlf8f3o516iu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z653k1ihejltup65kv0slapg309547cv8ghdf29o_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj8jf8bpkg8ec90gvpi94ln3l3vnnvvm865110og_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6tvus795cg957a9ntg8j5uuejd9ct7b41qk7svg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlbqh84c1u2br4548q0cr5vp8c1qt1f0blm97ok0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0qdjc7dsqbabf5q0e0qqotabrlgfsm8s01scqho_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z54j4empd3scqml59vtr84j8qr0kgsg3h4utr710_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
**The American Conservation Coalition is showing the country that conservation is not a Leftist issue — it’s an American one.**

America is the most beautiful country on the planet, and that’s part of what makes this country so great.

All of our work is to ensure that future generations can enjoy the same beauty we do today and that our forebears did before us.

As Teddy Roosevelt said, **_“We have fallen heirs to the most glorious heritage a people ever received, and each one must do his part if we wish to show that the nation is worthy of its good fortune.”_** Now it’s time for you and me to do our part.

[Help the American Conservation Coalition Make America Beautiful Again — not with slogans, but with action!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4im29a89mhcnam8dfn8c15v062i1eiubbrf7gm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
[Make America Beautiful Again](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdbqlhd1idr61d78gtk0r1t8bunglrolkq0368to_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o30clh2bs)
Thank you,

Danielle Franz, CEO

_The American Conservation Coalition (ACC) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Donations to the American Conservation Coalition are tax-deductible. The American Conservation Coalition’s tax identification number is 82-3815628._
---

name: Steve Hilton
subject: Save California from Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
Not on my watch.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsphlaqucpof35bnof6iicf8hkmb9g18e60lrq50_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris.But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California.She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that.Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had.Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship.**Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**.[**Join my campaign today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq1gcoo5ls6me7i6he5tc4bpcgra4j0kso0j6hf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer.California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine.**[Let’s prove them wrong.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthg1p62qf3cqicve0mi7q2db81s8haait37v79g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__
** _A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again._** So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100 or more to help me stop Kamala and Make California Golden Again?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkeb7kmh9l4m0ermh2qtrm419959lus20e18vrtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs) **We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back.Join me—and let’s get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Candidate for Governor of California
---
[ DONATE TODAY! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zro2ehqk9a0rktprvhi5hqvjourkfh0r25lg3qpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs)
---
P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. **[Chip in today and let’s end the one-party rule that’s destroying our beautiful Golden State.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3egnirft7b9g3qljc2o4mo9nnpo0r72js4q7n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9h62o34chh2bs)**
---
|

| Update May 14
---
| Dear Friend,
We hope you had an incredible Mother's Day weekend celebrating our amazing moms.
To date, my team and I have assisted constituents in Virginia's 5th Congressional District in recovering nearly $300,000 in funds owed to them by federal agencies, including the Internal Revenue Service, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and the Social Security Administration.

There is a lot going on in D.C. this Week:

* It's National Police Week -- honoring law enforcement across the country.

* House Republicans are advancing three major reconciliation markups:

1. Energy & Commerce
2. Ways and Means
3. Agriculture

The goal? "One beautiful bill" by Memorial Day.
Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---
| Dr. Ben Carson
---
| |
---
| I recently had the honor speaking with fellow Christian and an incredible American Patriot, Dr. Ben Carson. I'm learning about his [American Cornerstone Institute.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CVQ50PXPgGP5pMqL-4Xi5dYwZtXWtbipIXUnYsVlwNJTaf3qNgRU-Oc7GvNcO3pVoKbLyEVWw1bxtBnPFwg_zFS5dK58xSIQQVDSGCASuLrsQseCc_dbSEfixgymePGz3CQPq39QfnC4Cenatu5gFUvtQmRsibHn&c=rNHgX0yIDWxBXdoyO7h3Gv0_p5czBWUC8FaZN1HhUOhcGlZ4SSsUpw==&ch=XbdiVCnM8MZYwQYHcJMzFqWMfbrSG110yn9CyURJQNKu6kEoOk6R2Q==)
---
| 2025 Liberty University Commencement
---
| |
---
Governor Glenn Youngkin and [Thomas Road Baptist Church](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CVQ50PXPgGP5pMqL-4Xi5dYwZtXWtbipIXUnYsVlwNJTaf3qNgRU-EH1xThhbP5dX3025CI4c30leZ-zRdUkHN1sTfGKTx8xxZxSfcXA0KJzlWF-scIHHuacv0bg3bImX4EaJ7xverk=&c=rNHgX0yIDWxBXdoyO7h3Gv0_p5czBWUC8FaZN1HhUOhcGlZ4SSsUpw==&ch=XbdiVCnM8MZYwQYHcJMzFqWMfbrSG110yn9CyURJQNKu6kEoOk6R2Q==) Senior Pastor Johnathan Falwell
---
|
---

| We would not have a country without our men and women in law enforcement. Thank you!
In 1962, President John F. Kennedy signed a proclamation which designated May 15 as Peace Officers Memorial Day and the week in which that date falls as Police Week. Currently, tens of thousands of law enforcement officers from around the world converge on Washington, DC to participate in a number of planned events which honor those that have paid the ultimate sacrifice.[ Click here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CVQ50PXPgGP5pMqL-4Xi5dYwZtXWtbipIXUnYsVlwNJTaf3qNgRU-Oc7GvNcO3pV1-WX05XPigwlFIm9hnBt1GbGnl-aS-i1L6J5kp8LjSv5uRSV4odxHW9aZ6JONK6dV5I04c0wevyC-GIukkZu6nbLDVBDWw4-&c=rNHgX0yIDWxBXdoyO7h3Gv0_p5czBWUC8FaZN1HhUOhcGlZ4SSsUpw==&ch=XbdiVCnM8MZYwQYHcJMzFqWMfbrSG110yn9CyURJQNKu6kEoOk6R2Q==)

| Our Polar Bear, Remi
---
| |
---
| Our furry friend, Remington (Remi), is growing up fast! When she was little, she spent two months training with a SWAT team--mastering ladders, obstacle courses, and more. She's a fierce protector of my wife, Tracy, and a loyal companion through and through. A true adventurer at heart, she loves swimming in the lake, going on long walks, and keeping watch over our chickens. She's even made friends with the two donkeys next door! She proudly walks alongside Tracy and me in parades throughout the 5th Congressional District, and nothing makes her happier than riding in the truck with the windows down. A fan of colder weather, she now calls Washington, D.C. her second home. This past winter, she had the time of her life rolling in the snow in front of the steps of the U.S. Capitol.

| President Trump is on a Middle East Tour to Strengthen Economic and Strategic Partnerships
President Trump is currently on a high-profile tour of the Middle East, aimed at reinforcing economic ties and advancing key strategic partnerships in the region. With a strong leader back in the White House, America is once again commanding respect on the global stage.
White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt stated that the trip is focused on "strengthening ties" and pursuing mutual interests. "President Trump is reaffirming his vision for a proud, prosperous, and peaceful Middle East -- one where cooperation replaces conflict and where commerce and cultural exchange thrive," she said. Given President Trump's track record, including the historic Abraham Accords, many are speculating that this visit could pave the way for another landmark peace agreement -- perhaps an "Abraham Accords 2."
The trip comes on the heels of major economic commitments from Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates, with both nations pledging to invest more than $2 trillion in the United States over the next decade. These investments are expected to generate significant economic benefits for both sides and further solidify U.S. partnerships in the region.
In a notable gesture of goodwill, the Trump administration is also finalizing the acceptance of a 747 aircraft gifted by the Qatari royal family. While such gifts are subject to legal review, the White House has confirmed that all procedures will be followed in full compliance with U.S. law. Given the billions of American taxpayer dollars that have flowed overseas for decades, I see this as a welcome symbol of reciprocity or step in the right direction.
As President Trump continues his diplomatic outreach, the world is watching closely to see what new agreements -- and potential breakthroughs -- may come from this bold initiative. It is an honor to serve you in Virginia's 5th Congrssional district during this historic time!

clean_body: | | | | == | == | Update May 14 | Dear Friend, We hope you had an incredible Mother's Day weekend celebrating our amazing moms. To date, my team and I have assisted constituents in Virginia's 5th Congressional District in recovering nearly $300,000 in funds owed to them by federal agencies, including the Internal Revenue Service, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and the Social Security Administration. There is a lot going on in D.C. this Week: It's National Police Week -- honoring law enforcement across the country. House Republicans are advancing three major reconciliation markups: 1. Energy & Commerce 2. Ways and Means 3. Agriculture The goal? "One beautiful bill" by Memorial Day. Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | Dr. Ben Carson | | | I recently had the honor speaking with fellow Christian and an incredible American Patriot, Dr. Ben Carson. I'm learning about his == | 2025 Liberty University Commencement | | Governor Glenn Youngkin and == Senior Pastor Johnathan Falwell | | | Lynchburg Town Council Member Curt Diemer and == | | Lynchburg Mayor Larry Taylor | | Lynchburg Town Council Member & == and her husband Don. | | Congrats to our graduates! | Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin delivered my favorite speech of his to date to the largest graduating class (30k plus "Champions for Christ) in Liberty University (LU) history == Chair of the LU Board Tim Lee, LU President Dondi Costin, and others also shared inspiring messages of Faith, Hope, and Love. | Tim Tebow | | == | Tim Tebow is a fellow Christian who has dedicated his life to helping others. The Tim Tebow Foundation exists to bring Faith, Hope and Love to those needing a brighter day in their darkest hour of need. We strive to fight for the Most Vulnerable People in the world--the MVP--through our work in our four main focuses in Anti-Human Trafficking and Child Exploitation, Orphan Care + Prevention, Profound Medical Needs, and Special Needs Ministry. == | National Police Week | | == | We would not have a country without our men and women in law enforcement. Thank you! In 1962, President John F. Kennedy signed a proclamation which designated May 15 as Peace Officers Memorial Day and the week in which that date falls as Police Week. Currently, tens of thousands of law enforcement officers from around the world converge on Washington, DC to participate in a number of planned events which honor those that have paid the ultimate sacrifice.== | The Cross Represents Love | | | None of us are perfect, but stay strong--Church isn't just for Sundays. We know the devil divides, but Jesus reconciles. In a world with hate, division, and judgement, let's choose to be people of love, unity, and grace. 1 John 4:8 reminds us, 'Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.' Let us be the light! | Our Polar Bear, Remi | | | Our furry friend, Remington (Remi), is growing up fast! When she was little, she spent two months training with a SWAT team--mastering ladders, obstacle courses, and more. She's a fierce protector of my wife, Tracy, and a loyal companion through and through. A true adventurer at heart, she loves swimming in the lake, going on long walks, and keeping watch over our chickens. She's even made friends with the two donkeys next door! She proudly walks alongside Tracy and me in parades throughout the 5th Congressional District, and nothing makes her happier than riding in the truck with the windows down. A fan of colder weather, she now calls Washington, D.C. her second home. This past winter, she had the time of her life rolling in the snow in front of the steps of the U.S. Capitol. | Respect is Earned | | | President Trump is on a Middle East Tour to Strengthen Economic and Strategic Partnerships President Trump is currently on a high-profile tour of the Middle East, aimed at reinforcing economic ties and advancing key strategic partnerships in the region. With a strong leader back in the White House, America is once again commanding respect on the global stage. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt stated that the trip is focused on "strengthening ties" and pursuing mutual interests. "President Trump is reaffirming his vision for a proud, prosperous, and peaceful Middle East -- one where cooperation replaces conflict and where commerce and cultural exchange thrive," she said. Given President Trump's track record, including the historic Abraham Accords, many are speculating that this visit could pave the way for another landmark peace agreement -- perhaps an "Abraham Accords 2." The trip comes on the heels of major economic commitments from Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates, with both nations pledging to invest more than $2 trillion in the United States over the next decade. These investments are expected to generate significant economic benefits for both sides and further solidify U.S. partnerships in the region. In a notable gesture of goodwill, the Trump administration is also finalizing the acceptance of a 747 aircraft gifted by the Qatari royal family. While such gifts are subject to legal review, the White House has confirmed that all procedures will be followed in full compliance with U.S. law. Given the billions of American taxpayer dollars that have flowed overseas for decades, I see this as a welcome symbol of reciprocity or step in the right direction. As President Trump continues his diplomatic outreach, the world is watching closely to see what new agreements -- and potential breakthroughs -- may come from this bold initiative. It is an honor to serve you in Virginia's 5th Congrssional district during this historic time! | | God bless America! Are You Getting What You Voted For? Over Mother's Day weekend, President Donald J. Trump: Mediated a peace deal between India and Pakistan, halting a potential war. Brokered an in-person meeting between Ukrainian President Zelensky and Russian President Putin. Announced a new trade agreement with China to ease tariffs. Ended Big Pharma profiteering by slashing U.S. prescription drug prices by 80%. Negotiated the release of the final U.S. hostage, Edan Alexander, from Gaza. Virginia November Elections | | It's time to lock arms and support fellow veteran and US Marine Winsome Sears for Governor, our entire statewide ticket, and House of Delegates candidates to secure victory this November. ==] | Senator Luther Cifers Fundraiser Saturday May 17 | | | John McGuire is 1st Goochland, VA Congressman | | | I'm honored to be the 1st member of Congress to receive President Trump's endorsement for re-election in 2026--and I'm proud to be the 1st Congressman in history to call Goochland County home. Rick Grizzell and the Goochland Tea Party | == Known as the "Goochland Worker Bees", thank you, Rick Grizzell and the Goochland Tea Party, for your outstanding leadership and continued dedication to supporting those impacted by Hurricane Helene. == A Little Brevity With Levity | == A little brevity with levity! == | Liberty University Visited the Hill | | | | | | Tyler, Martha Boneta, Speaker Mike Johnson, and a fellow Navy SEAL brother I served with back in the day, Jason Redman My Friend and America's Mayor Rudy Giuliani | | | It was great to catch up with my friend and America's Mayor Rudy Giuliani. | Just Facts | | | | | President James Monroe Memorial Foundation Wreath Laying Ceremony | | Louisa resident Shelby Chandler, Senator Luther Cifers, and Delegate Betsy Carr. | | The Ross and Virginia Mechenzie! | | Our friend David Botkins and member State Central Committee. | America is Back! | | | Disappointing to see such inaccuracy from the Daily Progress. | | | 2 Navy SEALs in the District | | | Thank you Brian and Vickie Runk for hosting our Lynchburg Fundraiser. Thank you to fellow Navy SEAL brother Rep. Ryan Zinke for headlining two McGuire fundraisers. | | | | Thank you Rick Grizzell for helping others. | Thank you for your continued support. Together, we'll take our country back. Take care, please tell a friend, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! == == == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |
