name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: May 15 Zoom with VA State + House candidates
body:
In Virginia, 2025 is the prelude to the 2026 midterms
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
Victories in state elections this year will be the most potent signal Democrats can send against Donald Trump's dismantling of our democracy. And his administration will have a front-row seat to the most-watched elections this year, just south of DC in Virginia.
All 100 delegates districts plus the governor's, lieutenant governor's and attorney general's offices are up for re-election this year, giving Virginia Democrats the opportunity not only to increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026.
That's why we're teaming up with WomenCount and the Electing Women Alliance for a May 15 digital fundraising event benefiting 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative office in Virginia.
[Donate now to RSVP and join us at 7 PM ET on Thursday, May 15 on Zoom in support of these candidates.](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UidqWPrcdaX53NBiV9uwahZwObmegnR4eGl4co9hk8JtR0E0rWMKb9vQ10SAvoMnceJhbgyJrwv1I76C2VS2XGyETQbW23r7ARJOwhJ1lsTrJQVuUvYvvFJFk5hovm8kogE3aLZPsix5bh7hbAEjA_1hP3xesL1GRL-bFE_LjUEHLJHAK8VQhgPeb_sfdBgB0aHonfISD2k=&c=IN5nZIv-_2zX4vCmtn2XgjtVJ_jJd_ICmJ7NnAp7BTbFv68d4l3fhQ==&ch=jPevVezgC6FxT6PcNXg4-a-VP-dTgUYG3f4zmz6_x78NwL6eTikz1Q==)
Donations will be divided evenly among the candidates below. You can also customize your contribution. Zoom information will be provided in your donation receipt.
The candidates:

* District 22 candidate Elizabeth Guzman, a former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is looking to reclaim a seat.

* District 41 candidate Lily Franklin, who ran last cycle and lost to the incumbent Republican by only 183 votes.

* District 57 candidate May Nivar, who is in a two-person primary for this district that local leaders rate a top pickup opportunity.

* District 71 candidate Jessica Anderson, who lost in 2023 to the current Republican incumbent by only 1.9 percent after being vastly outspent.

* District 73 candidate Leslie Mehta, a medical charity founder who carries an endorsement from Abigail Spanberger.

* District 75 candidate Lindsey Dougherty, who's mounting a rematch in a district she barely lost to the current incumbent in 2019.

* District 82 candidate Kimberly Pope Adams, who fell short of flipping this district by less than half a percentage point in 2023.

* District 89 candidate Karen Robins Carnegie, a lawyer who's taking on the only open, competitive House seat.

Many of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17, and need our support to make sure gains for Democrats in Virginia are also gains for women--because right now, these women are losing the money race:

* Of the top 10 House of Delegates raisers, only three are Democratic women running in competitive races.

[Please donate now to RSVP and save your spot for our May 15 joint Zoom event benefiting Virginia candidates](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UidqWPrcdaX53NBiV9uwahZwObmegnR4eGl4co9hk8JtR0E0rWMKb9vQ10SAvoMnceJhbgyJrwv1I76C2VS2XGyETQbW23r7ARJOwhJ1lsTrJQVuUvYvvFJFk5hovm8kogE3aLZPsix5bh7hbAEjA_1hP3xesL1GRL-bFE_LjUEHLJHAK8VQhld1hwVhfUtbX7J78tTecs8=&c=IN5nZIv-_2zX4vCmtn2XgjtVJ_jJd_ICmJ7NnAp7BTbFv68d4l3fhQ==&ch=jPevVezgC6FxT6PcNXg4-a-VP-dTgUYG3f4zmz6_x78NwL6eTikz1Q==)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Rooting out fraud is essential to preserve Medicaid, Medicare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, The Democrats are on the attack. They have been shamelessly peddling misinformation about House Republicans’ work to cut fraud, waste and abuse in government programs and save taxpayer money.

| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs2nFziNLwjvYwbHLFIXKi)
---
| | | Friend,
The Democrats are on the attack.
**They have been shamelessly peddling misinformation about House Republicans’ work to cut fraud, waste and abuse in government programs and save taxpayer money.**
**[Help me fight back.](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs2nFziNLwjvYwbHLFIXOZ)**
---
[DONATE NOW →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs2nFziNLwjvYwbHLFIXOa)
[DONATE NOW →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs2nFziNLwjvYwbHLFIXOa)
In New York alone, the Medicaid program spent over $100 Billion last year, which is up an unprecedented 59% under Kathy Hochul's disastrous leadership.
**That’s a staggering amount of money and more than Florida and Texas, combined.**
State and federal authorities project that 10% of all Medicaid spending is lost to fraud and abuse, with billions more spent providing free health care to illegal immigrants.
Both in New York and nationally, the failure to combat fraud in our public health care programs is damaging our economy and depriving those in need of the quality health care they deserve.
[](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs2nFziNLwjvYwbHLFIXKh)
| | | **__“For too long, Washington’s reckless spending has gone unchecked, driving up deficits year after year with little accountability or oversight._That era is coming to an end._ **Rooting out fraud, waste and abuse...and administering these programs more efficiently will allow these benefits to reach the most vulnerable individuals these programs were created to protect.**”**

clean_body: Friend, The Democrats are on the attack. They have been shamelessly peddling misinformation about House Republicans’ work to cut fraud, waste and abuse in government programs and save taxpayer money. | | | | | | | Friend, The Democrats are on the attack. They have been shamelessly peddling misinformation about House Republicans’ work to cut fraud, waste and abuse in government programs and save taxpayer money. In New York alone, the Medicaid program spent over $100 Billion last year, which is up an unprecedented 59% under Kathy Hochul's disastrous leadership. That’s a staggering amount of money and more than Florida and Texas, combined. State and federal authorities project that 10% of all Medicaid spending is lost to fraud and abuse, with billions more spent providing free health care to illegal immigrants. Both in New York and nationally, the failure to combat fraud in our public health care programs is damaging our economy and depriving those in need of the quality health care they deserve. | | | “For too long, Washington’s reckless spending has gone unchecked, driving up deficits year after year with little accountability or oversight.That era is coming to an end. Rooting out fraud, waste and abuse...and administering these programs more efficiently will allow these benefits to reach the most vulnerable individuals these programs were created to protect.” | | | President Trump shares my commitment to stop taxpayers from being ripped off, while strengthening these programs for the long term. As your voice in Congress, I will continue working with President Trump to get our country back on the right track. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Nicole | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

| **** The budget fight isn't over--and President Trump needs your help to make sure the final reconciliation bill--a.k.a., the **_" One, Big, Beautiful Bill"--_**delivers on the promises he made. **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

| **** America needs you to educate other voters and put real pressure on Congress to do what must be done to save our country: cut wasteful spending and protect taxpayers, not raise taxes on hardworking Americans like you.That's why we created a [**Budget Reconciliation Battle How-To Guide**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aaf7fa11/1edb9794aaf172a8)--a clear, ready-to-use guide that will help you take meaningful action starting _today_.Inside you'll find:
* **A sample letter to the editor** --make sure your local community is getting the truth
* **Ready-to-send emails and texts for friends and family** --educate and spur them to action
* **Social media posts** --amplify support for America First policies
* **Messages you can send directly to your members of Congress** --push them to do the right thing
* **And more**
We made it easy--because we know time is short.You've stepped up before. **You helped America First win in November 2024 --and now we need your voice again.** Let's make sure Congress gets the message loud and clear: **no tax hikes, no more delays, and no more reckless spending.**********____**** **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

Did you know...

**960,000 Americans will fall victim to a clogged circulatory system this year?
**
...All due to rancid cholesterol clogging their artery walls, restricting blood flow to their hearts, brains and vital organs... with the power to turn a living, breathing human being into a fading memory for their family... and a mere statistic.

But thanks to this nutrient, this once-savage killer is now as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar.

Which means all 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries and microscopic arterioles found in the human body are now rejuvenated — thanks to its effects...

...allowing nutrient-rich blood cells to reach every organ in the body!

Which means...
* Organs from eyes to ears and hearts and lungs can function normally
* Better memory and recall for continued learning
* Creaky joints soothed and comforted
* Vibrant new energy to do the things you love
* A deeper and more restful sleep
* And much, much more!

| Hi, my name is Abigail Spanberger. I'm a three-term congresswoman from Virginia, a former CIA officer, and the only Democrat in America who can flip a Governor's seat in 2025. My opponent just launched over $1 million in ads. Soon the floodgates will open. The same billionaires who got Trump elected will come after me and everything we've built together. _But I'm not intimidated by far-right extremists._ In 2018, I won a seat in Congress held by Republicans for fifty years, and I'm gearing up to make history again — with donors like you by my side. [Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me run my own ads and win tough elections all over the country? Our election in Virginia this November will set the tone for Democrats in 2026 and beyond, so it's critical that we raise enough money to win decisively.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ee589ef-a254-4de0-af25-bb6c87191d00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7153f06d-e45e-4c62-bfc3-acb5dcdd36da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: JD Vance
subject: Don’t pee on my boots & tell me it’s raining.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
They’re trying to impeach Donald Trump. Call me crazy, but I think I’ve seen this one before.

| | | |
## **MESSAGE FROM JD VANCE**

---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It’s been over 100 days since President Trump took office, and the Democrat HOAX machine has been firing on all cylinders.
Radicals have now introduced SEVEN Articles of IMPEACHMENT against Trump, again!
**Call me crazy but I think I’ve seen this one before!**
They tried once and _**FAILED.**_ Then, they tried twice and **_FAILED._** Now, they’re trying thrice and will _**FAIL AGAIN.**_
**This is all just one big WITCH HUNT. Nobody believes their crap.**
Democrats don’t have any policies. All they have is lies.
They can’t stand that we have a President who’s putting the working men & women of America first, **AND NOW THEY’RE THREATENING TO IMPEACH TRUMP AGAIN!**
**_[WILL YOU STAND WITH TRUMP IF THEY IMPEACH HIM AGAIN?>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**

[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
American citizens are finally being sent to the front of the line, and Democrats are going crazy.
Everywhere you turn, the wins for our country are piling up, and we only have one person to thank - YOU!
Your participation in our polls and responses to messages like these really make a difference. THANK YOU!
**_So before the end of the day, can you please answer this one question for President Trump:_**
**_[DO YOU STILL STAND WITH TRUMP AFTER DEMOCRATS INTRODUCED SEVEN NEW ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT?>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Thank you again for everything.
JD Vance
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/athe/?__vbtrk=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjkwMTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

## Replacing STAAR Tests
The Texas House [approved a proposal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOiPb2PBTuPgbulx7JVrwEqwYO2I3Ad7-RKR7gqumGM2nmfm-DTcIMaT7F6zo-JjzkHCniMy4DXM-gBmmBz1CjLiNiATJ03PQUlshrVBm8BDiOZjSu1H6TpXoVGtaraWtZbk47KZatha0rs1s5nGcx8aAVHUtu8b6rgzugkmrjFJSy7ZqjW_UP2xsB01nZ1UYiT5w3ipekPEAmuOZ37hVU17L6BbmJxX1_0L3he73fa8eB6TLLHR_rSl0_4n9qljyi1Cs-Y0kOAuMYQ0JGAUxwCYYicW0QLqjoGnJOQqYpvxKDGOIgU9BJzFe-HJz_rmHGAM1bWHkfYUQP734b2--nf4JAAD__6SSjEY) to replace the high-stakes end-of-year STAAR test with shorter instructional assessments throughout the year to reduce disruptions to teaching time and help schools measure student progress at more frequent intervals. The STAAR test is [widely disparaged](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGyqyAQhp8GOzKAIFpQ3MYut72ls5FVmaA4sEnM29_hvMJptvm_2W_3_3ef7hBiONa_sKOja0nTgZ8SkQjztKQLiGB-lmeIEfMDscDhyzkpoQwXhks9eQjxO-nGu4fwg2zQSautUsK0otlcuygNrZSdsb2AHkw79LY3nWg7LaRVTXB1mTBSSymUsDerfSd77MwA3WAWybRAHyjlG21IeEFZ4je9Md_mtDfRbURnYe0fpkamxnLiTPm1xzRDrL9UiqmRrhrCweGgdITE1FhTpsaqZ2oUdci2otXBt_QqyAmeWHghPAunxFcknoPnaeGFADInLBSOtcnOn58QYyidZVqsO4T4cx_9rtW3U_8DAAD__9iLiuc) by families and educators who argue it has an outsized impact on annual school and district accountability ratings. The new tests would be factored with other criteria. The House proposal would require test results to be [weighted against standardized test scores across the country](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTuu3DAMRVcjdxpIsmTHhYs07l7alAZt0TPK6GOI9Hx2H3iKZAGvIYGLi4ND8PfX_AUhhnz9BQlHfm1lzvikiMxY5628gBnWO91DjFgXRILsaZ-NMk4qJ7WdPYT4nm3jx0X5QTc46t72xijXquY2Ili1-MVu7dA6GAYcNvCt80ZZ1_V2acJ4wpTTVmtlVH_pre_0D-zcAN3gNi2sQh-41AvfkPEFtMV3eWC9rCU1cbwx7yTan8JMwkxrSenIgd8h7bDy2RFmgoM4ZGEmKgff5IqZK0T5L_5gZcRroAh8VBRmOrWEmdQ5dPu_BM8Ed6wkwT8grygJd6jAKPcImSQXiTGkkM-IGKBKRmIJ_s9xLrlJehPj6dXU0e_PEGOgrhdWXROE-LmLv_eNx2j-BgAA__8tIqIl), while also offering some positive incentives. It would take effect as soon as this fall. The Senate proposal would [delay rollout until 2028](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u6yAQxfHV2B0WYGziguI17vLaW1pjGGIUYixm8rX7q2QLdwG_o6P_z3k5Q8ppv_yHGzp-xbLs-KSMzFiXWF7ADP5K15Qz1hWRYA90LFrqQchBKLMESPm9mDa4VYZJteiUNVZrOfSy3Zw6rWqUMKxRmilGG7ySVlsfV-ynfvRtcp8xOSijlNTSdtaEUZ1wHCYYpyGqxkgMiUvteEPGF1DM7_LA2vlya7PbmA9q-n-Nnhs9E-ywc9lTqXiUyl2pl0bPXyfWlLPgIj56g3sWxABVMBILnxEqCd5QbOVOKNY7iwgeSYCgKx6cPGRBuANjo-e2unA8U86JRtsYeblByt9L_LeQD6d_AwAA__---4sS) and give the commissioner of education wide latitude in determining accountability ratings. It would also require school board members in districts that receive F ratings two years in a row to stand for reelection.
## Fox Attacks Four People in San Marcos
Four people in San Marcos are being treated after they were [attacked by a fox](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8GdxhA0HbBYjbuerazNCWU3aQRDNS09t9PnLzkfcDbVuWe3HP_3Oc7hBjS4zdsaOlc85zwqBGJsMxrPoEI3Ku-QoxYFsQKydd9VkIZLgyXevYQ4mfWjbeL8KNs0MpBD0oJ04nmaYV36G5-wc5rM5oVlMZODYMXMCKCa4K9YMJILaVQYmgH7Xt5w96M0I9mlUwL9IFyaemJhCfUNX7yG0vr8tZE-yTaK-t-MTUxNR3H0b5OSNeTqemyYWqK2UFkaqqQ-AbF5eu45pMX3HMh9PHDv1Q5EI8Ilfia_xYeEv8O8b3kbaeQHrzAErByl5PDki5cU6zfjxBjqP3AtHhsEOL_jvSzZd9W_QsAAP__VryRNA) on a city trail Sunday. Two of the victims were bitten by the animal. Officials are still looking for the fox. They warn that it could have rabies, considering foxes aren’t typically aggressive toward humans. The Purgatory Creek Natural Area [remains open](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI7swQQoKLahu9tuiQY8Tqw4NhrPDcnbr1jtG9xmpjjS-fn-fC1fGFPMt9_4pEneoSyZjppIhHgJ5Y0iuD3qI6ZEvBJVzL7uCxjotOm0dYvHmD6La_y0Gj_ahibbux7AdK1p7pNrO7BD144jQWvMQH4Y3EhjsGsb1hGbOJ1mprPOWgOmv_TOX-1A127E69gFq5whH6XwRe4k9MYa0qe8iC9beTZpuovsVbW_FMwK5uM4Lo-KcooK5nONgjmVDZOC-YxSMJvzWFAwb1E-ugRdMesn8laqZoyVzrdGqnoreSPOVWMQYs20FxbyOpS3_g9Hx6z3b76hFP7ojYkeOqN8MyaNTKhgbnjy-xFTivXaK2duT4zpX3_5GfXXBH8DAAD__9wbl5M), but visitors are urged to avoid the trails. "He fought with it, like kicking it, punching it, for like four minutes straight," a [park visitor said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngc5obWwcChfX0OXaK9EGrxMrBiN7E8jbn3K6N_j70Yy--XOdrxhT3O6_cSXHZ8jzRkdNxExlDvlEZlye9RlTonIjqrj5us8KlBFghNSzx5g-s269u4EfZUtOWm2VAtND-3Ch9wDWqDAsYPrQD1aNqIOx43CBYGQb3bcMjNRSggLbWe0HeaHBjDiMJshGA_nIuXT8IKYTa0if_KbSLXltk3sw77XpfzVqatR0HEcX8mnxVTlu30ijpq-pUVPIp_gPEvur3JFz-YilED1FxU2sWJZcBReMqbbF-f2IKcU62EbDfcWY_k3yz456O_U3AAD__9_Ofkk) in describing a conversation with one of the victims. "He told us he had to get rushed to the hospital."
## Mavs, Spurs Land Top Two Draft Picks
The NBA Draft lottery was [held Monday night](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DvO3SAUBODV4A4LMH4VFGnc3bQprWM42MgYLDi5j91HN1v4-9Fo5vvzWB8QYkj7b7jQ0NvnNeGrRiTCsvr8BiKwZz1DjFg2xArJ1XtVQvVc9Fzq1UGIn1U3zmzCzbJBI0c9KiX6TjSHmZywg0Y9-XmarO5G3FAOaD26eei7rgnmWyZ6qaUUSoztqN0gJxz6GYa595JpgS5QLi0dSPiG6uMnP7G0Nl9NNAfRXVn3i6mFqaXeuVBtP3Dk_A0wtaQNmFq2gnCGtPPvQaYWKBRsRKaWC55Ygj0rf4XE0wbcFfDEY_4qfHgJ-0GcMq8Y0RJ3f0_k94EpX9zmfGPhPsK-c9WpvhvnoWsPumJTjLtfIcZQh5FpsV8Q4v_N9DPpp1H_AgAA__9x6ZU9). Two of the victims were bitten by the animal. | | | | | | Wednesday, May 14, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1888, the State Capitol was . However, the Capitol Board refused to recognize the building as complete due to leaks in the copper roof. It got so hot in parts of Texas yesterday that squirrels were seen "splooting." Check out in today's Et Cetera section. We're sponsored today by . Be sure to check them out in today's edition. Abilene 🌥️ 101/70° | Amarillo 🌥️ 88/64° | Austin ☁️ 105/71° | Brownsville ⛅ 94/77° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 92/76° | DFW ⛅ 102/72° | El Paso ☁️ 91/72° | Houston ☁️ 94/72° | Laredo ⛅ 110/74° | Lubbock ⛅ 96/68° | Midland ⛅ 98/73° | San Antonio ☁️ 105/69° | Tyler ⛅ 94/72° | Waco ☁️ 102/72° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Replacing STAAR Tests The Texas House to replace the high-stakes end-of-year STAAR test with shorter instructional assessments throughout the year to reduce disruptions to teaching time and help schools measure student progress at more frequent intervals. The STAAR test is by families and educators who argue it has an outsized impact on annual school and district accountability ratings. The new tests would be factored with other criteria. The House proposal would require test results to be , while also offering some positive incentives. It would take effect as soon as this fall. The Senate proposal would and give the commissioner of education wide latitude in determining accountability ratings. It would also require school board members in districts that receive F ratings two years in a row to stand for reelection. Fox Attacks Four People in San Marcos Four people in San Marcos are being treated after they were on a city trail Sunday. Two of the victims were bitten by the animal. Officials are still looking for the fox. They warn that it could have rabies, considering foxes aren’t typically aggressive toward humans. The Purgatory Creek Natural Area , but visitors are urged to avoid the trails. "He fought with it, like kicking it, punching it, for like four minutes straight," a in describing a conversation with one of the victims. "He told us he had to get rushed to the hospital." Mavs, Spurs Land Top Two Draft Picks The NBA Draft lottery was . The Dallas Mavericks and San Antonio Spurs were awarded the first two picks. The lottery gives the 14 teams that didn’t make the playoffs a in the draft, assigning higher odds to teams with the worst season records. The Mavericks had a 1.8% chance of winning the lottery. The Mavericks are expected to draft Duke’s , who could provide an immediate impact on both ends of the court after the departure of Luka Doncic this season. The Spurs, meanwhile, are reportedly considering trading for 30-year-old Milwaukee Bucks superstar Giannis Antetokounmpo. | Flying together with our sponsor Who would've thought that something SO easy, like in the shower for 3 minutes... ... could make that terrible itching and foul foot smell vanish almost overnight ... ... while also improving the health of your nails and skin ... ... all without using toxic pills, useless creams, or gels that can ruin your skin even more. Dermatologists are totally clueless about why works so perfectly. But the fact that over 45,000 patients got rid of the foot fungus in a matter of days ... ... makes it too good not to try at least once! The board of trustees is expected to vote on the plan later this month. () ➤ Austin: The Texas House approved a bill that would allow mothers to use HOV lanes, even when driving alone. The bill was initially drafted to apply to pregnant women. “ I think HOV lanes are stupid anyway ,” said the bill’s author. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Horse-Drawn Carriage Stops Outlaw in Smash-Up, But Democrats Still Deny Mennonite’s Right to Self-Insure
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Horse-Drawn Carriage Stops Outlaw in Smash-Up, But Democrats Still Deny Mennonite’s Right to Self-Insure (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=f271f9ca44&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on May 14, 2025 06:15 am
So much for insurance choice for Maine religious orders preferring horse-propelled buggies to Ford Mustang Shelbys. Faith-based freedom? Forget that too. The Democrat-majority Legislature shot down the latest attempt to let Mennonites self-insure their wheels. LD 918, “An Act to Allow a Qualifying Religious Organization to Self-Insure for Automobile Insurance” was introduced – yet again [...]

------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on May 14, 2025 06:11 am
A bill that would have allowed Mennonites to self-insure their vehicles so that they could comply with a religious prohibition on commercial insurance narrowly failed in the Maine House on Thursday, after one Democrat changed her vote at the last minute after initially voting in favor. Sen. Tim Nangle’s (D-Cumberland) bill, LD 1869, would give municipalities the authority to adopt up to a one percent additional sales tax on [...]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
The numbers prove the case – we need to rally behind President Trump!

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZW1vY3JhdC1TdXBwb3J0LW9mLUlsbGVnYWwtQWxpZW5zXzIwMjUwNTEzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RGVtb2NyYXQtU3VwcG9ydC1vZi1JbGxlZ2FsLUFsaWVucyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD01OSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/3STVPv9hbK-akDjZWwzCJw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The Trump-Republican border agenda has always been about common sense - shutting down the invasion of our country, putting limits on asylum claims, and launching a concerted and consistent effort to return migrants to their home countries.

The numbers prove the case. **Our America First agenda is getting the job done.**

Illegal crossings at the U.S.-Mexico border have rapidly dropped to a RECORD LOW...

There were just 7,181 encounters in March - _a 95% drop compared to March 2024_!

The Democrats, in their full embrace of radical policies the American people have rejected, have doubled down and are resorting to lawfare tactics in a desperate attempt to obstruct our progress to restore law and order and keep our citizens safe from dangerous criminals.
A recent poll revealed that just 22% of Democrats approve of what President Trump is doing to deport illegal immigrants... **78% want to KEEP THE CRIMINALS HERE**!

Here's what I'd like to know today. It's hard to believe this is even a debate.

**Do you support President Trump 's efforts to deport criminal illegal aliens residing in our country?**
---
[ **YES** ](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZW1vY3JhdC1TdXBwb3J0LW9mLUlsbGVnYWwtQWxpZW5zXzIwMjUwNTEzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RGVtb2NyYXQtU3VwcG9ydC1vZi1JbGxlZ2FsLUFsaWVucyZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD01OSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSJ9/76iDd6_2P3caw7KcpruePg)
---

clean_body: The numbers prove the case – we need to rally behind President Trump! | | | | | Fellow Conservative, The Trump-Republican border agenda has always been about common sense - shutting down the invasion of our country, putting limits on asylum claims, and launching a concerted and consistent effort to return migrants to their home countries. The numbers prove the case. Our America First agenda is getting the job done. Illegal crossings at the U.S.-Mexico border have rapidly dropped to a RECORD LOW... There were just 7,181 encounters in March - a 95% drop compared to March 2024! The Democrats, in their full embrace of radical policies the American people have rejected, have doubled down and are resorting to lawfare tactics in a desperate attempt to obstruct our progress to restore law and order and keep our citizens safe from dangerous criminals. A recent poll revealed that just 22% of Democrats approve of what President Trump is doing to deport illegal immigrants... 78% want to KEEP THE CRIMINALS HERE! Here's what I'd like to know today. It's hard to believe this is even a debate. Do you support President Trump 's efforts to deport criminal illegal aliens residing in our country? Let me know and THANK YOU so much for your steadfast support of our work at Team Cruz. The Biden-Harris era will go down in history for its lawlessness, and the left's America Last border agenda must be fully exposed and sent to the dustbin of history. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id: 2024-08-16-13:05:22:002t |

| Only 27 Days Left to Elect Taunton's Larry Quintal!
---
---
| Dear Peter,
There are only 27 days left between now and our next Special Election.
We have a great opportunity to pick up the House seat in Easton and Taunton! Our candidate is Taunton City Councilor Larry Quintal who has a proven track record of standing up for veterans, lowering the tax burden, and increasing transparency.
We need him at the State House.
On the other hand, his opponent is a lobbyist who has worked to pass tax increases and more spending on the migrants. Her campaign is funded by lobbyists and special interest groups that are dependent on our tax dollars. It would be a nightmare if she was elected.
[Won't you please help Larry by clicking here to make a much needed donation?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWnlcm9zXB_BWOfLMitBJnXGsRZ0kRdpEbSeVv09--ZkB7xxh5w2xYoF6ZQArIor-yAQtNoGhIFEuh_mxb_VegSVnd8WZvXr9A2j8_BPj3YqRRFnYegkMh7Ux2eN2I0LOG4B6tC2c0Qdz4ZA2_PRrsDdSAh-k90VjK8-pLKfE0oI2Jtj-ITTwGQoaH6khw9gSpebYvbmVC6x4daTOvd4Cw==&c=FkV5tCdD3qdJI_n6fMzECf0GNWDl69KJv_hAra_RqfmLH1lHlTIaYw==&ch=BZRM5zueuQm1Po8K3r6OGcrItG1wjaSLMO41Qm2T_j_ROiep2EIaxg==)

| | [DONATE TO LARRY QUINTAL FOR STATE REP NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWnlcm9zXB_BWOfLMitBJnXGsRZ0kRdpEbSeVv09--ZkB7xxh5w2xYoF6ZQArIor-yAQtNoGhIFEuh_mxb_VegSVnd8WZvXr9A2j8_BPj3YqRRFnYegkMh7Ux2eN2I0LOG4B6tC2c0Qdz4ZA2_PRrsDdSAh-k90VjK8-pLKfE0oI2Jtj-ITTwGQoaH6khw9gSpebYvbmVC7aIKrq7yvW8g==&c=FkV5tCdD3qdJI_n6fMzECf0GNWDl69KJv_hAra_RqfmLH1lHlTIaYw==&ch=BZRM5zueuQm1Po8K3r6OGcrItG1wjaSLMO41Qm2T_j_ROiep2EIaxg==)

| As a State Representative, Larry is committed to amending the Right to Shelter law to limit taxpayer funded benefits to our legal residents, because as a City Councilor, Larry saw first-hand the problems caused at the Taunton Clarion Hotel. Larry is the right person to win this House seat!
Unfortunately, the biggest obstacle he faces to winning this race is raising enough money in an extremely short period. He doesn't have lobbyist friends to fill his war chest. Larry is relying on people who want to hold Gov. Healey accountable and bring back common sense to the State House. [Will you help Larry by immediately donating directly to his campaign?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWnlcm9zXB_BWOfLMitBJnXGsRZ0kRdpEbSeVv09--ZkB7xxh5w2xYoF6ZQArIor-yAQtNoGhIFEuh_mxb_VegSVnd8WZvXr9A2j8_BPj3YqRRFnYegkMh7Ux2eN2I0LOG4B6tC2c0Qdz4ZA2_PRrsDdSAh-k90VjK8-pLKfE0oI2Jtj-ITTwGQoaH6khw9gSpebYvbmVC7Nt928IiicXw==&c=FkV5tCdD3qdJI_n6fMzECf0GNWDl69KJv_hAra_RqfmLH1lHlTIaYw==&ch=BZRM5zueuQm1Po8K3r6OGcrItG1wjaSLMO41Qm2T_j_ROiep2EIaxg==)
Your support is critical to his winning this seat. Larry cannot do it without your strong support. [A donation of $1000, $500, or $250](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nWnlcm9zXB_BWOfLMitBJnXGsRZ0kRdpEbSeVv09--ZkB7xxh5w2xYoF6ZQArIor-yAQtNoGhIFEuh_mxb_VegSVnd8WZvXr9A2j8_BPj3YqRRFnYegkMh7Ux2eN2I0LOG4B6tC2c0Qdz4ZA2_PRrsDdSAh-k90VjK8-pLKfE0oI2Jtj-ITTwGQoaH6khw9gSpebYvbmVC5UI3aLi26Xvg==&c=FkV5tCdD3qdJI_n6fMzECf0GNWDl69KJv_hAra_RqfmLH1lHlTIaYw==&ch=BZRM5zueuQm1Po8K3r6OGcrItG1wjaSLMO41Qm2T_j_ROiep2EIaxg==) will help him buy lawn signs, send out mail, print materials for grassroots efforts, and increase his paid social media campaign.
Let's make winning this seat a reality over the next 27 days. Sincerely, Amy Carnevale Chairwoman

subject: FWD: Sen. Warren DROPS THE HAMMER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Save Social Security and protect Sen. Elizabeth Warren! >>
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS** We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to Elizabeth Warren.

Social Security is under ATTACK, and so are the Democrats fighting for it.

**_It’s absolutely critical we stand with Elizabeth Warren in this must-win fight for our benefits!_**

[**We need 32 more Democrats in your state to sign on. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=6&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=7&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC) | [**ADD YOUR NAME WHILE YOU CAN: THANK SENATOR ELIZABETH WARREN FOR LEADING THE FIGHT AGAINST TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=8&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC)
---
Thank you,
Voter Protection Project
**\- - - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - - -**
FROM: Sign the Letter 📝 (protectvoting.org)
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SUBJECT: re: Elizabeth Warren DROPS THE HAMMER
Elizabeth Warren just wrote a SCATHING op-ed for Fox News slamming Trump’s attacks on Social Security:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=9&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC)
**The MAGA mob is FUMING — Trump will do anything to force her silence!**

[**We need 500 local Democrats to stand with Warren in her fight: Donate $3 to add your signature to our thank you card! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=10&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC)
[**DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=11&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=12&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90115?t=13&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19846%2E878179%2EBPIeoC).**

President Donald Trump **[tore an ABC News reporter apart](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after they questioned his decision to accept a $400 billion aircraft from Qatar as a gift during a White House ceremony.
**["You're ABC fake news right?"](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Trump asked, pointing at the reporter. "You should be embarrassed for asking that question!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump continued, quoting an old golfer who said, "When they give you a put, you take it" meaning when someone offers you a $400 million gift that the American taxpayers don't have to pay for, why not take it. "Some people are stupid, they so 'no, I insist on putting it' and then they put it and they miss it and their partner gets angry at them."
The reporter doubled down, pressing Trump again about the expensive gift. "Have you ever been given a gift worth millions of dollars and then not received,..." the reporter started to ask before Trump cut her off.
"It's not a gift to me, it's a gift to the Department of Defense, and you should know better because **[you've been embarrassed enough today!](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**" Trump snapped at the reporter.
Watch the tense moment here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7809341f-9b44-425f-81d4-157bec899f97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/4bc5692d-7f27-45b7-9669-798991db354d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# MAGA Navy SEAL confronts hysterical Democrat for accusing DOGE, Elon Musk of corruption
Arizona Congressman Eli Crane **[sounded-off on Rep. Robert Garcia](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing Elon Musk and DOGE of corruption and bad faith action in the government.
_"Can we get some therapy dogs in here,...**[I'm worried about their mental stability!!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **_Crane mocked the Democrats.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Garcia plead with his colleagues to see that Musk's government cuts are a ploy to funnel money back to his companies.
However, Crane came ready for a brawl.
"I think it's funny, Mr. Chairman, when I hear my colleagues on the other side of the aisle whining and complaining about Elon Musk...and how much money he donated to President Trump, yet I don't recall the same outrage when, you know, billionaires on their side of the aisle like Mark Zuckerberg George Soros, or any of the other ones that were donating **[massive sums of money to their side of the aisle.](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "
Crane then exposed USAID's Agency for International Development, which had a budget of over 40 billion in fiscal year 2023.
"1.5 million to advance diversity, equity, and inclusion in Serbia's workplaces and business communities. 2.5 million for electric vehicles in Vietnam. **[2 million for sex changes and LGBT activism in Guatelmala.](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 6 million to fund tourism in Egypt," Crane reported from the official budget report.
Democrats could not muster up a rebuke regarding the out-of-control federal spending, but Crane went even further, defending Musk against Democrat's unfounded hatred.
"Don't forget that Elon Musk campaigned with the President.**[The American people were very excited about Elon Musk](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** using all of the tools and experience that he has and he's used on the private sector to come in and streamline this federal government."
**[Check out Crane's unforgettable take down for yourself:](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fbda2bd0-af75-4a3d-b36c-05698947a363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---

Listen to the latest episode of _[Former Member](https://substack.com/redirect/0cb9c781-f70d-4fb8-848b-77dfc0326eed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , where I talk to former members of Congress--Democrats and Republicans--to get their perspectives on what it was like to serve, and how things are different today vs. when they were around.
Yesterday, I spoke with [Sam Coppersmith](https://substack.com/redirect/aa9abb3f-d756-49c7-a628-7681e53aa7a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a one-term Democratic Congressman from Arizona who served from 1993 to 1995.
He [ran for the U.S. Senate in 1994](https://substack.com/redirect/c8ecf97e-5fe3-48ea-ba54-fb2ba8a79032?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a Republican wave year and lost. Since then, he has stayed connected to politics, has chaired the Democratic Party in Arizona, and--just to keep the rest of us humble--[runs triathlons](https://substack.com/redirect/35b0ad50-b8e9-4996-ad06-58d0290f7fdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Details below.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTYzNDMwODUwLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzQ3MjI3NDY4LCJleHAiOjE3NDk4MTk0NjgsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.JMdP-GOQlfZNrqMRu2A6P0IyTpKjQFZGEPbxnkVfR6A?)
### **Topics from my conversation with Sam Coppersmith**
_Want a transcript of this conversation? Click the "Transcript" tab towards the [top of this page](https://substack.com/redirect/68fa00b1-11a5-488c-99e9-e5cfa402878e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._1
* _0:00 - 2:05_: Sam's background and time in Congress.
* _2:06 - 5:54_: How the NFL got him elected to the House of Representatives.
* _5:55 - 13:12_: The Republican Revolution of '94, and how the axiom that "all politics is local" is dead.
* _13:13 - 20:14_: Can you get anything done in just one term? (Or, Sam Coppersmith briefly roasting me.)
* _20:15 - 23:12_: The absurdity (and political opportunity) of tax subsidies for professional sports teams.2
* _23:13 - 27:50_: Members of Congress who are actually doing a good job.
* _27:51 - 33:32_: The challenge of developing personal relationships in Congress when you're running in a competitive district. (Flying back and forth to campaign makes it hard to get to know people!)
* _33:33 - 37:20_: Political realignment from the '90s to the present.
* _37:21 - 44:32_: Democracy, its future, and innovation in government.3 (And, how we vote on too much stuff in the U.S.)
* _44:33 - 48:04_: What do you miss about Congress? And wrap-up.

_Note: A few people have told me that these emails are sometimes going into spam folders. If you a)**mark the email as "not spam"** and b) **save bensamuels@substack.com to your contacts** , that should address the issue._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=163430850&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzNDMwODUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDcyMjc0NjgsImV4cCI6MTc0OTgxOTQ2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jq4rH0ERpfACL9625Aya56AgJtA4QTOnOLdiT_YQid8)
1
Apparently the transcript option doesn't exist on the Substack mobile app. But on a mobile web browser or on your desktop, there should be a transcript option.
2
Just a few hours after I spoke with Sam, a [stadium funding bill passed the Missouri House](https://substack.com/redirect/e83f736e-d59c-477d-a6ff-d2bc7a5f4dd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). (It's currently stalled in the Missouri Senate.)
As I have written about [multiple](https://substack.com/redirect/ad0e6fd2-74e3-4497-9304-de103033b56d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [times](https://substack.com/redirect/a4b53695-1e3f-49f5-8bc4-02a22ba7148b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [before](https://substack.com/redirect/e9b78bf9-aab2-4309-a138-f749910be76f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), this is an extremely bad use of taxpayer money--especially when you consider [what Missouri isn't funding](https://substack.com/redirect/39553fbd-493d-448e-8dca-6b0977315e81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in its latest budget.
3
I was referring to [San Francisco's Proposition I](https://substack.com/redirect/5be7ad9a-437d-4e76-9554-1c4c1fa45727?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a 2014 ballot measure. It isn't _exactly_ what I remembered, but it's just about as absurd, and my broader point stands. (Namely, that it's an extremely technical question that elected officials should be addressing, and not the voters via ballot measure.)

| **USPS workers and unions sound the alarm:** They need _everyone_ to pay attention as Trump and Musk attempt to dismantle and privatize the USPS! In March**, DOGE cut billions of dollars from the USPS budget and cut nearly 10,000 employees!**

Now, **Trump and Musk are quietly shopping the USPS to private investors and laying the groundwork to sell it off!**

**If privatized, essential USPS services could vanish or become outrageously expensive** — cutting off rural communities, seniors, veterans, and millions of Americans who depend on affordable, reliable mail.

**[That’s why postal workers are taking to the streets and asking Americans to stand with them against these dangerous threats! Can you add your name now to stand with postal workers and demand that Congress reject Trump’s plan to privatize the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107657707/545413677/1878703426?refcode=NDCAF_20250514_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTU2NDE2MC1jMzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp2h1tIrKr3VLA4ow9JqmBAjFnVtTFMosqACjmIFtL0=&emci=a13c38c3-e12c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1e564160-c330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=48524772)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell Democrats to fight back harder against Trump -- and thank the ones who are already doing it
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Democrats to fight back harder against Trump -- and thank the ones who are already doing it](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa552af6-4eaa-43da-8081-6809e69b1893/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf89740af-808e-4867-b9dc-3806303327b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | We salute the Democrats who have been bravely taking on Trump since day one --[ **but we need the rest to join them and fight harder.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8c826c9-db7d-414f-a043-90935fbd7a4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Too many Democratic leaders are still acting as if Donald Trump were a normal president -- rather than an outright threat to our democracy and our nation. And they are opposing him with the usual sternly worded letters, and expressions of disappointment.

[**Those Democrats need to fight back harder, and use whatever legal and moral means they can to stop Trump. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b989741-ae77-43b4-bca0-58d3a4f018c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

They need to speak forcefully and consistently about the magnitude of Trump's threat. They need to rally citizens to protest and not let Trump's actions become normalized. They need to block Republican legislation and priorities with whatever arcane procedure they can use. And they need to get a hell of a lot more creative -- and courageous. Our country needs them to lead NOW, not when it is too late. [**Add your name: Tell Democrats to fight back harder against Trump**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08039a68-b288-4ed2-b087-813bc6a779aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6100519-c47e-41fd-b399-0beead1981f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6513d9c-9af5-4f95-bf38-ed411cb01248/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1165fb6-b864-46f8-ad39-683857cc2a1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T865b1586-778d-4cce-983d-b042b48b4591/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction)
---
| LeftAction
Washington, District of Columbia
info@leftaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/telldemocratstofightbackharderagainsttrumpandthankt2?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: They’re telling me to suspend my campaign
body:
Can you please read my full response?

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkmcb48pd1ftq0rf35kqd1322d09s08clv68k1g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)
|
---
They’re telling me to suspend my campaign...
The sad fact is, Democrats have all the money, an army of shady billionaires, and a complicit media who will spread their lies with zero remorse.
I need to make up ground fast. We can’t afford to lose this race, or see Republicans get _swept off the map_ across the entire country.
My name is Byron Donalds.
I’m a _Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican_ running for Governor in the Free State of Florida.
**When President Trump endorsed me, he told me if we lose Florida, we lose the whole country.**
I know Florida is our _firewall_ against the hateful Left who despise the USA. That’s why the radical left is fighting so hard to take me down.
If Republicans lose this race, it will be the _**beginning**_ of the _**end**_ for our entire country.
We will never have a chance again.
But if you can chip in just a few dollars before the day is over, I will crush my fundraising goal and we will deliver the Democrats a humiliating defeat they never saw coming.
So from one diehard Pro-Trump Republican to another, I have one humble ask: _**[can you please help me out, even just a little bit?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z428sda5s2ck6bde8t63ri9oj2dmuq0blus52gk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)**_

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmmp49n6vqv2lkdvvrtbri2qa49kooj593ce6230_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)
|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9mv3fn5ltcvdlcp8hasp88cfue7tlr308idh560_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)
|
---
And listen, I know _**[a few dollars](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj5l961p4j8d861ppq0ahjogavk7c0qc6ff86540_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)**_ means a lot.
I grew up dirt poor in a single parent home where money was _always_ tight.
If you can’t afford to donate, I won’t hold it against you.
I know you still stand with President Trump.
My only ask is that you keep me and our country in your prayers.
I’m _**blessed**_ to have your support.

|
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zboultpjqr3asplpjcshdgdh0muecuucm278qs50_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)
|
---
Thank you,
Byron

|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zriadqisai55bbqmfemajstnqc9olmqgqvqi4g1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)
|

With smaller staffs, budgets, and constituencies, your gift goes the furthest at the state legislative ballot level – your donation could even mean the difference between a Dem victory or loss. | | |

**Hi there! We wanted to catch you as you sip your morning coffee...** We’re facing upcoming special elections nationwide. Our team is working to give our candidates the resources they need to win and lay the groundwork for must-win races this fall. **But just like you may need a morning caffeine boost, state Democrats also need a boost to fend off MAGA billionaires like Elon Musk, who supported groups that spent over $20 million to back the Trump-endorsed candidate in Wisconsin’s supreme court race.** [For the price of just one morning coffee – $5 – you can make a genuine difference in state legislative elections and help our party compete against right-wing billionaires. name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: A problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The truth is I can’t hold the line without you...

Friend,

I have a problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning.

_**The pink-haired, avocado toast-eating, wokesters in the Senate are doing everything they can to block us from keeping our promises to the American people.**_

**My Republican friends and I have been doing our best to keep them at bay, but the god 's honest truth is that we can't hold the line without the backing of loyal conservative crusaders like you.**

**[HOLD THE LINE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc90r76elsvs4cppbs8r0e8c555oqhkfrquhjur8_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gm4p74cth2bs)**

Right now, our majority is thinner than a bayou breeze. Every vote is going to count until our next faceoff with the liberals in 2026.

I hate to ask, but the future of our nation is at stake. If Republicans don't have the $$ to win next year, we'll be on a one-way ticket back to the Socialism of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

Hosted by Pastor Lucas Miles, this bold new podcast is designed to challenge, equip, and inspire today’s Church to stand firm in biblical truth. Each episode features conversations with influential voices like **Elijah Lamb** , **Pastor Rob McCoy** , **Lola Sheen** , and other faithful leaders confronting today’s cultural and spiritual battles head-on.

**Pastor John Amanchukwu Takes on the North Carolina General Assembly** On April 17, Pastor John Amanchukwu delivered a powerful speech at the North Carolina General Assembly press conference, advocating for the [statewide removal](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWJcc3LZ34hW1XV01b862hBVW2C4PM95wzKzJN6fpSVs5kBVqW5BWr2F6lZ3q5N41ZN_gLtk4XW5HFf083ZX7CjW7pYWxT1nWDwqW7D8yxx1lXZSNW4Z5Zm06_MSMXW7_crzf6zr59WW8bWTfN3j_PtZW6Ttnk23Gm_bRW1RGw-N7KfcmFW15slSY3c4V60N4VqxTKQFbXyW3nrBBf3HxNdBW6YS3lQ5j4bvjW8L79n71wbvcYW7Vvdwb6CS4lDW8Y68HB4mRVDRV5Xq9h6s5B7qW8c8kRG3mhwMRW7Wk_jW84FSc8W7fCBGx2c_qzqW2s10GB2J39nnW2FsWFn98fymHW6YQt7R2jMVjxW8ry9LR7Pmqn0W8rDDP7629qcxW6BQKT85bm7hGW2Xhzqn1zttgnW3mRXgY2dv0M2W4JF03Y9k30GGV4WdQC7Ck_vWW95GMCM8v50J2VlP5KS4bqNR1VgyzjG4R9s29W7HTQGl1j8Ghff4C5fZY04) of sexualized content from K-12 school libraries.
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/MWJcc3LZ34hW1XV01b862hBVW2C4PM95wzKzJN6fpSVM3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3ktW1WcpdY34Bb92W7vbHzW58f4ZdW2clKq86s9l51W7Npn026QCmGjVpKHr-1C9rrpW3bcJWl88YvS3W3q1TLw61qKGTW2SP8PB98-Xk9F475wWNh300W67R_6Q6FtF91W4zBpqd3l_mxSW5lbXRd98jcTpW6j1MZC3z7g0KW4zzxXh2xqZ4HVzqhcb5v840JN1sSLGXhWx7DW2z1S297BD_V-W7_tRXS3wMkYjW92NQsC6HZQSjW3L-HPB50b9G_f3WwH1l04)

Books such as _It’s Perfectly Normal_ , _Flamer_ , _All Boys Aren’t Blue_ , _Let’s Talk About It_ , and _PUSH_ are being forced on impressionable K–12 students, often without parental knowledge or consent. Containing graphic depictions of numerous sexual acts, including incest and rape, Pastor Amanchukwu explains how these books are calculated attacks meant to confuse children about their God-given identity. Pastor Amanchukwu coined the term “mental rape” to describe how sexually graphic novels “assault the soul, stain the brain, and rob children of their innocence.” As part of his mission to raise awareness about sexually explicit materials found in America’s public school libraries, he has spoken at more than 20 school board meetings across 17 states.

**Participate In Our Monthly Challenge**
---
This month, we’re focusing on spiritual endurance. Join us in memorizing and reflecting on a powerful verse: _Hebrews 10:36_ _
__“For you have need of endurance, so that when you have done the will of God, you may receive what is promised.”_ The book of Hebrews was written to early Christians who were weary under pressure—tempted to walk away from the faith or settle for something safer. The call then, and now, is simple but hard: endure. We live in a world that’s increasingly hostile to truth. Standing firm takes courage, clarity, and commitment. This verse is a timely reminder that doing God’s will often means staying the course when it would be easier to quit. Endurance isn’t about striving in your own strength. It’s about relying on the Holy Spirit, preaching the gospel to yourself daily, and fixing your eyes on what’s eternal. Reflection questions for the month: What trials or temptations are testing your endurance? What practical steps can you take to stay faithful and focused? The reward is worth it: eternity with Him. Free from sin, suffering, and separation. Until then, let’s run with endurance the race set before us. Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life.

clean_body: From campus revivals to bold truth in the public square, May was a month of impact. See how your support is helping shape culture and strengthen the Church. | Dear Peter, On Wednesday, April 30th, TPUSA Faith launched the Strong Church Podcast. Hosted by Pastor Lucas Miles, this bold new podcast is designed to challenge, equip, and inspire today’s Church to stand firm in biblical truth. Each episode features conversations with influential voices like Elijah Lamb , Pastor Rob McCoy , Lola Sheen , and other faithful leaders confronting today’s cultural and spiritual battles head-on. In this premiere episode, digital missionary Elijah Lamb joins Pastor Lucas Miles to tackle one of the most urgent questions facing the Church today: How can we reach Gen Z with biblical truth while remaining rooted in sound doctrine? From staying grounded in Scripture to uniting across denominational lines, this conversation is a must-watch for anyone passionate about building a stronger, more faithful Church. Watch now on , , or | Freedom Night In America May's Freedom Night in America , hosted by TPUSA Faith, was a powerful gathering that united believers for an evening of inspiration and bold truth. Held at Dream City Church in Phoenix, Arizona, the event featured keynote speaker Sage Steele, who shared a message on silence equating to complacency. “If I stood up for free speech” Steele shared in a passionate moment when encouraging parents to teach their children courage, ”but then I went silent with the most obvious things, then I’m a hypocrite. Not just to myself but to my three kids.” Join us in June for the next Freedom Night in America at Dream City Church in Phoenix! | Join us at the Young Women’s Leadership Summit 2025 Surround yourself with unapologetic women united in faith, family, and well-being—a sisterhood that has been waiting for you. Join us for the ten-year anniversary of the largest conservative event for women of all ages. Welcome to a place where vitality thrives, femininity shines, and truth is upheld. | Believers' Summit is BACK! In a culture that grows increasingly hostile to Biblical truth, the Church must not retreat. Now is the time to step up and move forward in faith. Join thousands of believers this October to equip, empower, and take a stand for the Kingdom. | Learn To Lead and Educate with Faith at the 2025 Educators' Summit Join us July 10–13 for our annual Educators' Summit — Transformational Learning: Educating Minds, Hearts, and Souls. This powerful event brings together educators, administrators, and parents to explore how we can cultivate not just academic excellence, but holistic development in students. Together, we’ll dive into transformational learning that nurtures intellectual growth, emotional well-being, and spiritual depth. | Pastor John Amanchukwu Takes on the North Carolina General Assembly On April 17, Pastor John Amanchukwu delivered a powerful speech at the North Carolina General Assembly press conference, advocating for the of sexualized content from K-12 school libraries. Books such as It’s Perfectly Normal , Flamer , All Boys Aren’t Blue , Let’s Talk About It , and PUSH are being forced on impressionable K–12 students, often without parental knowledge or consent. Containing graphic depictions of numerous sexual acts, including incest and rape, Pastor Amanchukwu explains how these books are calculated attacks meant to confuse children about their God-given identity. Pastor Amanchukwu coined the term “mental rape” to describe how sexually graphic novels “assault the soul, stain the brain, and rob children of their innocence.” As part of his mission to raise awareness about sexually explicit materials found in America’s public school libraries, he has spoken at more than 20 school board meetings across 17 states. | Participate In Our Monthly Challenge This month, we’re focusing on spiritual endurance. Join us in memorizing and reflecting on a powerful verse: Hebrews 10:36 “For you have need of endurance, so that when you have done the will of God, you may receive what is promised.” The book of Hebrews was written to early Christians who were weary under pressure—tempted to walk away from the faith or settle for something safer. The call then, and now, is simple but hard: endure. We live in a world that’s increasingly hostile to truth. Standing firm takes courage, clarity, and commitment. This verse is a timely reminder that doing God’s will often means staying the course when it would be easier to quit. Endurance isn’t about striving in your own strength. It’s about relying on the Holy Spirit, preaching the gospel to yourself daily, and fixing your eyes on what’s eternal. Reflection questions for the month: What trials or temptations are testing your endurance? What practical steps can you take to stay faithful and focused? The reward is worth it: eternity with Him. Free from sin, suffering, and separation. Until then, let’s run with endurance the race set before us. Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life. | Support TPUSA Faith Today! Are you ready to take on this challenge? Let's grow together! Stand with us in prayer and consider in your area! By gathering with others to pray for our nation, we can create a powerful community of believers united in seeking God’s guidance and strength. If you feel led, we ask you to consider financially supporting our mission so we can continue to spread God’s Word! | | | | | | | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: Our majority is thinner than a bayou breeze
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The truth is I can’t hold the line without you...

Friend,

I have a problem worse than a crawfish without seasoning.

_**The pink-haired, avocado toast-eating, wokesters in the Senate are doing everything they can to block us from keeping our promises to the American people.**_

**My Republican friends and I have been doing our best to keep them at bay, but the god 's honest truth is that we can't hold the line without the backing of loyal conservative crusaders like you.**

**[HOLD THE LINE](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zglv05umib6lucehdpc7hgqksccbuasirp0cogp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)**

Right now, our majority is thinner than a bayou breeze. Every vote is going to count until our next faceoff with the liberals in 2026.

I hate to ask, but the future of our nation is at stake. If Republicans don't have the $$ to win next year, we'll be on a one-way ticket back to the Socialism of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

Whatever you can spare to get us on track today - _**even if it 's only a few bucks**_ - would mean the world to me.

**[$25 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zte8dmqhs64k3dtqt0j3uf4anustcemllrv0a5to_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)**

**[$50 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2gj97flu1hebtore02amqi9oksd762l0pu6h8lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)**

**[$100 TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zebkck08t93eqdj350pekahqflq728kdlpja0d70_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)**

**[ANY $ TO HELP ME OUT](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9323aoa097pg0hk6p09lgl4asii69kgp3d0t8qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)**

Thank you for taking the time to protect our majority. **I hope and pray the money from this email is enough to keep us afloat for another 2 years.**

Sincerely,

Senator John Kennedy

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4r1tgbih4ilmamj2u241d7bv3a9shnvu8t7j5tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob7c9gmco74c5h2bs)

name: Lee Johnson
subject: I'm running to retire Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107667774/545440448/2109746102?refcode=250514_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTRmOTA1OC1jOTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nm8rEoW9yTM8l8yMQk_gQfcODp31x2VhwpKitzmmpng=) Friends, **My name is Lee Johnson, and I’m running for the United States Senate to retire Lindsey Graham in South Carolina.** I wasn’t born into politics—I was born in a construction family—operating heavy equipment before I could drive. My family taught me how to build things - like roads and bridges - and I’ve carried that with me everywhere: from construction sites and factory floors to boardrooms. I’m running because Lindsey Graham has forgotten about the people back home. He’s leading the charge to gut Social Security and Medicaid, and now, he backs the chaotic tariffs that are raising prices and cutting paychecks across South Carolina. We need honest leadership in Washington. I’ll fight to ban members of Congress from profiting off of public service. And I pledge to serve no more than two terms as your Senator, to ensure that our state has fresh, accountable leadership in Congress. This is a fight we can win, but we need your support. [**Can you split a donation between our campaign, and Seth Moulton today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107667775/545440449/2109746102?refcode=250514_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTRmOTA1OC1jOTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nm8rEoW9yTM8l8yMQk_gQfcODp31x2VhwpKitzmmpng=) I believe that Washington needs more builders - not dividers. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - to build an economy that works for everybody, not just the elite few. Lindsey Graham hasn’t held a town hall in 8 years. He stopped listening, and we’re paying the price. **That’s why I’m hitting the road to listen to voters across South Carolina and make their voices heard.[If you can, split a donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton to help us reach voters across South Carolina and build a movement to beat the Washington establishment and fire Lindsey Graham.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107667776/545440450/2109746102?refcode=250514_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTRmOTA1OC1jOTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nm8rEoW9yTM8l8yMQk_gQfcODp31x2VhwpKitzmmpng=)** From building infrastructure, to working on major water and energy projects, to leading major companies - I’ve spent my entire life building things from the ground up and fixing them when they break. I know how tough it is just to get by right now. Prices are rising. Wages aren’t moving. The gap between the haves and have nots is widening. And politicians in Washington - like Lindsey Graham - have left us behind. That’s why I’m running for the US Senate. [**Split a donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton today to join our fight and together, we will fire Lindsey Graham.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107667777/545440451/2109746102?refcode=250514_MFC_Johnson_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTRmOTA1OC1jOTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nm8rEoW9yTM8l8yMQk_gQfcODp31x2VhwpKitzmmpng=) Thank you, Lee

subject: !!!! Trump weaponizes Department of Justice to try and SILENCE Dem grasssroots donors 🚨🚨🚨
body:

Just wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter.

Our “Virginia Is for Women” Zoom, which we are co-hosting with WomenCount, EMILY's List, Virginia’s List, Elect Black Women, The Next 50, and Electing Women National Capital Region is **happening TOMORROW, and spots are filling up.** [**Reserve your spot today with a suggested donation of $50 →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107669887/545445911/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYWQwOGMyLWNiMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IS0a4L1938k_bqkbv3-GKZuPJGkoKlA6dNwXApNjUk4=&emci=b6d31fe5-3130-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5ead08c2-cb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)

_Event information:_
Date: Thursday, May 15
Time: 7:00 p.m. ET (via Zoom)
Link provided upon RSVP!

**See the forwarded email below for more information!** [**Your support will go directly to the campaigns of the phenomenal candidates you’ll meet at the event who are running for office this cycle.**](https://womencount.org/teams/virginia-primary-hbm/)

We hope to see you there!

The Her Bold Move Team

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

We are thrilled to announce that Her Bold Move will be co-hosting a virtual event with **WomenCount, EMILYs List, Virginia’s List, Elect Black Women, the Next 50, and Electing Women National Capital Region** – and we are especially excited to extend a special invitation to the Her Bold Move network.

**_You are invited_ to join us for the _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event, which will give guests the chance to hear directly from 10 candidates for statewide and state legislative offices in Virginia.**

[**RSVP TODAY to join us on Zoom at 7:00 p.m. ET on Thursday, May 15. A $50 donation will save your spot AND go directly to the campaigns of the phenomenal candidates you’ll meet at our event who are running for office this cycle. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107669888/545445913/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYWQwOGMyLWNiMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IS0a4L1938k_bqkbv3-GKZuPJGkoKlA6dNwXApNjUk4=&emci=b6d31fe5-3130-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5ead08c2-cb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107669889/545445915/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYWQwOGMyLWNiMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IS0a4L1938k_bqkbv3-GKZuPJGkoKlA6dNwXApNjUk4=&emci=b6d31fe5-3130-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5ead08c2-cb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)
---
All eyes will be on Virginia this year as 100 House of Delegates districts are on the ballot, plus the Governor’s, Lieutenant Governor’s, and Attorney General’s offices, which are up for re-election in November.

This election year will give Virginia Democrats the opportunity to not only increase their majority and flip executive offices, but also to hand national Democrats a roadmap for making national gains in 2026. Not to mention, with abortion on the ballot, a Republican Governor who has said he’d like to pass an abortion ban, and a 1 vote margin in the VA State Legislature, _the stakes could not be higher._

**Here are the Her Bold Move candidates that this event will support:**

✅ Lt. Gov. candidate Ghazala Hashmi – Senator Hashmi helped draft the language for VA’s constitutional amendment protecting safe and legal abortion, and served as a Chief Co-Patron for the legislation. **She is the only woman in a seven-candidate primary, and is the most experienced legislator in the race.**

✅ Elizabeth Guzmán – A former Delegate who was redistricted out in 2023 and is running to reclaim a seat for pro-choice Democrats.

✅ May Nivar – Running for a seat that has been named the TOP pickup opportunity for Democrats in Virginia. Her GOP opponent was rated one of the least effective legislators in the entire state.

✅ Jessica Anderson – In 2023, Jessica lost to the current Republican incumbent by **only 1.9%** after being vastly outspent. She is already outperforming the incumbent this time around, and is very likely to win the rematch in November.

✅ Kimberly Pope Adams – Like Jessica, Kimberly fell short of flipping this district by **less than half a percentage point** in 2023. She knows exactly what she needs to do to finally win this seat and help VA unseat one more anti-choice vote in the General Assembly.

**Some of these candidates are facing competitive primaries on June 17 and are lagging behind their male opponents in fundraising. We need to ensure they have the support they need to WIN. We hope you can join us to hear what these candidates need, and their visions for Virginia’s future with an even bigger Democratic, pro-choice, female majority!**

[**Please RSVP TODAY to join us on May 15 at 7:00 p.m. ET for this very special _Virginia Is for Women_ virtual event to hear directly from these amazing women. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107669890/545445917/1919652656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYWQwOGMyLWNiMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IS0a4L1938k_bqkbv3-GKZuPJGkoKlA6dNwXApNjUk4=&emci=b6d31fe5-3130-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5ead08c2-cb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=32015042)

We hope to see you there!

Team Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states.

Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies.

**Support this important work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107669891/545445919/1701071684?refcode=EM_C_250514invite_N_HMB_90DO_3_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlYWQwOGMyLWNiMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IS0a4L1938k_bqkbv3-GKZuPJGkoKlA6dNwXApNjUk4=)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Thank you for giving me a chance to share my story. -Rep. Victoria Spartz | | | | PAID FOR BY VICTORIA SPARTZ FOR CONGRESS

Peter,
We’ve long known there’s no end to Donald Trump’s greed and corruption. But he just gave us another big example by **accepting a gift of a $400 million luxury jet from the Qatari government to replace Air Force One.**
This is not only severely unethical, but also a major concern for America’s national security.
