name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: A great rebuke to Donald Trump
body:
Nothing matters more right now than defeating Trump's cuts to Medicaid and other lifesaving programs and electing a Congress who will stop his legislative agenda.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=590%2E2563979%2ERHTaJV)

Nothing matters more right now than defeating Trump's cuts to Medicaid and other lifesaving programs, defending our democracy, and electing a Congress that will stop his legislative agenda.
Here's what the DNC is doing to make it happen:
* Organizing town halls and events in key states and districts where Republicans refuse to speak to their constituents.

* Taking Trump to court over his illegal executive order, which had attempted to suppress voters and upend voter registration systems.

* Organizing across the country and sending resources to fund state party work to flip the House and the Senate.

**"These times have found us," as Tom Paine once said. And the DNC is at the center of the fight to defend our democracy and stop Trump's agenda. But they can't do it alone. They need you -- NOW -- to help them pressure the legislators we need to stop Trump's agenda. So please:**
[**The DNC needs the support of democracy and freedom-loving activists everywhere to send a great rebuke to Donald Trump today. Peter, will you make a contribution of $5, $25 or more to super-charge the DNC's organizing efforts and help them win sweeping Democratic victories in the next election?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505014-1B&refcode2=590_2563979_RHTaJV&akid=590%2E2563979%2ERHTaJV)
Sending you strength and thanks for your amazing support,
With gratitude,
Team Kamala
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em2505014-1B&refcode2=590_2563979_RHTaJV&akid=590%2E2563979%2ERHTaJV)**

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=590%2E2563979%2ERHTaJV)**

subject: We're suing Trump. -

No longer will we tolerate these Serial Offenders who spread filth, bloodshed, and mayhem on our streets.
**That is why, today, I am directing the Bureau of Prisons, together with the Department of Justice, FBI, and Homeland Security, to reopen a substantially enlarged and rebuilt ALCATRAZ, to house America’s most ruthless and violent Offenders.**
We will no longer be held hostage to criminals, thugs, and Judges that are afraid to do their job and allow us to remove criminals, who came into our Country illegally.

| | Team, **The most powerful force behind any winning campaign is its supporters.** Whether you're the neighbor proudly spreading the word, a volunteer knocking doors and making calls, or a donor fueling our message on TV and online—**you are the reason we win...** or don’t. Running for the House is a two-year journey—just like the two-year term. And while it’s never too early to show your support for Congressman Tom Kean, **our top priority right now is building the war chest we’ll need to win again.** Last cycle, Team Kean raised over $6 million thanks to more than 2,500 individual supporters. clean_body: Did you see Tim's note?| | | Friend, Did you see Tim’s note? We’re working to grow our donor base from 2,500 to 3,000 to show the Radical Democrats that Congressman Tom Kean has a movement behind him. NJ-07 shouldn’t be a toss-up—and with your help, it won’t be. Even $1 sends a clear message: you’re in. Read Tim’s full message below and please Counting on you here!Team Kean | | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: TimDate: Thur 5/8Subject: You got a min? | | | | Team, The most powerful force behind any winning campaign is its supporters. Whether you're the neighbor proudly spreading the word, a volunteer knocking doors and making calls, or a donor fueling our message on TV and online—you are the reason we win... or don’t. Running for the House is a two-year journey—just like the two-year term. And while it’s never too early to show your support for Congressman Tom Kean, our top priority right now is building the war chest we’ll need to win again. Last cycle, Team Kean raised over $6 million thanks to more than 2,500 individual supporters. This cycle, we are aiming even higher: 500 new donors and over 3,000 total grassroots supporters. That’s why we’re focused on donors over dollars. It’s not about how much you give—it’s about standing up and being counted. Even $1 sends a message:I’m in. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this team and helping drive Congressman Kean to victory. With gratitude,TimTeam Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2025 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

| | 2025 has been a handful so far folks. Thankfully, we have opportunities on the horizon to fight back for our fundamental rights.

**There are upcoming elections in Virginia, Arizona, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Texas, and more.**

This whirlwind of executive orders, legislation, and court cases showcase why we must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” **There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights.**

We must provide voters with resources to help them plan to vote, access sample ballots, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to make their voice heard. We’re counting on your help to reach as many people as we can to help stem this tide. [**Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to fuel our efforts? We have to pull out all the stops to inform and turn out voters across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107677356/545463953/1723810624?am=22.00&contactdata=tTTQblG4VpBSHgTVlhRnNwanLV/pDGOY6mwkkdxlhL+0Wcfvfl5OEkeMkfdiKOHOWdWXs9TYA3GmaBSNEoMqDFTgOTI0nut2pXQmwi2XTk8=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2Mjc0YTY5LWQ0MzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rIeTgheBsA_jJBDmAc4pDRy_mUHA_ONfIVagHwPQkx0=&emci=5f8d2d76-ce30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c6274a69-d430-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Multiple states are giving us an opportunity to fight back and defend out right to vote| | | It's not just elections, Team. There are state legislative sessions going right now and continuing all year across the country. We're fighting to expand the right to vote, increase ballot access, make voting more accessible, and much more. | | | 2025 has been a handful so far folks. Thankfully, we have opportunities on the horizon to fight back for our fundamental rights. There are upcoming elections in Virginia, Arizona, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Texas, and more. This whirlwind of executive orders, legislation, and court cases showcase why we must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights. We must provide voters with resources to help them plan to vote, access sample ballots, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to make their voice heard. We’re counting on your help to reach as many people as we can to help stem this tide. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). They’re both part of a reckless, woke movement to dismantle law and order in Virginia and make our neighborhoods less safe.
**And now they want power.**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A California story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8578%2E5257348%2EGjgr1m ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek,

My story is a California story.

How a young boy in Alamo/Danville...

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250514_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8578%2E5257348%2EGjgr1m ]Adam as a young boy

... could go on to become a United States Senator, after a career as an
Assistant U.S. Attorney, State Senator, member of Congress, and
impeachment manager.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250514_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8578%2E5257348%2EGjgr1m ]Adam and his wife Eve standing on stage

It is also a story about delivering for Californians.

Securing funding for more affordable housing.

Taking on corporate polluters.

Lowering health care costs and expanding access.

Defending our democracy and the sanctity of our elections.

These are the things I’ve done, and the fights I’m taking on in the Senate
on behalf of all Californians. And all Americans.

This story is only possible because of people like you,
Derek, believing in me and this
powerful work. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250514_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8578%2E5257348%2EGjgr1m ]Will you please pitch in a few dollars before our
upcoming fundraising deadline so I can continue making a difference for
Californians?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| | Dear Peter,
---
| | We’re kicking off June in Boston—the birthplace of the First Great Awakening—with a powerful call to reclaim the month for God. While the world celebrates Pride Month, we’re proclaiming it _LIFE MONTH_ , beginning June 1st on the Boston Common with a revival of praise, worship, and spiritual renewal. Boston holds deep spiritual roots, but it has drifted. We’re gathering to honor how God once moved in this city and to cry out for a fresh outpouring. We invite you to join us—in person, in prayer, or in provision. Come worship with us if you can. If not, cover the event in prayer and intercession. And if you feel led, help fund this free revival. Just like God’s presence, there’s no admission fee at Let Us Worship—made possible by generous believers nationwide. Let’s reclaim this month and believe for revival in Boston and beyond.
---
[](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxc0clyqkwYxvGraXdazdsTLFg4hMlExSmJm1QDLYO0EEBEr_6r76ROFmf9e_6rJ7GlYiQmI2UbggognAgyymxTWPyMwZJcAabSNGnElZJMxudYRFKMchswMMwMajDgBplwjBMuzrE6E8MwgCKKS9Xd2nvVtFleT-JqVNpZ19WITBE4CJwyv17ayT8jBE6LwIkROC-wPZy-3eBhJH3l5caOL1P32b9dduPdcGpUpt8Dr-ub8ESvtKoTN7jc4OwNt4Ple9FY7rcn5h-PpMABCQ_uSe73Y222K262rrFeBM7HdPO6W-NNWLNvuTjlKmvqZBlty0fx3E_ZaV64ejkmm-l-HrCu6L-LzdaD0ufO4piFUYSxH8KHoaL0cHsOu2uZzg9dlhSPLHyEsODYK1-q82bIvexuQr7oG2dWXst4vdTV8LC-9uNxp9eBNv3h7XXBvu7sdWXNLn16rR35ct4dPzdsGu7uNF3pVZc4zrOa1VOBL3qgfPYpZs_P6fLpFvExCMW-bg9-ehi8YBkicCphXebHtTn_aCDAxb3Oy8In78l649J3xR4IHHOkVScT2UkbiRkC0KptZar8BAH8eQkUNc1ICiuKE0ktxczYgAibFkskKIOT_4cwRwCd0nUpu9_WENxijLMfrZuqUHH3F4ELi_5ILHUt8_T62xFGgGJAYjFq7KS-52WZt1wgilMt83ISV3rU2_BfAAAA___FLtdj)

clean_body: Join us in Boston and check out new LIFE MONTH merch!! | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, | | We’re kicking off June in Boston—the birthplace of the First Great Awakening—with a powerful call to reclaim the month for God. While the world celebrates Pride Month, we’re proclaiming it LIFE MONTH , beginning June 1st on the Boston Common with a revival of praise, worship, and spiritual renewal. Boston holds deep spiritual roots, but it has drifted. We’re gathering to honor how God once moved in this city and to cry out for a fresh outpouring. We invite you to join us—in person, in prayer, or in provision. Come worship with us if you can. If not, cover the event in prayer and intercession. And if you feel led, help fund this free revival. Just like God’s presence, there’s no admission fee at Let Us Worship—made possible by generous believers nationwide. Let’s reclaim this month and believe for revival in Boston and beyond. Since we are proclaiming June as LIFE MONTH, we just launched two new Life Month shirts! Help us spread the word with these fun designs that boldly declare June is LIFE MONTH. We stand for values that align with the mind and body of Christ! | | | | | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

Folks – When I joined the Senate, I made a promise to Delawareans that I would put their interests and concerns first. That's why it's critical we demand that my fellow Senators reject the Save ACT, a voter suppression bill that would make it especially harder for women who've changed their names to vote – including me. **_[Before I explain more, will you add your support to encourage the Senate to vote 'NO' on the SAVE Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107679947/545471857/126811884?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.14_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDZiOTQ0Zi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoEsk1x7FJu_4nm_fCSfNPneI13wnykWvi6Gx_gAdp0=&emci=ebdcaec6-3c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=bd6b944f-d830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=11913588)_** | | [**ADD YOUR NAME TO REJECT THE SAVE ACT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107679948/545471858/126811884?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.14_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDZiOTQ0Zi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoEsk1x7FJu_4nm_fCSfNPneI13wnykWvi6Gx_gAdp0=&emci=ebdcaec6-3c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=bd6b944f-d830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=11913588)

MAGA-aligned Republicans are backing this harmful bill not only to make voting more difficult but also to disenfranchise voters and undermine our democratic process.
This bill makes it harder for women who have changed their last names, the transgender community, and countless other Americans to exercise their right to vote.
When I was sworn into the House and the Senate, I carried this scarf with me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107679949/545471859/126811884?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.14_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDZiOTQ0Zi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoEsk1x7FJu_4nm_fCSfNPneI13wnykWvi6Gx_gAdp0=&emci=ebdcaec6-3c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=bd6b944f-d830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=11913588)
It's imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. It's a reminder of how far people of color have come. **All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.**
**_That's why I will always fight to protect your right to vote._**
**_[If you're with me, will you add your name to reject the SAVE Act and ensure every voter has the opportunity to make their vote count? We need 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight so the Senate can hear your voice!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107679950/545471860/126811884?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.14_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDZiOTQ0Zi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoEsk1x7FJu_4nm_fCSfNPneI13wnykWvi6Gx_gAdp0=&emci=ebdcaec6-3c2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=bd6b944f-d830-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=11913588)_**

That's why it's critical we demand that my fellow Senators reject the Save ACT, a voter suppression bill that would make it especially harder for women who've changed their names to vote – including me. | | MAGA-aligned Republicans are backing this harmful bill not only to make voting more difficult but also to disenfranchise voters and undermine our democratic process. This bill makes it harder for women who have changed their last names, the transgender community, and countless other Americans to exercise their right to vote. When I was sworn into the House and the Senate, I carried this scarf with me. It's imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. It's a reminder of how far people of color have come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. That's why I will always fight to protect your right to vote. | Thank you, Lisa Blunt Rochester | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. But even though our campaign is over, the work has just begun. Will you chip in any amount today to help Bright Hope take center stage in the Senate? | = = Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19809 United States | mailto:info@lisabluntrochester.com Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, If you wish to unsubscribe, please**

body:
and why your donation today matters more than you know

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107680007/545472064/964891317?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250514_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzZWE2Mi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf9z8vBB7hI8vapHQvYX3RglSopQPBMOd2OjpxyORsM=) Derek,

We just looked at the numbers ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline, and as of right now, we’re not on track to reach our $25,000 goal before midnight tomorrow.

Later this evening, we’ll need to report back to the Senator on our progress, and we’re really hoping we can turn things around by then. [_**Can we count on you to pitch in $5 to help us close the gap?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107680008/545472065/964891317?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250514_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzZWE2Mi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf9z8vBB7hI8vapHQvYX3RglSopQPBMOd2OjpxyORsM=)

The truth is, Derek, we need to give Senator Warner good news because he knows that this could be his most expensive reelection race ever.

Just look at how much money billionaires spent in the presidential election. It didn’t matter what dark money channel they had to go through or how much it cost, they were virtually willing to spend anything to buy a policy from the Trump administration.

**These same folks could very well put up a superPAC against Mark. We’re talking $50 million, $100 million, or even more.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107680009/545472066/964891317?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250514_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzZWE2Mi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf9z8vBB7hI8vapHQvYX3RglSopQPBMOd2OjpxyORsM=) The only way we’re going to counter this opposition money in this race is by reaching _every single fundraising goal we set_ —because these goals aren’t just numbers. They decide whether we can afford to fight back against Republican attack ads, hire more staff, and recruit more volunteers to reach voters across Virginia.

And the way we reach these goals? **You.**

So we’re not kidding when we say that every single bit helps. Going up against the GOP’s money won’t be easy, but it’s possible—because we know that when we work together and add up those $5 grassroots donations one at a time, we can compete and _**win**_**.**

[_**So we’re asking: if you can, will you donate to Senator Warner’s re-election campaign before our deadline tomorrow at midnight?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107680010/545472067/964891317?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250514_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzZWE2Mi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf9z8vBB7hI8vapHQvYX3RglSopQPBMOd2OjpxyORsM=)

Thank you,

Team Warner **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107680011/545472068/964891317?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250514_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzZWE2Mi1kODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf9z8vBB7hI8vapHQvYX3RglSopQPBMOd2OjpxyORsM=)**********

Friend, I’m Daniel Hernandez, and I’m announcing my Democratic Campaign for the Arizona Special Election because we need more leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to stop MAGA extremists.
**[Before I tell you a bit about myself, will you split a $20 donation between my campaign and Able Dems and help us get one step closer to retaking the House?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOxoQv6eRvqfAftMXwfs5emoszAlMap-OYeXjG-VR2ofYGgpl2n4r2w5ufN8zzJ9FWJumInfUUTNpU8dw2W_4fPSiIv8gA55JbeHCVLJ1jVXcVdr8fNqFBFrji68MnT02ECXUcPRotm3Zr0IDteqEovNdI30hjjsRwa9O9hYERKYT5nVH4yHF6GVBMhAKuAkgFdK3e8WcEfFubj_ZxMyVCHwpUbTWL3CGPwqZ5MG446q_AKfErpTx_1vHDrjntZHjujN5eTlvLOirk4Ymim47GMVPv2MsEXqCp_bGrCkUQkal_ahvQLIr25hT424hJ3ZNl/4gh/wEPENkY6SJ2QpR7XWn6t3w/h1/h001.GbnF0mh05fSv8w1YlHHQp1zspVD7b0G2wkpVYrz6KrY)**

Folks, I was raised to work hard and take care of my community.

Growing up, my family struggled to make ends meet. My mom immigrated from Mexico, and my dad worked double shifts as a construction worker. We depended on Medicaid, and when I lost my health insurance as a teenager, it nearly killed me.

**As the first in my family to attend college, I interned for then-Congresswoman Gabby Giffords. As a former nursing assistant, I was there to administer life-saving aid when she was shot in an act of political violence.**

That day changed my life _forever_.

I witnessed _firsthand_ the devastating effects of gun violence and vowed to use my voice and platform to prevent it.

These hardships could have ended my career in public service before it even started, but instead, they fueled me to _fight_.

**As a state legislator, I co-founded the LGBTQ caucus and fought to pass bills to protect gay marriage and survivors of sexual assault, increase gun violence prevention resources, and expand access to affordable healthcare.**

So I know a thing or two about getting sh*t done.

Since gaining their MAGA trifecta, Republicans have done nothing but gut funding for essential programs like the Department of Education to line billionaires’ pockets.

I’m running for Congress because I won’t sit on the sidelines while they try to strip us of our rights and undermine our democracy.

**Unlike most campaigns you’re hearing from, my race isn’t in a year and a half – it’s two months away.** So we have an _urgent opportunity_ to stop MAGA Republicans and stand up for our communities.

**[So Friend, I’m asking you: will you rush anything you can to my campaign and Able Dems so Democrats can WIN this critical Special Election and be one step closer to flipping the House Blue? >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOxoQv6eRvqfAftMXwfs5emoszAlMap-OYeXjG-VR2ofbOg2ZBRGMn1GUKU8kssGlKRBTRCUq5Qqsqntxq9Fyu-_EA5J8eKd0VhgktgidYiiD5UrMCHKRyipN2vje3zV1_YZtp-QJgnBsFOXf-9POznzkfNsE3wGAHsg1X8Eo8JmnqliPj3IPtMTeGEuJXjy3Bq7W44k7rV8YM8wNz6ywdbkDXeybc9e9NwRutOQzJkruE6waEOFZWjDOX2Oj0L-0DKGIpII-kAv2aUmL9dNIXn06YHHFfxaOEcH-B3G1ldAY3A-X3TLHYKnfV_aeKCtve/4gh/wEPENkY6SJ2QpR7XWn6t3w/h3/h001.oCgwyknPFxgGwl0GKKrVTw-8qxIdhnADtfhH6sxXRxI)**

Daniel

# [Tell Congress to block the Qatar plane bribe to Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T033a470a-1201-4edc-a1f6-e4e91d640fb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2823640c-6ab0-4a4d-9754-cabf546de419/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Qatar plane $400 million bribe for Trump has outraged members of Congress across the spectrum -- with even some Republicans finding their spines and condemning it (even Ted Cruz!). Well, here's their chance to do something: [**Add your name, and demand that Congress vote to block it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1663ab1a-de8e-4f6d-8dc8-40e8dff2eee0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The emoluments clause of Constitution makes it clear -- presidents cannot accept such gifts from foreign entities without [explicit approval from Congress](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2a6eaa5-91e7-4cb2-9e10-4d3437bce39d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And Congress can and should reject it, regardless of whether Trump asks for permission. This gift is a wildly inappropriate and corrupt attempt to curry favor with Trump, and it is exactly the kind of thing that the framers of the Constitution had in mind when they included this clause. [**Congress has the power to block it. Tell them to do it NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8154562e-dda5-4d14-8bf1-a3ab62c04b9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: One of their own just spilled the beans: "This is worse than 2016... Our party is so weak and so diminished." Yeah, no kidding! But don't get too comfortable, folks. When Democrats panic, they're like a bad cook in the kitchen - they start throwing everything at the wall and hoping something sticks. So, here's the deal. The GOP is closing up shop on voter verification records TONIGHT, and we still haven't heard from you. We've had Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, Bernie Moreno, and Kellyanne Conway all on the phone, wondering where you are. It's like your grandma calling to ask why you haven't visited in a while - except instead of guilt-tripping you into eating more mashed potatoes, they're asking you to verify your voter profile! So, what's it gonna be? Are you in, or are you out? Complete the Official 2025 Voter Verification Questionnaire now, and let's show the Democrats what we're made of! name: Rob Sand
subject: It’s Rob Sand! I’m running for Iowa governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88546?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ)
👋 Hey Peter, it’s Rob Sand. I’m Iowa’s State Auditor, a father, husband, skateboarder, bowhunter, and a proud Hawkeye.
AND NOW, I’m coming to you with an exciting announcement 🥁🥁🥁🥁:
**I’m running to be the next governor of the great state of Iowa!**
This is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country. And with the Reynolds agenda unpopular and every Republican in lockstep with it, we’ve got an opportunity to do something truly special.
**Before I dive into the nitty-gritty details of why I believe I’m the best candidate to lead Iowa forward, I’d like to ask you:[Will you split a donation between my grassroots campaign and Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor today? I’d love to have you on board from the start, Peter.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88546?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ)**
**[Donate](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88546?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ)**
Folks who know me know that I’m an open book, and that every chapter starts and ends with Iowa.
I was born and raised in the small town of Decorah, and I’m proud to be raising my family in the greatest state in the country.
Before I was elected State Auditor _(twice)_ , I worked as an Assistant Attorney General, where I uncovered and prosecuted the largest lottery scandal in American history.
I’m currently the only statewide elected Democrat in Iowa, and I’m proud to also have the highest approval rating among all statewide officials.
_Now, I’m running for governor because for too long, partisan insiders have pushed Iowa in the wrong direction: Our schools are underfunded, jobs and opportunities are leaving the state, and we’re not growing and innovating the way we should be._
**I believe that together, we can take Iowa back and make our state a place where families thrive.**
I won re-election in 2022 by just a shade under 3,000 votes, so I’m not afraid of a tough race. But even with the winds changing in Iowa, this is going to be an incredibly competitive election.
Recent special election results are proof that Iowans are eager for change and ready to listen. _Iowa has had 3 specials this year, and they are the top 3 over-performances by a Democrat in the nation._
As a team, we are playing to WIN. But I need your help, Peter, plain and simple.
Grassroots fundraising is the name of the game, so we need support early to kickstart this campaign and build out our network of supporters throughout Iowa and beyond!
**[My team tells me we need to bring in 8,000 Founding Donors during the first week of the campaign to show supporters, opponents, and everyone in between that we’re ready to win! So, will you become a Founding Donor of my grassroots campaign by splitting a donation of $25 (or whatever you can) right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88546?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88547?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88546?refcode=em20250514-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ)
---
Thank you for being an essential part of what we’re building here in Iowa, Peter.
I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together.
—Rob Sand

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=12&akid=8936%2E614464%2EfMMMnZ). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**The New York Times: V.A. Secretary Says Slashing 80,000 Jobs Is a Goal, Not a Firm Plan** Peter, the Trump administration is setting a goal to fire around 83,000 employees from the VA. And now we know from leaked documents that the Trump and DOGE team disrupted critical VA medical research and clinical trials. **It’s not complicated what Trump and DOGE are doing: They are trying to dismantle and weaken the VA so much that they have an excuse to sell it off to the highest bidder. ** I refuse to sit back while Trump and Republicans try to gut and privatize the VA. I’m Chris Deluzio, a Navy veteran who served in Iraq and at sea. You better believe I will do all I can to stop this. My fellow veterans' lives are not some pawn in this Administration's BS game. This is a betrayal of veterans, period. **[I’m leading the fight against privatization of the VA and defending the benefits that my fellow veterans earned. I represent Pennsylvania’s 17th District in Congress, and Trump’s hiring freeze impacted life-saving VA clinical trials and research happening right here in Western PA.
Pennsylvania is home to over 700,000 veterans—making it fourth highest in the nation for veteran population. We know what it’s like to wear the uniform and have pride in our legacy of service.
And we damn sure know that the VA isn’t for sale.
Where I’m from in PA, and across the country, patriotic families proudly show pictures of loved ones in uniform. Patriotism isn’t just a word—it’s personal.
So as this Administration tries to privatize the VA and sell it off to the highest bidder—which we know will hurt veterans' earned care—you better believe I'm gonna fight back.
Together, we must stand up to Trump and Republicans who are trying to privatize the VA and defend my fellow veterans' hard-earned care. This is a fight I intend to win—and I can’t do it without you by my side.
**[Are you with me in this fight Peter? subject: Here’s what we’re asking:
body:
---
Derek, $3. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC ahead of our next mid-month fundraising deadline. If you agree that having a strong Democratic Party has never been more important, you can use this link to make your first contribution: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250514_3432_fr&refcode2=3439_22930333__9OjXw&akid=3439%2E22930333%2E_9OjXw) Otherwise, we hope you’ll give us a minute to explain why your support makes a difference right now. So far this year, we’ve made a $1 million monthly investment in every Democratic state party. We’re holding town halls across the country. And we’ve recently launched a new initiative to bring as much pressure as possible to vulnerable House Republicans as they consider voting to slash Medicaid for millions of people. **This work is critical — and it’s directly funded by supporters like you.** So $3. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make today. $3 to help Democrats organize everywhere as we fight to protect access to health care for millions of Americans. $3 to help us keep holding town halls in every corner of the country. $3 to help us lay the groundwork to win key elections this year, in states like Virginia and New Jersey, and to take back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. **[We know you may not have opened this email expecting to contribute to the DNC today, but we hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. Can you make a $3 contribution now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250514_3432_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3439_22930333__9OjXw&akid=3439%2E22930333%2E_9OjXw)**

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: October 2001
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=992620dc87ff496293fbbfa9796e3603&_e=llmGz8lXTjbdSX0RXc4lXN3nmqI_hCc9AZz5jf76bXryqd1GDN3CwPKkKwC6rZgy2L0TVMd_3LGYPU3SUpM3UOiiZubu13Gz6-sGprQa_RXrxjRnsJrJO11ng5NUG-treMq94N7eltxlI4oVTldpXwmStGqd1R4t28ZAVEZmwke29ZMvco__L8lIg9MKtsHVg9LJVGJDctAfy4M4o5Eo4zhvK1uNsYeAHnkk0bCbbpCtDs1VT02hertcVWGZmF9lM6vhR7K0fUKxm07K691qw3BhF-JDCQyVZBsuen4_Rp1W4nYEo5h-z0OiMXSHec0SDREZwGX7GuZOHf7P6CBT4MbcRTPiwPH3PW2AYP3ygUYsSPsftHN_42X__FDRQIYNRDCrhexDuZ3O2o7UDloNU1bcB6J6hk5P-ammq6v6nGTRqJkfe3IK5hBXyeZ1CX2ayUaZ0tmlEIVe4WxMSng-iEYL8AOBYfmQ3-xzEFffLXIALpRd-TpDHZMIF1loQtUDahOCH7g5HEx2X0nRmktc-CFoeAQcSr0U_DSV9iuBzHhXrWX6lkf7iUSRtwdsL1CzMvPztXYWmuHWIrH4Zp8URCFKSwGEcrDgyEKKWaz6bdIc_7-GlfbcIq7YvxxVufE0tWG1kAGi0MNhDDW2G4aoRh1c1sTwdZ61PcfWiYaLBYtdC8gkk30Sos6ci2mtG7EAyBys1QSO6bAhvbiyqmPnBMZI3Fhtut7mg542Do9otUphYawmM4PAfSge-kQ1cPRGMzsalTdpIobtSLMgftx11A%3D%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

clean_body: I’m just an ordinary guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things for our country now I am asking you to open this and read the first few paragraphs | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Tina Kotek
subject: We’re not backing down — we’re doubling down.

#
---
Peter, I wanted to take a moment to talk directly with you about where we are — and why your support matters so much right now. With Donald Trump in the White House, we’re already seeing attacks on our basic values. Attempts to roll back reproductive rights and environmental protections. Open hostility toward LGBTQ+ communities and immigrant families. Cuts to critical safety net programs. And a federal government that seems more interested in mean-spirited score-settling than solving real problems. **We can’t afford to wait this out. Here in Oregon, we’re not backing down — we’re doubling down.** My team and I are continuing to push forward on what we know matters to the people of Oregon. We won’t be distracted by Trump’s chaos. We’ll fight to make life more affordable for working families, expand access to health care, keep our communities safe, defend reproductive freedom, and preserve the progress we’ve made on clean energy. **But here’s the reality: The work we’re doing in Oregon is only possible because of grassroots supporters like _you_. clean_body: | Another week, another Derrick Van Orden outburst, Peter: Derrick Van Orden just doxxed a private citizen – his own constituent – on social media. He’s claiming it’s retaliation for criticizing him face-to-face in the district. This is just the latest in a pattern of embarrassing behavior we’ve come to expect from Van Orden. He’s always been a bully who’s made more headlines for yelling at teenagers, threatening librarians, and interrupting a presidential address than passing actual legislation to help our district. Now, he’s encouraging his followers to publicly shame anyone who crosses him. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=**** Derrick Van Orden has once again proven that he is more interested in partisan games and “trolling” his enemies than he is in delivering for our district. Our district needs someone committed to us. And our campaign for Congress is our best chance to deliver for everyone in West Central Wisconsin. = We appreciate your support, Rebecca Cooke HQ | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. **I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Peter, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._

body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
As a doctor, Maxine doesn’t just fight for her patients—she fights on behalf of every American, whether she’s in the hospital or Washington, D.C.
Now, the GOP wants to bankroll billionaire tax cuts by ripping health insurance away from millions of Americans.
They’re proposing over $880 billion in cuts to programs that working families rely on—all to fund trillions in tax breaks for the ultra-rich.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250514_MedicaidCut_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250514_MedicaidCut_act]
Their plan? Fewer jobs, higher premiums, and more crowded ERs because people can’t get care when they need it.
And for what? To line the pockets of wealthy donors.
We won’t let that happen. That’s why Maxine and the Democratic Doctors Caucus are fighting back.
While Republicans sell out your healthcare, Maxine is working to strengthen it. She is one of six licensed medical doctors defending our healthcare in the House.
As a doctor, she sees firsthand how barriers to access harm patients and communities. Her vision is simple: that every American can afford the high-quality care they deserve..
But to get this done and make the changes stick, we need to show the Republicans the door.
Your care should be in the hands of doctors, not GOP donors. Let’s elect leaders who believe in science, stand with families, and fight for your health. Will you support Maxine in this fight by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250514_MedicaidCut_act]

name: Jason Crow
subject: Our vision is defined by unity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, Donald Trump is working overtime to divide us.

His agenda is wrong for Colorado — he’s focused on tax cuts for the wealthy, gutting Medicaid that working families rely on.

My Democratic colleagues and I have a different vision for Colorado and our country: where if you work hard and play by the rules, you should be able to earn a living wage, buy a home, take care of your kids, and save a little bit for retirement. Our vision is that our government works for everyday, working people — not just the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations.

That’s why I’m working hard to recruit the next generation of Democratic Party leaders who can run and win — and help us take back political power in the next election.

But there’s a long road ahead of us. You can bet that megadonors and the ultra-wealthy like Elon Musk will go all-in on candidates who will put their interests above all else.

It will take a groundswell of grassroots support to combat extremism and elect true servant leaders — those who consider themselves a servant to the people — to the House in 2026.

In Colorado and across the country, there are leaders currently serving their communities with grit and integrity who aren’t afraid to meet the fights in front of us head-on. That’s why I’m humbly asking you:

Can you chip in right now and support my campaign and fuel the fight for what we believe in? Our mid-month deadline is tomorrow, and anything you can pitch in toward our goal will help me elect leaders who will stand by your priorities — not billionaires. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=5&express_lane=true]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=25&express_lane=true]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=50&express_lane=true]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25?amount=100&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-may25]

Thank you for supporting this crucial work today. Let’s keep fighting the good fight.

— Jason Crow
Jason Crow for Congress

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

Hey friend,

[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=45%2E1086043%2EQ81Jbh ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=45%2E1086043%2EQ81Jbh ]Wes Moore for Governor

Hi, Team
Moore here with a campaign update.

Because of your support, Wes Moore is making this Maryland’s decade. From
ensuring our communities are safer to making historic investments in our
public schools, he’s been hard at work for
you.

But to build on this momentum, we need resources. A three-month
fundraising freeze dramatically set back our ability to organize and
advocate. To properly campaign for reelection, we need to make the most of
the shorter time we have.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250514-1?refcode=em-20250514-1&refcode2=45_1086043_Q81Jbh&akid=45%2E1086043%2EQ81Jbh ]So, can we count on you to make a contribution
of $5 today?

To keep delivering for Maryland families, we’ll need to be in this
together.

Your support allows us to rapidly scale up our organizing and advocacy. We
have to be prepared for whatever might come our way, from breaking news to
potential opponents. That’s how we can make sure Wes continues fighting
for us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250514-1?refcode=em-20250514-1&refcode2=45_1086043_Q81Jbh&akid=45%2E1086043%2EQ81Jbh ]Your grassroots support matters — it’s how our campaign accomplishes

Thank you,

Team Moore

subject: Peter, will you make your first contribution of $25 to flip Virginia blue today?

It's worth repeating: I'm the only Democrat in the entire country who can flip a Governor's seat this year.

That's why far-right billionaires and super PACs watch our fundraising so closely. That's why our opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, dropped over $1 million on ads last week. And that's why hitting our mid-month goal is such a big deal.

_We have the momentum, and we can't let up now._

As a campaign, we don't set arbitrary goals or take money from corporate PACs. Our goals are real, and we're fueled by real people like yourself, giving a few bucks when called upon.

And now is the moment, Peter. _Falling behind is not an option with so much at stake for Virginia families._

[_**Your first donation, no matter the amount, will help us keep up the pressure and show Donald Trump and national Republicans what we're made of. body:
The old guard is really mad about all of this.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250514-1&t=1&akid=2129%2E587540%2EyV57Sw)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250514_1_mm?refcode=em20250514-2129&amount=5&refcode2=2129_587540_yV57Sw&akid=2129%2E587540%2EyV57Sw)
**Peter, did you catch David on _Real Time with Bill Maher_ last weekend?**
Our co-founder joined the panel to discuss our $20 million plan to boost primary challengers against ineffective, do-nothing Democrats in the 2026 election cycle.
Here’s the truth: **The old guard is really mad about all of this.** They want to avoid accountability and continue doing things the same way that got us to this point.
But just like David told Bill Maher: **_We aren’t backing down._** If anything, we are even more energized. We are demanding better and the establishment is noticing.
**[Peter, we’re working to meet our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal before tomorrow’s deadline. Will you pitch in $5 – or whatever you can – now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250514_1_mm?refcode=em20250514-2129&amount=5&refcode2=2129_587540_yV57Sw&akid=2129%2E587540%2EyV57Sw)**

# [Imagine This America -What Would You Do?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163287563&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjg3NTYzLCJpYXQiOjE3NDcyNDIwODAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTgzNDA4MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kdETQpEeiFN6uydmvTKzMblxUvyIDIw0zw4p62sV_lg)
### 10,000 people held without trial. Secret prisons. Torture. Rape. And now for the scariest part of all...
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| May 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=163287563&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMjg3NTYzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NzI0MjA4MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5ODM0MDgwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZPDcxFXhAUH_BlRJDpoPIe_sz-bpZLSoFQyxlg55RtU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SmREwiaxuDjqLyp2hID0g8H7O9nXn8mxnYao7LE_im0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163287563)
Imagine this _hypothetical_ scenario...
It's 2027.
Habeas corpus has been suspended. The most fundamental right of any human being to not be imprisoned without evidence, without a charge, without a fair trial, has been stripped. Over 10,000 innocent people are crammed into prisons without any form of due process, left to languish indefinitely. No charges. No trials. No access to legal counsel. No calls home. Just darkness, fear, and iron bars. What would you do?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/55c03781-612d-4f96-8e72-98c52a6e6678?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A carnival float in Germany mocks Donald Trump with the phrase "Make fascism great again" written on his hair._(Sascha Steinbach / Getty Images)_
Imagine that reports begin to surface--grim, horrifying reports--of secret private prisons run by the government's secret police. Inside these prisons, civilians are tortured, brutalized, raped. They are forced into confessions, silenced from speaking out. Many are children. Their bones are shattered. They're sexually abused. They are locked in cages, denied medical care, and stripped from their families for no reason, with no warning, and no path back to safety. International human rights organizations blast the alarm bells but to no avail.
Meanwhile, soldiers--many of whom joined with ideals of justice and patriotism--are leaving in droves. They come forward with testimony. They describe night raids, secretive kidnappings, and abuses too disturbing to comprehend. But instead of being heralded for their bravery in exposing the truth, they are called _unpatriotic_ , silenced, threatened.
And the Commander in Chief? While facing a mountain of credible corruption and fraud claims, he openly authorizes the violent removal of those he deems _unworthy of human dignity_. He compares them to _animals_ and _vermin_ , justifying their eradication as necessary for "national purity." He signs off on forced removals, leading to the deaths of tens of thousands of innocent people. Entire neighborhoods are razed to the ground, humanitarian aid is blocked, and starvation becomes a weapon of choice.
The UN condemns these actions--loudly, forcefully--but it can do nothing. This nation is a nuclear power. Its leader knows this. He taunts the world with it. And so the genocide continues, uninterrupted, paid for by complicit allies who turn a blind eye while quietly wiring billions to keep the slaughter going.
Now imagine this hypothetical scenario _is real_. **Let 's Address This.**
**If you 're finding value in this content, join our movement and subscribe.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SmREwiaxuDjqLyp2hID0g8H7O9nXn8mxnYao7LE_im0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163287563)
## What If This Is Not Just A Hypothetical?
Imagine what I've described above is happening right now, before your very eyes. Would you tolerate it? Would you remain silent, justifying your apathy with political convenience or willful ignorance? Of course not. You would speak up, _loudly_. Maybe you think this is the warning of what fascism could look like in the United States if authoritarianism takes hold.
But here's the part that may upset you if you haven't already caught my drift--I'm not (just) talking about what could happen under Trump. I'm talking about _what is happening_ right now in 2025 under Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's regime, paid for by U.S. tax dollars. An the receipts are beyond mortifying.
These atrocities I've described are what Netanyahu is doing to at least 10,000 Palestinians held hostage right now as we speak--held hostage for decades prior to 10/7, and in both Gaza and the West Bank.1 Palestinian children are suffering physical and sexual abuse at the hands of Israeli soldiers in Israeli prisons.2 The Israeli soldiers leaving the military and speaking out against the abuse are ridiculed by the Israeli government.3 Palestinians are locked in secret Israeli prisons where they are beaten and raped by Israeli soldiers--all well documented by International and Israeli human rights organizations4 and well documented by Israeli media.5 Netanyahu and his allies refer to Palestinians as "_human animals "_6 __ and promise full eradication and removal of Palestinians while denying them the right to their own state.7 International human rights orgs blast the alarm bells about these atrocities, only to be ignored.8 All of this is happening with bipartisan support from both the Democratic and Republican administrations, as they continue to fund a fascist leader drowning in corruption.9 All of this is being paid for by your tax dollars, under the guise of security and stability.10 All of this is a reality that is tearing apart families, torturing children, and decimating communities with impunity.
And this matters, not just because it is unjust, but because this is the playbook Trump is bringing to the United States.
**If you value universal justice and human rights, join our movement and 131,000+ activists to raise your voice.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SmREwiaxuDjqLyp2hID0g8H7O9nXn8mxnYao7LE_im0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163287563)
## What This Means For The American People
If U.S. tax dollars can be used to fund genocide abroad, do you really think they can't be used to deny your rights here in the United States?
Ask yourself why the Trump regime is openly talking about suspending habeas corpus? Stephen Miller has already declared this as part of Trump's vision. They've already started denying due process. They're already arresting judges, mayors, and American citizens with impunity. They are already detaining immigrants, stripping them of rights, and deporting them without trial or representation. How long before the dystopian fascism enforced by the Netanyahu regime against Palestinian civilians and children become policy that the Trump regime enforces against anyone who refuses to bend the knee to him?
Indeed, this is not about left vs. right; it's about working people trying to get by vs. billionaire elites who fund fascism, oppression, and genocide for profit and power.
Yes, they have the money. But we are the many.
And thus the silver lining--most Americans understand this isn't right. It's why the Republican Party has only a 40% approval rating, and why the Democratic Party only has a 21% approval rating. Americans are sick and tired of being sick and tired. The urgency of the moment requires us to stop engaging in culture wars meant to divide us, and to channel our hurt and rage into action for justice.
We cannot tolerate Netanyahu's fascism abroad. We cannot tolerate politicians who fund it and cheer it on. Because in doing so, what they are telling you, clearly and unambiguously, is that they will ultimately excuse Trump's fascism right here at home.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SmREwiaxuDjqLyp2hID0g8H7O9nXn8mxnYao7LE_im0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163287563)
## Closing Thoughts
So, imagine this America. What would you do? Indeed, if you've ever wondered how you would have responded during history's darkest moments, this is your answer. What you're doing right now--how you speak up, how you act, how you raise your voice against this injustice--that is your legacy. That is your testament to whether or not you stood on the side of justice when it mattered most. As you consume media, ask if the person you trust is speaking up for universal justice, or for personal convenience? Are they condemning Trump while ignoring what Netanyahu is doing to Palestinian civilians, or do they recognize that injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere? And if they are inconsistent in supporting universal human rights, are they truly deserving of your trust and support?
We must recognize that none of us are free until all of us are free. This is not hypothetical. This is real. This is now. And it is time to stand up and demand absolute justice, for Palestinians, for Americans, and for all people globally.
Because if we don't fight this fascism over there, I promise you--it's coming here next. And it has already begun.

subject: Tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
When each of us pitches in what we can, the result is a people-powered campaign that can change the game for New Mexico.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)
Hi! Team Haaland here, and we’ll get straight to the point. 👇
**Tomorrow night at midnight we’ve got a _big_ mid-month fundraising deadline, and we set an ambitious goal to raise $85,000 before time runs out.**
Our Republican opponent, his billionaire allies, and even Donald Trump himself are all aiming to turn New Mexico red, and they have the ability to spend millions to try to do it.
But since Deb’s running a grassroots campaign, we’re counting on support from people just like you to help reach our goals.
* * *
**HIGH EARNERS:** If you have the ability to give more, your contribution can make a huge dent in our mid-month goal and help fund our plan to hire staff, organize up and down the state, and run ads to get the word out. [**P****lease donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or as much as you’re able today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250515_1_mm?refcode=em20250514-1940&refcode2=1940_400544_knZT27&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)
**MEDIUM EARNERS: **$50, $25, or even $10 goes a long way toward helping us reach our goals. When thousands of people across the country all pitch in, it adds up quickly and makes a big difference. [**If you can, make a grassroots donation of whatever amount works for you today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250515_1_mm?refcode=em20250514-1940&refcode2=1940_400544_knZT27&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)
**EVERYONE ELSE: **There are plenty of ways to support Deb’s campaign without making financial donations. You can share Deb’s message online, talk about the campaign with friends and family, encourage others to vote, or even sign up to volunteer on our website. These are all critical pieces of a winning campaign plan.
* * *
****When each of us pitches in what we can, the result is a people-powered campaign that can change the game for New Mexico.****
So, we can’t thank you enough for your support. Together, we’ll elect Deb as the next Governor of New Mexico and finally make the system work for New Mexico families.
— Team Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250514-1&t=2&refcode2=1940_400544_knZT27&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1940%2E400544%2EknZT27)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you approve of President Trump's performance?

President Trump has ignited a conservative revolution! So far, he has:
* Secured our borders, deported criminal illegal aliens, and informed so-called sanctuary cities that their federal funding is at risk if they continue to violate America's immigration laws.
* Exposed billions of dollars of government waste, fraud, and abuse.
* Smacked down the woke agenda...just to name a few!

Now, like wounded animals, the Washington establishment and the mainstream media are lashing out at the President . . . the Left is completely unhinged!

We must support President Trump in the face of these attacks now more than ever. Which is why I invite you to sign The Heritage Foundation's **National Vote of Confidence for President Trump**.

**You can submit your Vote of Confidence at the secure link below.**

[****](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/0aNwR73QXqykbojwvKlP4gGgV5EE5EaU3_-DCH6TL26Sihvf4KF7YdZipkYWHe_eZyt92BkQ3kKxf2NCG-4Zx6qVxgRLLmPnp0G5onQiGFDE9FkRxavBTA7GNMr8MvOY83_PeOzKGZxFEsEaGl7IHdEFBBuRbalUCbwc8Pw6dArg7hRocUPgUD-UgNEZKp_UQz20PE0272Ky-RLIEyCE5x_QMZruLsBM-L6lV-ml5BPa-tGe6fh0_EY5sUV8OvwxcAadM_1MtCGfL1wkZVk1S96aSF8VJkrBxaLygzOyiVcQ82vHlS1VI8PYd_R88MYHw5naTuY4KlD1bbllfDu9r7jvtk41dEnf8CldHdOjEnastn9WVAwsVc77FmrnKXobX2mBDZqfUPhixWbzxIveoZhTJCZkuomLCuuO64xMtUZbS0csplh6VUInZeDDPY8RPQdpUHKBHFOKX9mzk_WPbkwNtrBZk3ewTi9KBFcaqTN0Rx31dHimwRnGC4xJ1RGnwPppDm0uKdApSwMoMUhmrDnm1RBz6u7zP3TBNSBFOKcsNQjSX4s7DUK-yAfvniD7iDbtTvcbgXcaxYNQLDdF2ZA65WKJwaPix4XDjO1e3GlOpqdX4YUVdbX97qRlAwZenJBt8Aolac_zZ6JjdmvDsdW1ag/ZoALyJjxqVgSM0UxUeMVGDyb1BFvIMPN/8)[**https://secured.heritage.org/trump-vote-of-confidence/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Tf_-jsRKEy4lp4bf9hfbVbhF9ytphF68W-PYSsMgCMd-xTZ7zzm08nLjJMOgd39Tezs1rLfHzqBCDqN5H7CiLo2IRSQ_vBBM1tdKUKj8td3tOv5T1aab_dA8iMoyNtdv6hNIbQttKpGaxM77dFIQohQcRp3FdgWTOrF5_fuOSkXOQNLszqa12HjF4jJtCsiPonNRn5nTpfp2cbzmJLsHXJTT7l9bwzrLO8I6PTCvD8UCUI4b-xkXV0Gl-5ckplBcxzv3intp-lWjQgDWZ7VCCnOA8x34oxoWwTuzkudcY-hgqKC6DDfQ-LaUdYZbiK2HQ5mm4ixgW32c7DrSLWyvNQOloidYlTZbqDZldnAmEe80WAmLjzXy_o62L2XpJMIf_YiEh9McOypT04GIYA392Dff8guBLLnpb8vm-LA90U2SUayCzuAgYQmypi-r1_YL7Q9LkdN73XA8oajnaZkN2m_f3IKEQHtiicoHyHGsLAegkSSCpjBhGXMS2s71DoAHPBpUh1wyjLkGU8HWvvA3UU0XeqemTBhZBSVYgIDnnyMPcvk33I_qhC1KU6bO9pDPJeUwapabaDU-jmP4vJyyOcPlULl-sop0FYZzG_JBDT2K3mrrs3SuRZA-cLkGtqQgqFHMW-_0PLGlGZxFyAUo2XCQ5Q/yw3xsWV6rbdH4L74ByC-1fS9KaxJKEEr/8)

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Team DASS
subject: Trump’s $400 million plane
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill [#]
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-web-2025?refcode=em-header]
This is unbelievable, friend.

Donald Trump just declared that he’d gladly accept a $400 million plane from the authoritarian regime of Qatar.

Not only is he going to use it as the next Air Force One, but he’s also taking the plane with him when he leaves office in 2029.

Let’s be clear: this isn’t just unethical. It’s unconstitutional:

“No Title of Nobility shall be granted by the United States: And no Person holding any Office of Profit or Trust under them, shall, without the Consent of the Congress, accept of any present, Emolument, Office, or Title, of any kind whatever, from any King, Prince, or foreign State. ”
-Foreign Emoluments Clause of the United States Constitution

We’ve seen this before. From crypto “meme-coins” to Mar-a-Lago pay-to-play, Trump’s message is clear: if you’re rich, powerful, he’s for sale.

Enough is enough.

Congress must act now to block what amounts to a $400 million bribe to the president of the United States.

Add your name now to demand immediate action and defend the Constitution from Trump’s blatant corruption. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/qatar-plane-petition-51425]

SIGN [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/qatar-plane-petition-51425]

Thank you,

Team DASS
Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.
Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda.

subject: RE: San Antonio's mayoral race
body:
Gina Ortiz Jones is exactly the type of leader we need |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107689378/545503930/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE532_20250514_OneMonthGOJ_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056085&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVhZWE2Yi1lODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_VUaenmi8drd-5WKvsc9NI-mAJHpGbcpkKUGcE7kP8=) Peter,

San Antonio is heading into a critical runoff election for mayor on June 7, and our endorsed candidate, **Gina Ortiz Jones** , needs all of us in her corner to win.

Over the next 24 days, our team is working closely with Gina's campaign to prepare for debates against her anti-choice Republican opponent, mobilize voters, and make sure every single supporter turns out. Now is the time to double down and give it everything we've got. Why? _Because Republicans control every level of power in the Texas state government._ We need strong Democratic leaders in Texas cities who can take a stand.
****[**Can you chip in today to help elect leaders who will fight for our rights at every level of government?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107689379/545503931/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE532_20250514_OneMonthGOJ_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056085&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVhZWE2Yi1lODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_VUaenmi8drd-5WKvsc9NI-mAJHpGbcpkKUGcE7kP8=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107689380/545503932/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE532_20250514_OneMonthGOJ_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056085&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVhZWE2Yi1lODMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_VUaenmi8drd-5WKvsc9NI-mAJHpGbcpkKUGcE7kP8=)
---

The next mayor of San Antonio will guide the city through the remaining years of the Trump administration — while the federal government continues to target any leaders nationwide who defend our fundamental freedoms.

Gina Ortiz Jones is ready. As a former under secretary of the Air Force, she's spent her career fighting for our security, our rights, and every American's shot at the American dream. She's a proven leader with deep roots in the community and a clear vision for San Antonio's future.

Her top priorities? Supporting working families, standing up to extremism, and making City Hall more transparent and accountable to the people it serves.
