clean_body: Gina Ortiz Jones is exactly the type of leader we need | = Peter, San Antonio is heading into a critical runoff election for mayor on June 7, and our endorsed candidate, Gina Ortiz Jones , needs all of us in her corner to win. Over the next 24 days, our team is working closely with Gina's campaign to prepare for debates against her anti-choice Republican opponent, mobilize voters, and make sure every single supporter turns out. Now is the time to double down and give it everything we've got. Why? Because Republicans control every level of power in the Texas state government. We need strong Democratic leaders in Texas cities who can take a stand. **= | = The next mayor of San Antonio will guide the city through the remaining years of the Trump administration — while the federal government continues to target any leaders nationwide who defend our fundamental freedoms. Gina Ortiz Jones is ready. As a former under secretary of the Air Force, she's spent her career fighting for our security, our rights, and every American's shot at the American dream. She's a proven leader with deep roots in the community and a clear vision for San Antonio's future. Her top priorities? Supporting working families, standing up to extremism, and making City Hall more transparent and accountable to the people it serves. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for stepping up, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Interim Vice President of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart. So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now. My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal. It'll be a real disaster if they miss it. With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. Did you know that a lot of people don't actually read these emails?

Peter, I get it: _Why would you click on this email, let alone chip in, if you don’t know my story or what I’m fighting for?_

That’s why today, I want to reintroduce myself. **Here are 3 things you need to know about me and this grassroots movement:**

**1.** My name is Ritchie Torres and I am the Congressman representing the Bronx in New York. I am the first openly gay Afro-Latino in Congress, and I wear that badge with honor.

**2.** I am an avid supporter of affordable housing, LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive freedom, Social Security & Medicare, _and more._

**3.** I am working tirelessly to protect this seat and help my Democratic colleagues take back the House through special elections, starting with meeting our $15,000 mid-quarter goal.

But with Republicans _hellbent_ on protecting their razor-thin majority and _squashing_ our momentum, I need your help:

[**Peter, if you actually read this email, I'm sure you now understand how important it is that I meet my fundraising deadlines. With so much on the line, a $3 donation from you can make a huge difference. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=6Gzg%2B5Oj%2B5Pkn5gGB4kG5a7UipRsr0q9t41SXtv4U9Wf02dahi3p9ehzNz98RZ2t8Mi%2FykzTy65nyXDWDUM92CrM5RjyOf95Udf11m50I2X5hiu3%2FJ%2FsAvLYgy6ljHyOrDAweDzHCctqqbK7eOyJ%2FeNXgazqHUqYHGOjOPrmDrLNPnrp3DhcxD6vDlIVviQT9GbE1Nvos4dbkZhLop9xyltx%2B0BqzhV56VSF9kvQIjkdh5M%2FTrHegHjvx%2FBVHzuQ73Rt6Qm8rC6s%2BMlBf%2FxhQeKyoYMv05rZi%2BxyPz8GVSgu4KOogXInM36qwK4q0oIhfQOumGi6NRDTjyYfVIFz0U7DoEEr1t0kkkBnHUWK%2FPzqrWri2XjNrkOAJvDvJMtPZ5R7tN8KaJKmg4c9jVSe5sR%2FM5JdiRwnAlFKHoAvW0U%3D]

# [#]
Peter, the MAGA movement is losing steam in Texas.

GOP-endorsed candidates lost major ground in Tarrant County’s most recent elections. This is a big win for Texans, and an indicator of what’s to come: a powerful progressive electoral showing in 2026.

MAGA Republicans are responsible for rolling back the clock on our rights and freedoms.

They’re banning books and diverting funds from public schools to private institutions. They are spearheading racist immigration policies and decimating jobs that keep our federal government functional. They have instituted some of the strictest anti-abortion laws nationwide causing a sharp increase in maternal mortality.

Finally, it looks like they’re starting to see consequences for their actions. So we need you to join our fight.

Will you chip in any amount now to help us mobilize Black and Latino voters and elect progressives up and down the ballot in Texas? Now is our chance!

| Peter,

House Republicans just rammed their latest tax bill through the Ways and Means Committee and it’s nothing short of an attack on working families.

Why? They’re doing this to**pay for tax cuts for billionaires.**

And the price? _Slashing essential programs that millions of Americans rely on._

The GOP wants to...

**💸 **Rip $1.1 trillion from Medicaid and SNAP
**📉 **Strip healthcare from 14 million Americans
**💰 **Hand out tax breaks to billionaires and giant corporations
**🎓 **Repeal of student loan forgiveness

All to give the ultrawealthy another windfall, _while exploding the deficit in the process._

I am fighting back. That’s why I’m speaking out and voted against this devastating bill in committee.

I’m committed to standing up for hard-working families who cannot afford to lose these essential programs.

The truth is, our fundraising isn’t where it should be at this point in the month. And with Donald Trump fighting tooth and nail to dismantle any progress we’ve made on climate, we wanted to do something a little different today. **We’ve set an ambitious $20,000 fundraising goal to hit by midnight on Saturday, and we’re asking our most dedicated supporters to chip in just $1 toward that goal.** That’s it. One dollar. **[What do you say? Please use this link to add your very own donation of $1 today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107691035/545509623/2105508926?amount=1&refcode=ea.bb5ffa30-ec30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.bb5ffa30-ec30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiNWZmYTMwLWVjMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mAxoDTFc947hBh0X6BsYHfq9ymgjz3EK-Rai1QexvOc=)** It might not sound like much, but grassroots donations of $1 — not billionaire checks — are how we’ve built _everything_ we’ve accomplished. ✅ It’s how we helped elect **nearly 100 climate leaders** in high-stakes races across the country in 2024. 🏆 It’s how our climate champions on the Portland City Council led the charge against Big Oil with an investigation into Zenith Energy’s dangerous fossil fuel operations. 🔥 And it’s how we’re going to **keep building local and state-level power** in a moment where our national politics feel like they’re barreling toward authoritarianism. If you’ve ever wondered if a single dollar can make a difference, here’s your answer: Yes. It already has. And with your help, it will again. Because it’s not just your $1 donation. It’s $1 from thousands of people just like you. People who truly understand the stakes of the climate crisis and are motivated to own a piece of the solution by helping to elect climate leaders who will meet this moment head-on. **You know better than most that this fight won’t be easy.[But we have something the billionaires and polluters don’t: people power. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: We’re pro-labor over here, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, every month is a great month to fight for workers, but May is particularly special. We began the month with May Day, a time to celebrate the work that labor has done to create a better workplace for all of us and honor the struggles and sacrifices that workers made so that we can enjoy the workplace benefits that we have today. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107691439/545511099/-1074210638?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTFjMTJjNy1lYzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoFjQ79SCkPHbwORN_J83AkO5DKdqdBsfTNsK-MtJpo=) I’m proud to be a member of the Congressional Labor Caucus and work to further the rights of workers on the House floor. I led some of the most pro-union policies in Arizona’s history as a councilwoman, fighting for wage ordinances to improve quality of life for construction workers, and passing heat safety laws that protect thousands of workers from extreme heat. **_**[My priority will always be to support the workers who keep this country moving. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Flipping the House to a Pro-Climate Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
I’m excited to share that I recently received the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters (LCV), one of the premier environmental advocacy groups both here in Maryland and in the nation.
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-14]
As a lifelong environmental advocate and policymaker, I am deeply aligned with the mission and values of LCV. In my time in the Maryland State Senate, I was proud to receive a perfect score on their scorecard, and I look forward to continuing to represent our shared values in the House of Representatives.
Even with the Trump Administration’s tactic of ”flooding the zone,” we cannot lose sight of our environmental priorities. On the Natural Resources Committee and Chesapeake Bay Watershed Task Force, I’ve been all in on protecting the Bay and making our communities more resilient to climate change.
[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcceZGoSOGN6H2_L2N72lcCeBGnHNd26S5t2SGDRufCvcM8q9IKKqOGI5oKEvPx-v9GcC83PnsJaHOgyuqzSIq1hwaeI3STsn-OMZAaejUkR6aqsRGSec_k2Rs14OHWUSiyUDLn1w?key=PyHEoYbz8SaphnxrBBKm0Mnm]
I’m fighting to flip back the House to a pro-climate, pro-science majority in 2026 — will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-14]

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Not Again…!
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news.

Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House.

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

We cannot let history repeat itself.

Because if Democrats seize the majority again, they won’t just raise taxes and open the border — it’ll be endless impeachment hearings, sham investigations, and non-stop political warfare aimed at one man: President Trump.

That’s why I’m stepping up to defend our majority — and launching my America First Majority Fund – but I can’t defend it alone.

[So please make a contribution to my America First Majority Fund so that we can defend the Republican House majority and continue delivering victories for President Trump and the American people.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A&amount=other)

This isn’t just about winning re-election. This is about defending the entire America First agenda, and I’m ready for the fight!

I was just in Michigan, campaigning for one of the most critical toss-up races in the country — and that’s just the beginning. I’m taking the fight to every battleground district where the majority will be won or lost.

The Democrats have already lined up their donors, their attack ads, and their media allies.

But we’ve got something more powerful: the truth and millions of Americans behind us.

If we fail to defend the House, they’ll bury President Trump’s agenda and put America last once again.

We’ve got to fight like hell and hold the line.

So I’m asking — will you step up today and be one of the first supporters of my America First Majority Fund?

Let’s win this fight together.

In Service

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Dan Crenshaw

clean_body: | | Trump ordered Republicans to GUT Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for his billionaire MAGA donors like Elon Musk. Republicans LIED about their plans to crush our health care, even as they voted to advance Trump’s horrific budget outline. Republicans finally released their plan – which would SLASH Medicaid, throw MILLIONS of Americans off their health insurance, and lead to hospital closings throughout the country. Just as Democrats warned! | Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care by blocking Republicans’ Medicaid cuts – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. | Republicans’ dangerous new plan would: coverage for 13.7 million Americans, including seniors, children, veterans and people with disabilities hospitals and nursing homes, especially in rural communities benefits from low-income families to award tax breaks to their billionaire donors people with chronic diseases like cancer and diabetes, and lead to missed treatment, increased medical debt and worse Make no mistake: The American people are on our side. 80% of Americans support Medicaid and don’t want these cuts. And that’s why Trump and Republicans have resorted to lies and distortions to try to hide their actions to harm their own constituents – to please Donald Trump. It’s up to us to STOP their plan in its tracks, EDUCATE voters about Republicans’ unpopular and deadly plot to crush our health care, and FLIP the House in the midterms to finally put a legislative check on Trump’s power with Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House instead of Mike Johnson who does Trump’s bidding regardless of harm to the American people. I am looking forward to your responses. Thank you, NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. body:
I just launched an exploratory committee for Governor of Iowa!

| | | | | [|
---](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=b6d13cd585&e=115bdcb0e5)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear friend,
It’s official.
I've launched an exploratory committee for Governor of Iowa because Iowa deserves a conservative leader who will take our state to new heights.
---
| [JOIN TEAM FEENSTRA TODAY!](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=57d21bb717&e=115bdcb0e5)
---
| In Congress, I've stood with President Trump every step of the way to secure our border.

I passed, and President Trump signed, Sarah's Law. No longer will violent, Illegal immigrants harm or kill Americans and go unpunished.

I'm working every day to extend and expand the Trump Tax Cuts.

Now, as a husband and father of four, I want to build an Iowa where our families flourish and our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

As a conservative Republican, I want to protect the values that we hold dear and defend our way of life from the Radical Left.

With your support, we can do just that!
---
| [CHIP IN TO TAKE IOWA TO NEW HEIGHTS!](https://feenstraforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8962a0f5713e141c231f4f715&id=025b8ca63d&e=115bdcb0e5)
---
| Fighting for our families, farmers, and communities will be my top priority.

Defending our shared conservative values will be my mission.

Thank you for your support,
Randy Feenstra
---

[**I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL – I’m asking you to help me defeat him.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=81fd4fb7531b43708b5c6bfcae719c16&_e=Zec1sxFoGUmhv6kFxYey7a_nhfmUrL8uDEdMgMTusImEkEQhbjX2ePyG0kky_E4V31Tuf5NKdWEDUiJMuTWOUjIXenX8ctitxLe7HHDkvNswkSagI-dHDYGhpL8kebdriBRoDZAOSlNbXKmGqP1PUKjdXVA3XyNa9Cdl69j9HtmEmJs1RSp6QTQhfed2nept-OTWsAav3S82UJk6qm2OWejYxcDYCJbVyVXrJA3LuBSTMy-OF6TPRMHL8XceaGWOCwtUvA_Ka2OAFxocj-DOxpM725pjyJMar0EijIQNfkd8qL_XDEXGxV7pCfzzv0PvqipUiqwh5FNHekIx3cZFFdU2syZJ9RImcdBfPApyUuCzOH8R45waA11ra0pJ44UimKdzhCgsjJKNqpSsViUG5zmWwwhxC64i1xVj6Binnwm64KEbrfV8RuEm7Q-UWVYnMtSxpmp1NuSTy9_PKER6CC_pN3qVVdIbUwBhaj4yPhtC5CYIteIQSb6dxY9M6NKySanXg-B1rNWxm7EDW_PAPvtGLsmxInf73dpCle5AdQN21QCzRAEY1Xow8_38DXVh2sTSIlMcX-SfHm0NIuGGH8KTCroFSK4yj4HChbPcmbNSKYDHA8jfYKCxZvRpB24swV4yfvebkfHPdcDQryZTTte4ESJxMjJzQmeFCGAgQnomR7sLTI5ZU8Iyv_r1qSEMzrOhuJpGImayRLnYSLOXcNweIrOXyi5nvbaH8PYV--LmxKy-lreoZxLipAb9oIglDwKFbt6wWyYylBvQ-ouxVQ%3D%3D)

**Let me tell you more about myself.**

**I was born and raised in Mexico.** I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country.

**I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general.** I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border.

**I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief.** I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty.

**I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator.**

He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan.

And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team.

**Enough already.** Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda.

[**But I can’t do this alone. I’m not a rich self-funder; I’m a lawman and soldier who’s humbly asking for your help to start this campaign the right way. clean_body: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because President Trump needs backup and Jon Ossoff is AWOL The Federal Election Commission's filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL | Peter, my name is John King. Let me tell you more about myself. I was born and raised in Mexico. I came to America when I was 17. My story is only possible in this country. I enlisted in the Army as a private and retired as a two-star major general. I deployed to Afghanistan, Iraq, Bosnia, Africa, and our southern border. I joined the Atlanta police as a beat cop and became a police chief. I’ve locked up drug dealers, deported criminals here illegally, and I was shot in the line of duty. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across the state. I’m running for Senate now because Jon Ossoff is an AWOL senator. He was nowhere to be found when Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan. And since the last election, he’s voted against supporting Israel, against keeping men out of women’s sports, and against confirming President Trump’s team. Enough already. Georgians need a senator who fights for them and President Trump needs backup to pass his agenda. I’m not afraid of how tough and expensive this campaign will be. I’m not afraid of the Swamp in Washington. I am afraid of giving Jon Ossoff six more years to put America last. Thanks, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. We will keep fighting to make reproductive freedom for all a reality."_
> –Molly Duane, Senior Staff Attorney, Center for Reproductive Rights

clean_body: Peter, victories like this are possible because of you | | | ---|--- Peter, Yesterday, a Michigan court permanently struck down multiple anti-abortion laws that have long stood in the way of people seeking care, including a mandatory 24-hour delay and forced biased counseling. | "CELEBRATE THIS WIN" This didn't happen overnight. Earlier this year, we took this case to trial and yesterday, a state court ruled that these laws violate the Reproductive Freedom for All amendment passed by Michigan voters in 2022. "Yesterday's ruling is a monumental win for Michigan abortion providers and their patients. This is exactly what Michiganders wanted when they voted overwhelmingly to protect their right to access abortion. Despite the victory at the ballot box, these baseless abortion restrictions have remained on the books, impeding and humiliating patients seeking care. We will keep fighting to make reproductive freedom for all a reality." –Molly Duane, Senior Staff Attorney, Center for Reproductive Rights "FUEL THE FIGHT" The Center for Reproductive Rights filed this case on behalf of Northland Family Planning Centers and Medical Students for Choice... and your support made it possible. Onward, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Don’t miss your chance to defend the Endangered Species Act
body:
May 19 is the deadline to make your voice heard| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107695053/545523244/779512579?sourceid=1167576&utm_campaign=action-alert&utm_medium=email&utm_source=aa-esa&Series=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxOTIyODdmLWYzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bx2KFVson7L2s5ykwuqzfK1BtYWK6z69W47HVz57_N4=&emci=116997f7-4730-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5192287f-f330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)
---

| | Dear Peter,

There’s still time to add your voice to a growing chorus of people speaking out against the Department of Interior’s proposal to gut the Endangered Species Act (ESA). Federal officials have proposed altering the ESA’s long-understood definition of the word “harm” to no longer include habitat destruction. This change would threaten already imperiled wildlife and strike a blow at the very heart of redwood conservation.

The proposed rule is subject to a **[public comment](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107695054/545523245/1155893031?sourceid=1167576&utm_campaign=action-alert&utm_medium=email&utm_source=aa-esa&Series=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxOTIyODdmLWYzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bx2KFVson7L2s5ykwuqzfK1BtYWK6z69W47HVz57_N4=&emci=116997f7-4730-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5192287f-f330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)** period through May 19, 2025. More than 120,000 people from all corners of the United States—using our suggested message or adding their own words—have already sent heartfelt comments to the Department of the Interior expressing their opposition to the suggested change. Here are just a few:

_“Habitat loss is a leading cause of species extinction, and protecting habitat is vital to preserving biodiversity, safeguarding clean air and water, and maintaining resilient landscapes—including irreplaceable ecosystems like California’s ancient redwood forests.” _

_“Destroying habitats now will cost us far more later in disaster recovery, agricultural losses, and public health impacts. We can’t afford to treat nature as expendable.” _

_“What good is protecting an animal if we allow the destruction of the very place it needs to exist?” _

We urge you to join us and the thousands of others who have spoken up in defense of the Endangered Species Act. But don’t wait too long—the deadline for public comments is May 19. Take a few moments and submit your comment **[here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107695055/545523246/1155893031?sourceid=1167576&utm_campaign=action-alert&utm_medium=email&utm_source=aa-esa&Series=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxOTIyODdmLWYzMzAtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bx2KFVson7L2s5ykwuqzfK1BtYWK6z69W47HVz57_N4=&emci=116997f7-4730-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5192287f-f330-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1504551)**.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Peter, you lit this match...
body:
-It all started in a garage with no budget and a dream. -You didn't just believe in us. You built us. -From one spark to a nationwide fire. -You helped make the impossible possible. -What started small is now shaking campuses across America. -This is what a real youth revolution looks like. -Because of you, the tide is turning. -See what you helped unleash on the campuses they said we'd never reach. -We were never supposed to be winning--and yet here we are. -One dream. One vision. A whole new generation rising. -You were there from the beginning--even if you didn't know it. -Let me show you what you helped ignite. -This fire's not going out anytime soon. -We're about to go further than we ever thought possible. -Thanks to you, we're lighting up the map. -This is the cultural shift you prayed for. -What we're building together is bigger than you think. -This isn't nostalgia--it's mission fuel. -When they said we'd fail, you said "go." -Let's make this a turning point for history.

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/UOtFAl3Tedk9_VTr7tbSl4Si23yhUHeW5Bs1Ysa-YqpREwZfQ536u_dPQgDAIcYz1V3O7NBtjVhxpGMMV2RGMme6yKOUB9-3ZPL8FOQdJE8SDhhlqVurrQFJH1diGigrKpRUV9BFjqgCWEHW_IJRUkfY33mqwDZYN1OrpnVkabFI1nvmD9O3WpHZ7Xi67SS7nB_oqI1aiDHbADOz9BQ85v3iSiKcZPaA5U2tCc5tIVB7U0XqJYvwzXFRI-k5b6mu6Lr5LhmnzwndBlXAfwpw2T8SzUL0u0wuxoACpL2Vba2ZALMshsrgCu1fQEKoGgYSC9JBBhUgkSKsvtp1oXMRqnZvwXBvc5XHwaZ37-PJVcUFm4gpArjpvwC0qM2JckhkKr76IlJubW_xP2l0oSjy5PVfiKkkeQ8OzLNdUC3934LeTu1Oa8n8j8oI-TDuzHdta2Hrkf1L5ndxFX3QWXGUqxk2Y0adCn5Ubog5Syx6xzGev4nMozhIFUKLc3vPDUYB8I2QdLtEXMkNLJTWbAWZed9Q3thiGu7iASIMxWQrQ6fl3MIcvbnKvCvSNJ6QCwH7dHEF86ff48MJwjr8KhS7cskK7FU4Lvzd_mb1K5gvxKC9juLffXUQ5DRcbjFhdwRObIHAu4HlvTYBPhTsVEdDUrTTGBbQWJacpvsR65P7XJfDy3_88krvcw6qqHwhUwK7FgmtTKF7I48ZkhhRteIbAyM6iW6R_qIQiPNrZSH_EeiID-cfwm7h_z_H7xSOEkfZuw/tUycFvqRROFy0nfzptJLJwhd8RWCwSLz/8)

Peter, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/JErtgzErmL_TaHNWnVsxsXrLS4mUxKBZjKD6vsaQAIMbV2rXr1QfoOrEjivZyvzT6nRuUDgC8V1eSZzgxKj3DbN9beatDAgee3zVV3G30COsh1Q87uSYk9gbHos78oQDqB0cqHJgI9q3M_KZnQSDZ0K5D61N9kATI89PUzg_YsMUM6Y0O9m_M8uWdKHz_M_YVaw_Q9ZEQkvrSgFC4r7q_zvX33IzMzUXT-0jstl99ijw9QRFYbJHmXHNls4WkrkHtZGhM2n30FX_DXy1eUf5LYLokubar6x-9Yfomi5JDNAyyjAGhASHwNAzFjolrY1grEIBpTTnyMsdhT9V3LKIxO9EdRZgMuTUC1O2AE73GeBH8IlfUTEY4WKOdZGphsPZ4bTQNG3Jp06i-qLlqzZaQr7wrYOB3aSLdABUesK4IpY-iN-BDnmUF2PYgBUE0bh45YKW3juAyU-Fy7QFdM1zJ3isa9ecPxvfLmkJltrVoN1Iu9Z-MpFzdFtvrsyBvCDywrk-L-Vbo4xf_ofYtsuhEFtmW3xJR-QiuMyKxIS68uF08i4KDPep4Ekvr9u6J-U9KsXcjVRGypYvAuQwnpTyimuPvREviz1b-3hlTCMIaApqfkH_UpT0D2DEO3c9v7h7DXTZcIdEW1_gn8Oonkni1aNwG85ngbrfgsxnoC_XqbRNN1LVyA_awq2FSyb9qniPfNw_sPhIgUAeILUrgW2vj57cenGqEf277o2lunZrHN6yqQAYH5ipGHNFIL6anOCucQ/FBPj4X7aGWsmJfkBNiBf2KVLvRiMdDbK/8)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... **Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today.It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs._But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._**I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.**My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again.** I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... I remember my first Turning Point USA speaking event in Peoria, Illinois during the summer of 2012, where just six people showed up...**And I remember the look in their eyes -- those early patriots --****when I told them the vision:**_" We're going to create a youth movement that LOVES America."__" We're going to go on campus and win hearts and minds."__" We're going to push back -- and we're going to WIN."_They didn't laugh... They didn't walk out...**They believed. And Peter -- so did patriots like you.**
---
You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story.Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.**You didn 't give up. And neither did we.**But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. _But they were wrong._ I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ULmwL6kFFDVp1CBZ4jSEDzmFSNLT7hLrCBvQ-ph2WXV3ouWLfSfulGx067b6dWuYrAAdRur6d6lRTaFjYJMFSM0UX68KKDMJUZhIT7RrpXAw1PRCm_7vIfaZiWGJIYv1GeOGjiNsX0Dv-OBNi9lyZwG3ez9GRG8T467zzZN93fTL1RA36gf_-fqT8v7xMrIBA_nKxQTt11c-T0nTQXlwHbGOmLa6fCAtGxV4QGvqMeraX9uA6-Y1_uhEQJAPAGpnzHVOLxlVkam36W-ywDTabn9vGhcqJvscuKBEzJPoP-sJjvbfF5ifrNhTuV1MFFGPvz0Vwx1nhyc7YrtyDBhwy-eV-oY1E4JVRVLtfokdgDA1r6uNmsd7msO-Xi2GsLVu6a4DO6tKQRUntDRXG52PG5bMZFzBF-q_3d96apLMj89-MO4oO9Ifydrgx5aN-oQ2o7zaarkeXfdRGOg_m4Doa2HBOtCxlzv83tTn98bWUC8Q92HUrqNcwooguA6rOxQ_p7l-x9FgHZ_047rvv476pEB5SGSuIa0GRJRNm_UgBAWnvb9YseWHglowQ_x0tohD5G_k875rKj24RkFk7Af6QRULkI5RU862YvZGzlnaCd4rs4q8OnADC4tZCyZXOZF-EcJs778QsWPsZlYwr2Xh0tgDf9D4ZbpRzYN90Y0Z97lh3vksOTVQOxQSubgKO1vCUOdngJlpQFbOOc5cyFLHTbVkSIm33yqjhZEKyUKclUP019V95pATv-8UcThNGGWI8g/n-XLYmfZ4h79gDA5VFxnuuEtyC3HtzdC/8)
---
**And then... something happened...** **_The students started listening._** They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. _In DROVES._ And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. **Peter, just LOOK at the movement we 've built:** 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists
🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters
🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online
🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left
🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Peter, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." _They were LIED to._ **But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again!**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kM4tiT-qny_JO10b2s1WC0pgDK-Trpf3QBFh-PgOGbxlo4g8GSuN7sN-XGMeTKnwHsY2G5eTMOYBgRiJ6y6Qjmwm37n-ejYLG-JKReMYaVIOVPmHFZgvGA1S374I8BNnZeL7xFSHOdPx9uUEVtlLm1eEkgeC1Av_ijkDdB8FTLD9P6TVqEcIsIK4sB1eeXVzekU0Mgyn_dmZIkk5AYHztJpUDZ2tYIbPRDjLjpTWh7XfirnW3nvikjudMHUy7rqtgfrCROG_Gnfw8NSsvZy-BgfifzrjoN4ReBn8UZWOjt8naZyGNKct54pxIDW7LmYiKTeD9_50M8HOB2CTz5oqcVQ5K5MVOo_yXUOSmCGznsz_b2tNQ59lKUp1Zn1nTm9_qAt6q5s3wRztryQuX9jRvHv0O39neUPa-V4GSecTHjH29JHGNtb5Sq3IHsyFdDQN3vITNUPEUk7EmVpoGVQv3J8InwZPDfkuuTAjTVgNTWjyzO9wAaDDUDZXmRcAY0mJfUoiqy3iTnI3c_jLkThtEM_9v979VkpZyRoEeO8gLZwJTFGjrIb1ECJPANrief2QvH75OZYy79bZa7tHvOdN8nf_ft3SfTlCJsKazKOhdw4wGQhFRn9AGckiE5cZQhcqwMn2tTmFHsLW8fNWBUKRJEKO37VJpMnHvISEuFE6ehTV9_Y45pVj-0Jqewx1kfzf1Wih9U66QMlq013HTG8P3-_k4U82SzjV1VdY9nlvcjU9Q3v8GWaR8-eQ5pjC2K8Ixg/b0_K-74RYg87pDvByIDkqvVmAz_kfqib/8)

_Peter, praise God!_ And you know what? This generation is just getting started.**But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over.** The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous.They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning._We cannot give them back an inch._ So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder.We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory.**We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control.** Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us.
---
Peter, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. **And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years.** That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. **I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving.** Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation...If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news.**Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION.** Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. **That means two times the students you 'll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you'll win over for AMERICA.**So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start.You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. _**[Let’s carry the momentum through to every campus, every platform, every cultural stronghold until we WIN. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.You didn 't give up. And neither did we.But we were never supposed to be winning...The Left thought they owned this generation. They thought their indoctrination had worked. But they were wrong. I remember standing at tables on hostile campuses with nothing but flyers and hope, praying to have a conversation that would light a spark. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back. And then... something happened... The students started listening. They started to question everything, think for themselves, and no longer be afraid to stand up. Then, they started showing up. In DROVES. And now? We're not just watching history unfold... you and I are making it. Peter, just LOOK at the movement we 've built: 🔥 A network of 820,000+ conservative student activists 🔥 1,800+ college and high school chapters 🔥 All 50 states. No territory unclaimed.🔥 16 BILLION+ total views across online platforms🔥 5 MILLION+ daily viewers online 🔥 Over 10 million young people turned away from the Left 🔥 Students rising up -- even in DEEP blue states Peter, we're not just winning arguments and "owning the libs" anymore... We're winning hearts. We're changing minds. We're turning the tide. This generation wasn't "lost." They were LIED to. But because of patriots like YOU -- they're hearing the truth. They're finding their voices. They're discovering their courage. They're falling in love with this country again! Peter, praise God! And you know what? This generation is just getting started.But let me say this clearly: The battle is far from over. The Left is on the ropes -- but still dangerous.They're doubling down with new tactics. They're more aggressive than ever in our schools, our media, our digital spaces. They're coming after our students harder than ever before -- because they know we're winning.We cannot give them back an inch. So now, as we look back on how far we've come... It's time to fight even harder.We're going to press in. We're going to drive deeper into enemy territory.We 're going to reach more students, train more leaders, and destroy more strongholds of Leftist control. Not with violence. Not with hate. But with truth. With courage. And with patriots like YOU standing shoulder-to-shoulder with us. Peter, I want you to feel proud as you read this today. Because this movement -- the energy, the fire, the growth, the headlines -- it belongs to patriots like you... The grassroots patriots who lit the match... fanned the flames... stood in the gap. And now, we 're raising up the most Conservative, most Patriotic, most fired-up youth generation in 50 years. That's not hype. That's reality. And it's only possible because of our proud supporters, people like you, who never gave up. I can 't say thank you enough to the patriots who've fought alongside us... those who loved this country enough to invest in its future... those who believed this country was worth saving. Let's keep our foot on the gas. Let's keep changing minds. Let's keep winning this culture war. Because we were never supposed to be winning... And yet here we are. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. Peter, thank you for reading what was admittedly a long email.But I wanted you to know how far we've come and how thankful I am for patriots like you! And if this email stirred something in you... If you'd be proud to be a part of the movement that's going to save our GREAT nation...If you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America... Then I have good news.Right now, through the month of May, every single donation to Turning Point USA is being MATCHED, dollar-for-dollar, up to $2.5 MILLION. Why? Because an extremely generous Turning Point USA supporter wanted to rally as many grassroots patriots as possible to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good.That means your impact gets DOUBLED. That means two times the students you 'll reach. Two times the truth heard. Two times the hearts and minds you'll win over for AMERICA.So, if you've been waiting for the right moment to take your stand -- this is it. This is your chance to pour fuel on the fire that patriots like you helped start.You just won't be supporting a cause anymore -- you'll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/eYUQuc0prRYl6OLtvr2Q4CPgsvBNSYQwS4hcUQH1S6wpTiIOLWt7UzQ-5JPwDDcUWs0yw3xlpj3yGOcCKm6dlsR8caRcl6-4GhBTfkwlH0ULaWWgA2q8tD5SU6_JxKI9CtA4UZBMTd90yz9nEbWzGXkUzV6IOx1fghLLz0OHnxQ2my-VQHcaoPnlJ8jRh-M6ToUR5xRyh16D3Gdrwx39hZVL92jID3PDqqJXKqOtQ7JZrq__ddWGxjG_18NA_cLCBWENiZw9auVHKah9rWoa8Olhzxi-fYEk5uqcja_5VCZvUzM96kHPap7PAjESWBgrBMR36AkeV9J6cOJghfN6IU_UTCiReOpATHHfOPMEP3aIZH3n7vfu_VSqA_OxvXM1sUaL_Qe6uy0xy29bOI_6ZUcOSW-NmBT1eQA-MvzlQERQcvZS2jcLgf3IUcg3XVPD_6PtuBcQvAnbvwVTBlmmMmkvonaRozLiLMmss-Zjcf-uhCAi8BEp79AYQz-WIwxeCWMSD6Ew5OUR4cTfYXTiae1st3W_eZ0JOO6vRCuglM-Es1gRE9JuKk7kiYc0um4a886wNtwZgsBqApLBMPw5Z8nIbLmH7WA-0g9qjMo8osk1tqlNfbY6zlVRQNMK_52MWSUzrkLR6Z0zqa0-7ayhUDniVIIuCE-Bv3ur1W8C8RVzAhIXwiMmdS_vgrFWaiT-l2JeYDUOBhsDSDppwSZyCzSX4_BnRS-zLjPXmMWtSJyVa82M0hW-yjOHZXQ3Yk4X6ZmY5L9B-OJ_I5vRAQUj/LOjBrmSlo2Xg5KM8ou1sDux82nmEAJSF/8)**

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Ma92swNX7V05oDmDgAscjkRn4Nr-7xOafX0_Dopv65yV5oGagE72RZhxo_IIzrjH5raPX6DDbS0CWl5dpD_SCPQmg34ZZ1bWnMfh3_8OuWAI1_DdZ_S5Y6VKbr4YJD6QGsyuimOVTijNf_n8Tut3xSiFzcm3e2nX-nnon9B7NL9b4zOYWctCJ7YxoJzQidwt51apCW8BQYfaDQjTWBEOVtE8KBYXtd6JAEUtvmDYbiB_XHRXitxzOvm49qMlX-IRRlAYf8Sdai50sDuFXTi6h-fh12D1AzawxNMg_45lvGyx3wpC77B1pVCY0HYzBqqvHHXby-dkBJottbeckmh2LxWNRIhiVDL-NsfDXYPV54JmOERufn48tx474MvzKgn9taLDVbOrHaqp7yVsn3hepjmJTunVin2iftF9NlPEqSR3gfjijjw4OJqoKYz4l_R_idwNraB_d0x9i4y7KoBIINi7Fq-VQbicOL7wD40rvddrTG5k7ZkdgaZ_XNgUwHeDL_E7E9Sb8RetibSja6_iWP11v2-Mqr2KqETSgQ861EV6TfjQjx3oz39d3ptO28NTmnsfEw5H7-6f_72gjhCuZhPMbcU_9qRudkHu5jKsBlNkEfxtTF1wK08kRunzBZoH09XR5ndONMZ1e082aKXvdO10keDD8gxUUAcjjSKAQkgRy67YQf5Bf4qoNMVMPKRqHGz-V66Rld7mucJs-bnQWP4ttOuzTC5bMOa8g-AXxv5W/mJ6dwrHlB054bgBFUZVdNLH0gETcCjGH/8)[**Please If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America’s heroes, and please – if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/27vxdCHPEEjPjWDMvhElQqixAUe82VgMbQ66TjgXdboNerUcO6VAVcJZUghaq12fnN01L3lUEPUxNVmgHm4pp8P7wCXj7UK8cX7zpNuF34e5MiPFXgS9fzO9Ol_8KjDZ-Uafp5TRlh4R9MtYNRQbwGA50s39HbijzXR4y95VGhXShLIag5p7EpwJfoO9Tg54qpwu1YdHtG3c8seiO3dJMjRzmsT0MOod9KR2ip5Ie0g8hBXlV0piWgtIHtE-vo88haoZdYKpiTVnA-iUwlqIvHIr1p6TuJuBRMtq1N2UHkMqJRUK2r-IFGDJoqS5LDh5XqH5XavvGkp-emfZb32cvgkRYaW05FZQDdCIxjwb_lbkW13Po4Ncym68QOykB3oUmvdFS25TjJu_Gj_YjpV0S8Zq251nKBrRkJM_pxuMkhi8aQS94KeRYnai238sdLsP8sxVyxc7CVHfCCNRf-ExqAwywu5LjxVCg3J10ho1jqFwiS6yooWKnGqpE_sRYPLcrgQIw0QRrEwYiNrO97YYsX4SFFq-0vsaPXvr8IFxXWln7wrzz6Sr8rd7PJakFBXiZpckFdmLfBuDnI0-Tngb78rBhiRbb-kzPhIeE2pnp2IdtjVRSiLLehL9MjCVWWceC5Wv83P4Frcv0aIt9xQ5KmF6cl2Pt-2h9Q2XrUriW-G_oLp3d6i1oT1kkHg_tLHnhrUbfTaOi4Lzt5dZRJ_ZvCsmTNySlengCxGs0p7ys9Na6B3o94ubyOftYBQTMkPHo5OLAH3usa6ND0rcoZ3o/PgFZHe_UvgmTMHK8c-ZDy7qcR7-QNX4b/8)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 |

subject: I know it might seem like an odd time to be talking about benchmarks.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
What’s next? Peter — it's Jordan, Wesley’s campaign manager.

We're approaching an important mid-month fundraising deadline, and I need your help.

I know it might seem like an odd time to be talking about benchmarks...

It’s not an election year for Congress, the headlines are changing by the minute, and with everything going on, you might be asking: _**Why does a mid-month fundraising goal in May even matter?**_

But here’s the truth: Every dollar we raise right now is an investment in the fight ahead. We’re not waiting until 2026 to get started **— and our opponents aren’t either.**

The same extremist donors who backed Donald Trump and funded attacks on public education, reproductive freedom, and voting rights are already pouring money into early organizing and ad buys. And they’re not just targeting Wesley; they're going to come after every other Democrat who is willing to stand up to their chaos.

These mid-month benchmarks (like the one we’re facing now) help us know if we’re on track to compete. They show national partners and grassroots coalitions that this campaign has real momentum, and they help us lock in early resources to protect voting access, expand community outreach, and ensure Wesley’s voice is heard loud and clear.

[**If you can, chip in $5, $10, or whatever feels right to help us hit our $5,000 goal and stay on track to hit our May fundraising goal. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Republicans are trying to throw 14 million people off their health care. We can stop them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
These cuts would shutter hospitals, skyrocket premiums, and leave millions of people vulnerable.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2545%2E4032634%2Ep7x6xu)
---
Republicans are pushing a spending bill that could throw 14 million people off of their health care. If this bill passes, clinics and hospitals will be forced to shutter, premiums will skyrocket, and millions of people will be left without essential care. This Republican plan, which Trump is calling a “big beautiful bill”, proposes major cuts to Medicaid that would cut health care for new mothers, people struggling with opioid addiction, patients in nursing homes, and newborn babies — all so that they can turn around and fund their “big beautiful” tax cut for billionaires. **This is an all-hands-on-deck moment: We need to mobilize and build public pressure against these Medicaid cuts. We were able to save the Affordable Care Act under Trump’s first term, despite being in the minority, and we can do this again.** [**Click here to find out how to call your representative and urge them to vote NO on any cuts to Medicaid. Our team has provided an easy script for you to follow — and every voice will make a difference right now.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/call/ew-em-medicaid-calls/?source=EMZ25U_MED_E_20250514_V1S1&t=8&akid=2545%2E4032634%2Ep7x6xu) | [**CALL NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/call/ew-em-medicaid-calls/?source=EMZ25U_MED_E_20250514_V1S1&t=9&akid=2545%2E4032634%2Ep7x6xu)
---
Look, Republicans want nothing more than for you to feel powerless right now. They want us to tune out, thinking we have no leverage here. They’re walking around as if the election gave them a mandate to plow forward with anything that Trump wants, but it didn’t.
The vast majority of Americans don’t want to see cuts to Medicaid. The policies Republicans are pushing are deeply unpopular. And we need to make sure they know that.
No matter who your representative is, now is the time to make our message loud and clear.
[**We can fight against the GOP’s Medicaid cuts. And we can win. But you don’t get what you don’t fight for, so I’m asking you to call your representatives now and tell them: NO cuts to Medicaid to fund billionaire tax breaks.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/call/ew-em-medicaid-calls/?source=EMZ25U_MED_E_20250514_V1S1&t=10&akid=2545%2E4032634%2Ep7x6xu)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

clean_body: Democrats are outraising Republicans across the country by wide margins. | Fellow American, I don’t like what I’m seeing for two reasons: FIRST -- Democrats are outraising Republicans across the country by wide margins. SECOND -- Democrats have flipped several Republican seats in several of the first special and mayoral elections since President Trump’s re-election. This is a warning shot Fellow American. Democrats aren't waiting around for 2026. They’re organizing now, and they’re getting results. The first step to taking on the radical Left’s massive fundraising and organizing operation is hitting every fundraising target going forward. That starts with tomorrow’s May mid-month fundraising deadline. We've set an ambitious goal of $23,030 to hit by midnight tomorrow. I don’t need to go into detail about what the Democrats will do if they reclaim the Senate Majority. It’s the end of President Trump’s legislative agenda, impeachment proceedings, witch hunts, radical Leftist legislation, you name it. My fight to keep Montana is on the front lines of the battle for the Senate Majority. If you care about taking on the Left’s historic mobilizing operation, now’s your chance to take decisive action. For America, Steve Daines PS: Democrats spent over $90 million in Montana’s 2024 Senate race. The threat in 2026 is real. Every deadline matters. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Sarah McBride
subject: This is not what public service looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
#
It's Sarah.
My job as a Congresswoman is to be a public servant, and I’m so proud to do it.
But some days, I genuinely wonder why House Republicans even ran for Congress.
**As you read this email, House Republicans are pushing forward their plan to cut Medicaid, which would strip health care away from _millions_ of Americans.** They’re cheering on as the Trump administration seeks to illegally lock up Americans abroad and halts deliveries to food banks across the country — including one million meals in Delaware.
You can’t call this public service. That’s _cruelty._
I’m doing everything I can to fight back — in Congress, at home in Delaware, and online — and champion real solutions that make life better for everyone. And right now, I could use your help.
**Grassroots donations fuel my campaign and keep me focused on this urgent work. But right now, we’re $10,500 behind where we need to be at this point in the month, and I’m counting on a surge in support to close the gap.**
[**I know not everyone can give today, and that’s okay! But if you can spare it, can you pitch in $5 before our mid-month fundraising deadline on May 15? Every donation helps us make our message louder and our power stronger.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250514-1?refcode=em20250514-2000&amount=5&refcode2=2000_21716_Nd5Tyz&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250514-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250514-2000&refcode2=2000_21716_Nd5Tyz&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)**
Thank you so much — and more soon,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250514-1&t=1&refcode2=2000_21716_Nd5Tyz&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2000%2E21716%2ENd5Tyz)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: The next 36 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our work does not stop.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250514-1-b&t=1&akid=10429%2E3935704%2Eg65euL)
Hi team, it’s Gabby. I’ll keep this brief: Tomorrow marks our mid-quarter deadline, and right now, our fundraising isn’t where it needs to be.
My team tells me that if 8 more supporters from Cresco chip in the next 36 hours, we can get back on track. Can we count on your support?
**Here’s your personal link to donate:**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords2025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250514-1-b&t=2&akid=10429%2E3935704%2Eg65euL)**
Every month, my team and I set goals we need to hit to power our work at GIFFORDS. Fundraising this quarter has been slower than what anybody expected — but our work doesn’t stop.
Just recently, Donald Trump cut $1 billion in school mental health resources. This came just two weeks after the administration stripped millions of dollars in grants to local gun violence prevention and crime reduction programs.
This is unacceptable. Americans deserve leaders focused on the safety of our kids and communities — not taking their orders from gun CEOs. My team and I are working to fight back at all levels, but we cannot do it alone.
**Will you rush in a donation before tomorrow’s mid-quarter deadline? Here’s your donation link one more time:**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords2025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250514-1-b&t=3&akid=10429%2E3935704%2Eg65euL)**
Thanks so much for your support.
— Gabby
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250514-1-b&t=4&akid=10429%2E3935704%2Eg65euL)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=10429%2E3935704%2Eg65euL) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Here’s your personal link to donate: Every month, my team and I set goals we need to hit to power our work at GIFFORDS. Fundraising this quarter has been slower than what anybody expected — but our work doesn’t stop. Just recently, Donald Trump cut $1 billion in school mental health resources. name: Steve Daines
subject: I’m getting worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Democrats are outraising Republicans across the country by wide margins. |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1494294ede3d477caad87838e81e3bf0&_e=7BsnJhbtpJoSOc1S53orQfvqPpGW0rZ0KBHzMO4lU3_hy5T4qiiRU2YM5RLemDh1ipvxo6q4GzJ06i_dD1YKiRHn-3cAPUDd_6EHiERVxnX2cog94CEqwh93-BRaPOATxgF7t20hNBim7c_BLWkWxcozLzbwqKeV3ge3JbbOLk-k62tYkK4HF1RtfNQnvzoHO0x7nIhdX5ERCh08-q14lxlVQEiLQP-Z_n8-XRYQ1fDtfsAI0ln4uDaE5hWzWxAinQJpZa4shIZX-yGTKTjlMNysSl6Jx3M7zpj783qMtZKs_ERd02v1TSgi9Zg_gvDEW4iYjUhKOzzZNr8EQ-fvbq9yUAu60egcg6UrEHffssN2qiyJoE8d6m_GxCgJ2wPayfX_gNYiKAoY_OhrFodFKEpiiDpVzk8WHHkzxt0RBoHFlzKs3ZZXXMN1-nQidhHORf4aEzEVwoPghejnXHvba8tdgXH-gXcV-xNCTZK3EhyOg1Jb6je9cKjnmETFUCBpGeKlQYhdzMsJu5i97h9f_LPjDBlaDHft_41K3rRWIeHlAvcJJqC-ELDSRXWNMdiCoW3jvCvJNSArAu9HK9xloZO-ExnbFp3UQ_D9VX6cOnhWruH5lIX4OdF9yLa3ISfIt3eAjiY7n9U-D-n3uJpcXVGMGkWm-o5C0-1wNJO-Hw3NlWJpHPlotNIn-t31UInBuxoE_RNkXDc5TqKQBrBjy3WxjpNI5xE6nbz0UW6htTRIvUP962gcO_s0el74RtI8) Fellow American, I don’t like what I’m seeing for two reasons:

**FIRST** -- Democrats are outraising Republicans across the country by wide margins.
**SECOND** -- Democrats have flipped several Republican seats in several of the first special and mayoral elections since President Trump’s re-election.

This is a warning shot Fellow American. Democrats aren't waiting around for 2026. They’re organizing now, and they’re getting results. Fellow activist,[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKRwn28ZY4tKCmbCbww2329YzY8FAwACqxV5FO8GlMPJfWp2zV08gjytsll2BGS-2FaQCjqLHOpgHggpLXBjLJ8GKyE-3D18AL_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYMACjzzYSqq2LdnbPogpLJz2pkqbxvcWwe0cyUzN-2FwfM0fhRo-2Blt1h-2BQixwGDjYaowXVf-2FeZgsu9Nwrypiof32UJkwvTciYUSCRx1zuSXMd-2F9ISRlo0Q0p5nS2YmQ65W9v8K0TwnEKskUGVRNzoSDSk46O1wPGPjIEgozl4AhtzWpAsjvRDQgYnYz5c8uRBTD) Pennsylvania is the next major battleground state as the state Supreme Court retention elections are starting to heat up.

As a reminder, three PA Supreme Court justices (elected as Democrats) are seeking to retain their seats. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. The GOP party chair and state senator, Greg Rothman, has said, **the judicial races on the ballot are the top priority for the Republican party. **

**This goes beyond 2025:** As _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ reported, GOP activist Scott Presler’s organization put in campaign literature, _**“We could create a Republican majority (5R-2D) in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court before the next presidential election in 2028.”**_

**URGENT: In light of this news, a generous angel donor has agreed to extend their match of all donations up to $50,000. We fell short of reaching that goal in April –**[**we are going to need all hands on deck to make up that difference and prepare for the fight ahead. Will you rush a doubled donation now to support our critical voter education and mobilization work ahead of this year’s judicial elections?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR1iOrq3JNR-2B0OLa222t4EM0WokyQvqphRbMxnapke03RzpTg2-2FjHJfpgSlrrvi96vHNM2ye251gewhzHw77fYgs-3DReTY_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYMACjzzYSqq2LdnbPogpLJz2pkqbxvcWwe0cyUzN-2FwfOULGnWtB2oI-2Bg-2BHoEDuWJuwVStOTpblonlyKt5nTbrxlX9n5TPs37hUKg0Z8px-2BNvej3LfjDdMKE1FRlKI20-2FmIuq2m0kiMxNWR14Hc6VQWCO3oupGNkRocG7U8QDbsqI8cQk-2F47Gk8liu1g9vtd-2FY)

As our CEO, Kadida Kenner, stated to _WHYY News_ , **having a MAGA Majority on the court would lead to voter suppression.** Republicans are trying to make the decisions coming out of our courts more political – from reproductive rights to the political and racial gerrymandering of congressional districts. **The stakes have never been higher. **

Democracy defending justices on the PA Supreme Court have drastically impacted the lives of Pennsylvanians – protecting our voting rights by eliminating gerrymandered Congressional maps and ensuring equitably funded public schools. Now, it’s up to us to protect our majority and fend off hyper-partisans who want to make our courts just another tool for their MAGA agenda.
**[All eyes are going to be on PA this year, and we need to get to work NOW to ensure voters are informed about what’s at stake. Please rush a donation now and have TWICE the impact.](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR1iOrq3JNR-2B0OLa222t4EM0WokyQvqphRbMxnapke03R0pp6bap7FRHtuLaGrg7Tcw-2FoMSQTWf5x1srSLV8NzCs-3Dj3Sd_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYMACjzzYSqq2LdnbPogpLJz2pkqbxvcWwe0cyUzN-2FwfMDvLcqojx4OiOcF-2BfIRtWdi5RRAZ6rXPjMfUmlyFf2pfroOFiO4foGthkcNe252oiuFaHfmWAhR7Qyt7HWKPB6iGs6lT5nM1k0MiLt-2BrzI9HKa0s3HqCKO6TgAVlpHXucpeAXAv1naYbdGdpnOdJVM)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Pennsylvania is the next major battleground state as the state Supreme Court retention elections are starting to heat up. As a reminder, three PA Supreme Court justices (elected as Democrats) are seeking to retain their seats. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. The GOP party chair and state senator, Greg Rothman, has said, the judicial races on the ballot are the top priority for the Republican party. This goes beyond 2025: As The Philadelphia Inquirer reported, GOP activist Scott Presler’s organization put in campaign literature, “We could create a Republican majority (5R-2D) in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court before the next presidential election in 2028.” URGENT: In light of this news, a generous angel donor has agreed to extend their match of all donations up to $50,000. We fell short of reaching that goal in April – As our CEO, Kadida Kenner, stated to WHYY News , having a MAGA Majority on the court would lead to voter suppression. Republicans are trying to make the decisions coming out of our courts more political – from reproductive rights to the political and racial gerrymandering of congressional districts. The stakes have never been higher. Democracy defending justices on the PA Supreme Court have drastically impacted the lives of Pennsylvanians – protecting our voting rights by eliminating gerrymandered Congressional maps and ensuring equitably funded public schools. Now, it’s up to us to protect our majority and fend off hyper-partisans who want to make our courts just another tool for their MAGA agenda. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In this together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. name: Trump Polling (via Team Elise)
subject: 🟢 LIVE POLL 🟢
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Do you approve of President Trump?
| Peter,
---
You can’t make this up...
---
**Democrats are attacking President Trump after a poll showed that 44% of Americans currently approve of his job performance.**
---
They’re citing that poll to attack him claiming he’s lost the support of the American people, and some Democrats are even using it to support their calls for his impeachment!
---
_Yet at the same time, the polls show their own approval is much, much lower. Just**27%** of Americans approve of the Democrat party! _
---
And of course, we can’t trust that 44% number...
---
_Time and time again, the mainstream media’s polls have dramatically underestimated President Trump’s support among Americans._
---
But of course, these liberal pollsters can’t be trusted to accurately reflect the opinion of the American people.
---
That is why we’ve commissioned the [**Official Trump Approval Poll**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=40854793910a443cac139d5336c86422&_e=yuCAAduwDI-D6czTAzdr7hcPsZ4K9pyryv0mM7saXukP5eD8qPpxBD72UmW39eRmp38zhEOxqJEcHWlftIypr0TvHwNLIrEGBtf7G2bXfzljCjesG6UK8iOEO6kImO6CEDawlGMTzJPLHOLY4eg7xQbh2aiVM4MREckxJu8lDs-kCDC7NHIlaR6xhbMOUJMAInBltJXzWktxI0XrRxWU9q0Zx636trK2Ie6jvPxLY4XmsirrYvGoyhjfW-la7bGi5ZmCWM09KoZLjNdBZPDaV13XvC545DMHlAdVomjxsWrOUl9WWkABLVO9rsTcMe4cGXBS4wKxeTuiqpMp30Vz0wuT8F7BbLHTzoipYfGsuG9MMWNC_ln3ShU6NcIN7PbisHOcLJOy4NUfHP8Adc-eGqZ7_4LcNhrc4u4Zt2mfcK998tUJ2lenBOT91_HcDb_Zur3ueqKC3fRGyFbU9lEkHaOEHebNNQ5Drbv_bDtC4tdGCW56Ld4R00gV6AyTy6yU-BJaoQ8k5ch5UBWYRHURqY3JT6KfEZAIgC6WgUEUnXmfz70966fbE2N0CK7sNpXvflm10-1OdXjYujjVBjHj8CmvSjhLnX_23QgrhbiIxhjx25BhmX8RG7g1TN0Ayw0G) for the month of May so we can VERIFY that number with our _own_ polling data!
---

body:
The End Crypto Corruption Act is simple: no elected official should be engaging in a crypto scheme to enrich themselves and sell influence.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697429/545531508/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2E2YzBkYi1mOTMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmDUUblq2wMm0lYl0Fz5y3HxGe4HV2BK3FeDTyCEScM=&emci=480feff4-e530-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=33a6c0db-f930-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7731215)
---

| | When Donald Trump devised a pay-to-play dinner at the White House for the largest investors in his namesake cryptocurrency, he transformed the TRUMP meme coin into something far more dangerous: a golden ticket to curry favor with the sitting president. **Trump's crypto scheme is a blueprint for fraud.** By pushing digital assets tied to his name, he's enriching himself by selling access to the highest bidder. It's a neon sign for foreign influence and a national security threat. My End Crypto Corruption Act would immediately ban this digital bribery. The End Crypto Corruption Act is simple: no elected official should ever be engaging in any crypto scheme to enrich themselves and sell influence — like Trump is openly doing right now.
