clean_body: The End Crypto Corruption Act is simple: no elected official should be engaging in a crypto scheme to enrich themselves and sell influence. | | | | When Donald Trump devised a pay-to-play dinner at the White House for the largest investors in his namesake cryptocurrency, he transformed the TRUMP meme coin into something far more dangerous: a golden ticket to curry favor with the sitting president. Trump's crypto scheme is a blueprint for fraud. By pushing digital assets tied to his name, he's enriching himself by selling access to the highest bidder. It's a neon sign for foreign influence and a national security threat. My End Crypto Corruption Act would immediately ban this digital bribery. The End Crypto Corruption Act is simple: no elected official should ever be engaging in any crypto scheme to enrich themselves and sell influence — like Trump is openly doing right now. Access to the White House should never be auctioned to the highest bidder. Fellow Conservative, _this didn't take long._

Hours after I announced I'm running against Jon Ossoff for the U.S. Senate, Senate Democrats' political machine started attacking me.

_**They know that Jon Ossoff has left Georgians behind, and they're _TERRIFIED_ at the thought of him facing me next year.**_

Georgia voters stand with President Trump, and they deserve a Senator who will work WITH our president to get things done, not a liberal who wants him impeached.

**Fellow Conservative, this is just one of the reasons I am running to defeat AWOL Senator Jon Ossoff in the #1 Senate race in the country.**

I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across Georgia.

But I cannot do this alone. I'm a lawman and soldier, not a rich self-funder. And Jon Ossoff is **_already_** raising millions - **_he set a fundraising record_** in the first three months of 2025.

We don't need to outraise him to win, but we must have the resources to tell my story. **[I'm humbly asking you to send just a few dollars – $5, $10, or even $25 – to help us level the playing field and respond to these early attacks.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=324b35fb2a87406ca87fa88c1cffb200&_e=rkRUUzstsex1RhKL3W5OtIA8fgjN9qDOgIrTan9vRw9DJvP1_C6FNG9zhyR_MMq4Y61mMCyQ2mlvOOIKvtqJcpUTbcFfFpHRcAmMv84YcdW4FHmkcrikXd07jouGeu8UEAJMaNC7m44ymdx6papTHhJqGxXHz7SDDpjPFT4l-XgvSYHaLMbjpAlR0zqqSvbMkJ3LE1DgoZAZ89EP_L80NQdsrhG96m11N_6TUwWFlTK7-FY2xft8mZEDHNREKu6nepTF8TjVj8y1bYpJ9TenFqz4S9zxS55fnx-9OYTifeElXHKASUgB2XUNjGjNOlXeA8SheJYAFA0rHllsqUTRixnmh46GuJZhYkSOqCtJQ1r_YetGYzOXj4EyNs-KJuI_XcTum_ljzZpb1QvSVhbnZ4lwcqLoKcuajxX03Bz6mSLHnmknzXfXtTmrttHe5lKOIBWmzQEBvEV_7glgmHWlwApGRcomO9XU4OPliLf9ssehrt_lpbpb2fjzbaCk72EV_JBOPYyBND3OP5HvfKr_GejATGaLPZ0c6WTnLFyhvvOS6wxNZTTd1qHYFnQXz5Yfw3iFfzuwK_QgM49sMkhxldyvlPBREuVLYhzrPtdH08KA0e1GjcUG0xJm2xv7NogR-Tr_EmFcMfBeoLwZInZupHiyGO6-INE1MTH9V5ZGCnM6KdG5P_6PZRPSqADS2X8Km2D-M_gbSLx-U7-m9q0y66i-FGnbcjzmJNL0KsrWuuPnpg7Qs0Uu1JJWQg5p8SL0v19YoXQ8RuemEAX-UUEFuA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Democrats know that Jon Ossoff has left Georgians behind. | Fellow Conservative, this didn't take long. Hours after I announced I'm running against Jon Ossoff for the U.S. Senate, Senate Democrats' political machine started attacking me. They know that Jon Ossoff has left Georgians behind, and they're TERRIFIED at the thought of him facing me next year. Georgia voters stand with President Trump, and they deserve a Senator who will work WITH our president to get things done, not a liberal who wants him impeached. Fellow Conservative, this is just one of the reasons I am running to defeat AWOL Senator Jon Ossoff in the #1 Senate race in the country. I'm proud to support President Trump. I co-chaired his Georgia campaign in 2020, spoke at rallies in 2024, and turned out Latinos to support Republicans across Georgia. But I cannot do this alone. I'm a lawman and soldier, not a rich self-funder. And Jon Ossoff is already raising millions - he set a fundraising record in the first three months of 2025. We don't need to outraise him to win, but we must have the resources to tell my story. Let's fire Jon Ossoff, win this race, and send President Trump reinforcements in the Senate. Thank you, John King Major General (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He's running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump's agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or any Service Branch._

Patriot, The attempted takeover and temporary occupation of Columbia University's library by pro-Hamas forces is yet another example of how individuals with radical ideologies abuse the generous education visas that our government has long supplied to those wishing to study here in the United States. One witness to the encounter described to the New York Post how the events unfolded:
---
_**" Somebody hung up a flag, posters, stickers, people were scribbling on the walls, dancing on the tables, singing ... Chanting like, I don't know, 'Free Palestine,' the classics," said the young woman, who did not want to be identified." **_
---
Secretary Rubio is making it abundantly clear: We will not tolerate mob violence, civil unrest, or anti-Semitic protests, period. And if you're here in our country as a guest on a visa, we won't bat an eye over revoking your credentials and deporting you. As he said on X on May 8th, "We are reviewing the visa status of the trespassers and vandals who took over Columbia University's library. Pro-Hamas thugs are no longer welcome in our great nation." **This is common sense. ** I want to know if you agree. **_Should we arrest and deport all anti-American terrorism supporters who have slipped into our country? _** **[**Please take a quick survey to let me know where you stand.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=fe1dfa043d17492d83402127298977af&_e=72tiKxXWJEk8wWpg6jRAraWoaR224QUPVZZqDYWJoeYUTf-tvFb4CgKcm-EAszS5RdGZFN2z_HOaZcLC9fhaIEBKQtcOMjDxUIrxGrL2JX_-QUTiXKxpvmxegigRqA_QfwIiMLyxexvTlpP6IJ15HA2PToHr5zB6VLfHDhCf_uuuJfjqL2Wgu_lz5nrcYxVvRKWq6iKCeibmn5mZv06p3yYMixGfzt0zbdQT1tGyJS-QMQe3sBoPHqruXiC6QkCxItOLTN0NBcwvODO5CToLTd8PCAwbwJH2zzQpWIoXmWzDfi8nnfLWRjIg3CoCD_xcZNDcyvDV7vJNF9imGR6yusGZ0ev_HyKHgTNivDLiNHYQsn3TTscut4YLlJ82B_e_-iQ_yiQUn_gszOkM71cDROqz3w_3YoH0j05uFJhdpmmevSqFGW0qfYcPJxJqE1UATYCHbzh0UVEHY5CsEpjjU0Fw65LGvJ-ulXGgRs_rlm0wpXyylGvlz4HdWKnz-tF9pR9wriOwdklP4A5u84quPw49s4vHsJ4he-jSc_A28yosOj3ySoiDZb1BQRAWi9nNTNOKijT8vshTxWz_RAvpm2qhfDjbTZSsJQlNR4XjcLvfzzSq0coTwger67JRILFO1nk3CnW94yaqayEUA-7xf80YQveON1EWoKtDyAtTVDVN0gpBoPAP_nqh8DoexAFG9dGMaTBKSyoaJ1TsrJUoSQOI-DOJinud-Smrcy19V5wqlD3qEW4D_7PCnJviMG42KGhv-CSNFp-_hhrAlZqOYXW8pJrWm1TKkRvAAfRvVz9GC_sUyWEHbIaETd97fcCENO2nTg9l0wazw08SmQx0MQUKxL0btzTWL7FEL1AwOZvmmKwYghYxmavYsMquA1pWD_Dr6O-Ju85qfowdK4DcpgrEyaDdCTLUF-PJkiitROrYIHinvqe_VMUyExuDd3gYqyFJg9fqmGNxM9PSKSfJ9b2BwbxQn_f6IYgu_XcJzQ5cnrIfnkB70gVDwAzzmJ8oVxBi7cGyIXFwI6kmxElR9jKqiPxC7dsNCMQgWo3w9B9AUZ8Fc2oU58lNek1llG3Q-IvJALb-pT7kcsVJFaCJIU4eKu9465gsfozlNKtpJ34D3Cg0OZwrk0PUwczyO1o8ExZN5BJqw3U1w3-2DDVU95sBA77tqB-_MCJR97LsBuVAZWdQvcGTod56zz72zhAotZrPBGyjQmxPUTqtMuEhbwPb9KJj5BOj-J6jsPq5LyAzmGy0K2MM1HDRucHG8N4o)** With gratitude, Sen. clean_body: Agree or disagree: we need to revoke the visas of any guest here in the United States who has broken our laws in support of Hamas Agree or disagree: we need to revoke the visas of any guest here in the United States who has broken our laws in support of Hamas | | | | | Patriot, The attempted takeover and temporary occupation of Columbia University's library by pro-Hamas forces is yet another example of how individuals with radical ideologies abuse the generous education visas that our government has long supplied to those wishing to study here in the United States. One witness to the encounter described to the New York Post how the events unfolded: " Somebody hung up a flag, posters, stickers, people were scribbling on the walls, dancing on the tables, singing ... Chanting like, I don't know, 'Free Palestine,' the classics," said the young woman, who did not want to be identified." Secretary Rubio is making it abundantly clear: We will not tolerate mob violence, civil unrest, or anti-Semitic protests, period. And if you're here in our country as a guest on a visa, we won't bat an eye over revoking your credentials and deporting you. As he said on X on May 8th, "We are reviewing the visa status of the trespassers and vandals who took over Columbia University's library. Pro-Hamas thugs are no longer welcome in our great nation." This is common sense. I want to know if you agree. Should we arrest and deport all anti-American terrorism supporters who have slipped into our country? With gratitude, Sen. Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Trump's $400 Million Foreign Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697776/545532613/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk2NWZhYy1mYjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwMandMMmomI06bKqDaJwe01JS2wCI9bpNpkUUfvLt8=)
Friend,
The corruption never ends.
Donald Trump is reportedly poised to receive a $400 million luxury aircraft from the Qatari government—an opulent “gift” he wants to use as Air Force One and take with him after leaving office as part of his so-called “Presidential Library.”
Just weeks ago, Qatar also announced plans for a new Trump-branded golf course. But I’m sure that’s just a coincidence.
Let’s be clear: this is the kind of foreign entanglement our Constitution was written to prevent. Presidents are prohibited from accepting gifts from foreign governments unless approved by Congress. But once again, Trump and his enablers in Congress are willing to ignore the law and undermine our democracy for personal gain.
[This is crazy. Can I count on you to make a contribution today so we can fight back and get these lawless Republicans out of office? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697777/545532614/1693133497?refcode2=87965fac-fb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em051525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk2NWZhYy1mYjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwMandMMmomI06bKqDaJwe01JS2wCI9bpNpkUUfvLt8=)
Even beyond the corruption, this is a serious national security threat. A plane previously owned and under the influence of a foreign government should never be allowed to carry the President of the United States.
And yet, taxpayers could be forced to spend hundreds of millions of dollars retrofitting this aircraft to make it safe just so Trump can have a flying palace when he leaves office.
This isn’t just outrageous. It’s dangerous.
If we want to stop this kind of lawlessness, we need to take back the House and restore accountability in Washington. That’s why I’m asking:
[Can I count on you to chip in today and help us fight back? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697778/545532615/1693133497?refcode2=87965fac-fb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em051525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk2NWZhYy1mYjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwMandMMmomI06bKqDaJwe01JS2wCI9bpNpkUUfvLt8=)

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697779/545532616/1693133497?refcode2=87965fac-fb30-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em051525&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzk2NWZhYy1mYjMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qwMandMMmomI06bKqDaJwe01JS2wCI9bpNpkUUfvLt8=)

We cannot afford to let Trump and his allies keep putting their profits ahead of our country. Let’s end this insanity together.
Let’s go,
Robert

body:
I need you to understand what's at stake.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697941/545533273/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1870-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWFjOWVhMS1mYzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XACIi_EPL85g6N9EnuM3xkPyfSAFEtba5we5sfnKFM0=)

Peter, I'm sorry for the longer email, but right now, our nation is at a turning point – **and I need you to understand what's at stake.**
The Trump administration is working relentlessly to decimate our federal government and destroy Social Security – all to give billionaires a massive tax cut.
They think that they're above the law. They think that they can just rewrite the rules and skirt accountability. And they think that we'll just sit idly by while our government and our democracy are undermined.
**What they fail to realize is that****I’ve spent my career taking on bullies and holding the corrupt accountable – and with so much on the line, I refuse to stop now. But I can't do it alone, Peter.** **And right now, I'm still missing your support toward my critical $10,000 mid-month goal.**
**[Please, will you make your first donation today and help us stop Trump and his allies from upending our government and our very democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697942/545533274/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1870-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWFjOWVhMS1mYzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XACIi_EPL85g6N9EnuM3xkPyfSAFEtba5we5sfnKFM0=)**

As we face a crisis unfolding in real time, my office is fighting around the clock to put a stop to it – and with help from this team, our efforts are working.
When the federal government tried to freeze critical funding, we fought back and won.

When they attempted to slash medical research dollars that support New York’s top institutions, we stopped them.

And when unelected billionaire Elon Musk tried to access the sensitive data of millions of Americans, I stood firm to protect your privacy.
The results speak for themselves: We're on a winning streak. But if we're going to keep it up, your support is crucial.
We have until tomorrow night to reach this crucial $10,000 goal. So let’s send a message loud and clear: **We** _will not_**be ruled by billionaires. We** _will not_**let extremists strip away our freedom. And** _we will never_**stop fighting for democracy.[So I’m asking: Will you make your first donation today and join my fight to defend democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107697945/545533277/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1870-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWFjOWVhMS1mYzMwLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XACIi_EPL85g6N9EnuM3xkPyfSAFEtba5we5sfnKFM0=)**

Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life. It inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I am now back again this year as Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. as we celebrate the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps.

name: Ted Corcoran, All On The Line
subject: This never should have happened in the first place
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
As we celebrate, it’s important to remember that the fight for equal participation is far from over
|
---

**“The fact that this scheme got as far as it did is a red, flashing warning that our elections remain vulnerable to judicial sabotage in politicized courts.”**
_— Slate_
**“I hope we return to a time when those who lose elections concede defeat rather than trying to tear down the entire election system and erode voter confidence.”**
_— Karen Brinson Bell, former North Carolina State Elections Executive Director_
Hi Peter,
In November, North Carolinians re-elected Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. Now, more than six months later, her opponent has finally conceded after pulling lever after lever to try to overturn a free and fair election.
This was a hard-fought victory. As a North Carolinian, I was proud to mobilize with All On The Line and supporters like you to fight to uphold the will of the people.
The hard truth is, anti-democracy extremists have shown us that they are willing to do whatever it takes to win, even if it means effectively ending free and fair elections. This challenge — which threatened the legitimacy of over 65,000 legally cast ballots — should have never been allowed to move forward in the first place.
What happened in North Carolina serves as an example, demonstrating how partisan extremists are using the courts to threaten the very foundations of our democracy. **Let me be clear: Extremists failed in North Carolina. But we can count on them to replicate this playbook to try to steal elections nationwide:**
**“Regardless of the outcome, the unusual series of challenges from Judge Griffin, and the courts’ openness to entertaining them, may have paved the way for similar challenges in future close elections.”**
_— New York Times_
So as we celebrate this hard-earned win, it’s important to remember that the fight for equal participation is far from over. All On The Line is committed to working for a truly representative democracy where every eligible voter can make their voice heard.

clean_body: As we celebrate, it’s important to remember that the fight for equal participation is far from over | “The fact that this scheme got as far as it did is a red, flashing warning that our elections remain vulnerable to judicial sabotage in politicized courts.” — Slate “I hope we return to a time when those who lose elections concede defeat rather than trying to tear down the entire election system and erode voter confidence.” — Karen Brinson Bell, former North Carolina State Elections Executive Director Hi Peter, In November, North Carolinians re-elected Justice Allison Riggs to the state supreme court. Now, more than six months later, her opponent has finally conceded after pulling lever after lever to try to overturn a free and fair election. This was a hard-fought victory. As a North Carolinian, I was proud to mobilize with All On The Line and supporters like you to fight to uphold the will of the people. The hard truth is, anti-democracy extremists have shown us that they are willing to do whatever it takes to win, even if it means effectively ending free and fair elections. This challenge — which threatened the legitimacy of over 65,000 legally cast ballots — should have never been allowed to move forward in the first place. What happened in North Carolina serves as an example, demonstrating how partisan extremists are using the courts to threaten the very foundations of our democracy. Let me be clear: Extremists failed in North Carolina. But we can count on them to replicate this playbook to try to steal elections nationwide: “Regardless of the outcome, the unusual series of challenges from Judge Griffin, and the courts’ openness to entertaining them, may have paved the way for similar challenges in future close elections.” — New York Times So as we celebrate this hard-earned win, it’s important to remember that the fight for equal participation is far from over. All On The Line is committed to working for a truly representative democracy where every eligible voter can make their voice heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Ted Corcoran Deputy Director of Campaigns, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Ro Khanna
subject: BREAKING NEWS: I just introduced a bill to slash prescription drug costs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Bernie Sanders and I have been battling Big Pharma to slash prescription drug costs for years.
On Monday morning, President Trump took a significant step forward by signing an executive order to lower drug costs by 30 to 80 percent. The problem? An EO won’t cut it.
That’s why I just introduced the Global Fairness in Drug Pricing Act, a bill to codify President Trump’s executive order. Republicans in Congress have no excuse not to join me and deliver relief for Americans.
Sign if you agree: Trump must work with Congress to pass my Global Fairness in Drug Pricing Act. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/global-fairness-in-drug-pricing-act-petition?contactdata=y7nI3r2LRTxcAofl+MhxwHsyryNRgc+GYlRyxaK4Eg/MCPKrhnou8ky6W6NAsGXgkSuCQIRPul6JOCJjNfGPRzeANpyYzS5Doe7NvLHsrsLNEvpNcRYFJM/PX4TcPzuPInC5oGfYKVJjFKr/AoklLZtYCP5074SpnKjU0aw6+I3AOmf5JHWrkq8R/CxRGAFJ]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1921735423488823686 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1921735423488823686]
Americans pay more for their medications than any other country. Over 9 million Americans [https://www.cnn.com/2023/06/02/health/prescription-drug-costs-rationing/index.html#:~:text=Most%20adults%20between%20the%20ages,according%20to%20the%20CDC%20data.] tried to save money by skipping doses of their medications in 2021. Meanwhile, Big Pharma’s price gouging and lobbying efforts resulted in $38.7 billion [https://accountable.us/analysis-drug-companies-impacted-by-biden-rx-cost-saving-effort-boasted-of-38-7b-in-profits-in-2022/] in profits the following year.
This level of greed is obscene, and it must be stopped.
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/global-fairness-in-drug-pricing-act-petition?contactdata=y7nI3r2LRTxcAofl+MhxwHsyryNRgc+GYlRyxaK4Eg/MCPKrhnou8ky6W6NAsGXgkSuCQIRPul6JOCJjNfGPRzeANpyYzS5Doe7NvLHsrsLNEvpNcRYFJM/PX4TcPzuPInC5oGfYKVJjFKr/AoklLZtYCP5074SpnKjU0aw6+I3AOmf5JHWrkq8R/CxRGAFJ]
Trump’s executive order proves that both Democrats and Republicans support lowering the cost of prescription drugs. The only way we can effectively prevent Big Pharma from exploiting Americans is to legislate caps on prescription drug prices.
Tell Congress: Pass the Global Fairness in Drug Pricing Act. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/global-fairness-in-drug-pricing-act-petition?contactdata=y7nI3r2LRTxcAofl+MhxwHsyryNRgc+GYlRyxaK4Eg/MCPKrhnou8ky6W6NAsGXgkSuCQIRPul6JOCJjNfGPRzeANpyYzS5Doe7NvLHsrsLNEvpNcRYFJM/PX4TcPzuPInC5oGfYKVJjFKr/AoklLZtYCP5074SpnKjU0aw6+I3AOmf5JHWrkq8R/CxRGAFJ]
Life-saving medication doesn’t work if you can’t afford it. Democrats and Republicans should work together to end the affordability crisis so that all Americans can access the medications they need.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250514-global-fairness-in-drug-pricing-act&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250514-global-fairness-in-drug-pricing-act]

Ro for Congress

Santa Clara, CA 95051

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
at do-nothing Republicans
| | | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e22709575/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU1VYZ3A5UnR1TQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MTQ/LbmNsZEFEdUxqVw/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQnZ1NnpiQ0RXQlpscw/gaCT5Ow/s4m194443ef)
|
---
Friend,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC:**
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_.**
With urgency,
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
****

_[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e22709575/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MTQ/LbmNsZEFEdUxqVw/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQnZ1NnpiQ0RXQlpscw/gaCT5Ow/sbg2cc4eb15)_

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily.**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e22709575/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MTQ/LbmNsZEFEdUxqVw/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQnZ1NnpiQ0RXQlpscw/gaCT5Ow/sbg2cc4eb15)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: This fight is personal for Kentuckians, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Nearly 1.4 million Kentuckians rely on Medicaid. That’s nearly a third of our state, including half of our children.

Peter,

Right now in Washington some politicians are pushing for massive cuts to Medicaid in their effort to slash federal spending. They’ll call it “balancing the budget” or “reducing the deficit,” but the truth is that their budget will increase the deficit while taking healthcare away from Americans.

Here in Kentucky, we know exactly what it would mean — **closed hospitals, lost jobs, and families without the care they need.** This isn’t about politics; it’s about people. And it’s about Kentucky. Nearly 1.4 million Kentuckians rely on Medicaid. That’s nearly a third of our state, _including half of our children_.

These are our neighbors, our co-workers, our parents and grandparents. These are kids who need speech therapy after school. Families managing the challenges of caring for a child with special needs. Seniors in rural counties who count on their local hospital to be there in an emergency. In too many places across Kentucky, that hospital isn’t just a building where people get care — _it’s the lifeline of the entire community_.

When you cut Medicaid, you aren’t just taking healthcare away from folks — you’re taking away paychecks, shuttering hospitals, and forcing families to drive hours just to see a doctor. And in small towns, that can mean the difference between life and death. When I travel across our Commonwealth I meet people whose lives have been changed, even saved, by Medicaid.

Republicans in Congress are refusing to acknowledge what these cuts would mean for the American people. That’s why I’m making sure to speak up about the impact these cuts would have. Because let’s be honest: gutting Medicaid isn’t just reckless — **it’s an attack on rural America**.

**[I’m asking you to speak up, too. Will you add your name to my petition and stand with me by telling Congress: hands off Kentucky’s Medicaid?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107699179/545538097/-1939098604?ms=em25_250514_medcut_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&&&&refcode=em25_250514_medcut_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&&&&source=em25_250514_medcut_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250514_medcut_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&contactdata=a4sD7mPOr6n2s0WVbETtigs+/sQ5evhLgxwjPl3PuiLVMeI80Y/xTG24KstCSTo4yEKHf3ZvghiMk0XZsszz/d+bK2eq4yAIWUvnsie7HLdYm2F7/69ZueXhtq4JPrvkXpcab8hcH+ZKNLxuxmBV4WLxf0HNqQwbfoGky0nArrqzc4qTwFrORl0W7lDILMST&&&&refcode2=c6230f45-0031-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzYyMzBmNDUtMDAzMS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=27DiTf-nqeVuRQCByW70f8Vm9s5qWvGD_XTqSQWrEgo=&emci=5f17b0a0-e030-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c6230f45-0031-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17458827)**

### **Cliff 's Note: The Zelenskyy Checkmate:** **The Crisis That Revealed a Titan**
Some leaders are made by the moment. Most, as we've sadly learned, whine about dishwashers, flush toilets or windmills giving them cancer [while taking Qatari bribes](https://substack.com/redirect/00bbdc39-84fc-47ce-935d-f7632f4ad06c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They make a run for Cancun with a pot belly and a dream while their constituents are freezing to death because of their party's corruption. Or run down the halls of Congress wetting their khakis, like an animated milksop mannequin, when an insurrection they started looks like it may smudge their pressed-Oxford-Blue shirt.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c9467af-e265-446b-b34d-8affd2e5637e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Volodymyr Zelenskyy --former comedian turned full-throttle wartime president--isn't just meeting the moment; he's defining it**. Like Lincoln, who walked into office with a nation divided, Zelenskyy didn't ask for war--but when Boris Badenov gave it to him, Zelenskyy answered the clarion call for fortitude with red, hot steel.
No, it wasn't Trump promising infrastructure week: Part #432. Or Nancy Mace out hunting for her next election-whoring episode of trans demagoguery. Zelenskyy has displayed what greatness forged in unique, existential crisis looks like: clarity, courage and a command of messaging and warmth that has left most so-called leaders around the world looking like marionettes in a Sicilian Opera dei Pupi in comparison.
Meanwhile, he is the rare politician who doesn't just say "freedom," then hide and allow it to becomes Janis Joplin's definition of "nothing left to lose." He _embodies_ it--lives it every damn day--with a Ukrainian flag draped over his shoulders, a target on his back and a combination of humility & courage not evident in 98.979% of the GOP, as its clown-fish President cleans Putin's teeth. Zelenskyy's "freedom" is simple. The opposite Joplin's:**It 's another word for **_**everything left to win.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6220f751-45b9-401a-9fe6-7ef514ca60b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: I just want to make my mom proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
You may or may not remember how close the 2008 Minnesota Senate race was, but here are a few reasons why you should know. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6hhP2yQa2L1QHRqNGglbOLWqWuusK_zNHnvb30ck8PLntR-EVlfNit1lpLJ71D7E8NwZ97mdgWUJ5K-dyjejiKFAdbwZR3-h4oIqWZ5fe5RpMqjjxJhxJX6lcfkJWJ6Smr7tJsswcXSKRNRoSpLjE3o%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and _**I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan.**_ I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, **is politically more radical than the former VP nominee**.
**_
_**_People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020._**_While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination._**

The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6sC4LIH2NqTJMxBGd-8kkvReIfYFT7x-E47PjifbGvrSpwaDN_l3ZBGMwuHsvWSsu7XWMk3S1NbahEJ3N_eHcy1mqaRWCeDUzw12PdxGE_g8TdUegHc8O9hbJ3yaUtJhlRNt4lFHq02iJJ3iT5PvTEQ%3D)

As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz.

I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;**I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life.**

I never imagined that I would run for high office, but _**everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies.**_ I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate.

**Something had to be done. **

With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state.

This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. _**And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield.**_

**[You don’t know me, and you have no real reason to make a financial contribution to my Senate campaign other than that I’m humbly asking you to do so.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6kCpahReTavy0mGLb-0WA4LKsrQAcEhLnJC7mHq6OJmjZr76xK8O-At2zuYr_QNHA8xHtrafhfe2AIE4BTw1o3WRgEWe2uVlK6u4bgmCpbmyuvvfmPBHff1SF9C2P_CtIcOXmPpBx2cLjB-PA1LfLDw%3D)**

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND WITH A GIFT OF $5 OR MORE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6oHJqUzV1-6fGSVAnDtQHN-dBpFSW7i3Nqwt7dl2kLB4awkwlr0YqMd2rkVYeucPOMSod9Tvt_EjjB3W_Q2GAdVHeQOySA8PsLgz11KTJ3Uzyr82L5YBb9vXIwdLCx0wp3xbKnIYce_9DQ_AH-3QydI%3D)
_**I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms.**_

Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6v8Bb34bvhQ_nvdbj5nNb-uYKzEYox95Bj1JN1RdfodZEUlKGkm0-73LT8Iy19is4y_d0PR-gcyeIhzRfm2wEkAT-CwDqDKqm4Js17v-zSbHnMEwgZQ2sPrqTnfMaro-TbNgCweyrxgyYF_WvExKHtI%3D)

Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values.

I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree.

[**CHIP IN TO SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6658c3f70e740edb971c143887708c9&_e=UUfwBlWc0N7AUlNOi3LZq-eGU9lafAZ9TxbcLzQ5LOmZnpsuNXf3fQBoAVYnH4ZB_I-bKmD0SU44XmzUWpjyjmXojRqta54mXutBuAw93iBdcGydOMhPlT8mEcg4EFdKg-KhfFqNHgLKqNbBZOyMAptCyhOk8yZBu73wgiVA7pySEu96AAL8VZu42tM41E8SApyNebWqcHuA0dGlgLH5Sq300BHfmsxVGTbPjxX6o2COwhjIH8eAUD50RYH2zDxa4yNNPGks9Kv9JtF6ZIVm6kkkREbiQbaNdGeSmoO0Ayx2rUKKq_NEmAkOuv6oYs1TlMII3-Jjt7wmEACV93xYFi97zb4061SruqcxqoHyG9hMB7HjwZqTQ9EE-4QMUlAUFLcRL6RwsXjhUs7E9dsihJDwIqBX0wgubwdMDQhojkw%3D)
So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod.

clean_body: You may or may not remember how close the 2008 Minnesota Senate race was, but here are a few reasons why you should know. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps vet, avid hockey player, and lifelong Minnesotan. I know it’s early in the 2026 election cycle and you may not be paying attention to races in their infancy, like mine, still, I’m reaching out to you today to tell you a little about myself, who I am, and to make my case to earn your support in the upcoming battle I’m currently running headfirst into. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, if you can believe it, is politically more radical than the former VP nominee. People like the lieutenant governor were leading the violent unrest in Minneapolis in the summer of 2020.While the governor, whom the nation embarrassingly became acquainted with, eventually called for law and order in the street; his lieutenant governor was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police Department for discrimination. The Minnesota I grew up in was far away from the world these two government officials call home. As the son of two working-class parents, I have nothing in common with either my opponent or her boss, former VP candidate and Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. I grew up playing hockey and joined the military on my 18th birthday in October 2001, less than two months after the horrific attack on New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington, D.C. Unlike Governor Walz, I was proud to deploy to over 70 countries in service to our nation;I didn’t retire before being shipped out to serve our nation in war. I’ve willingly put myself into harm’s way more times than I can count in order to protect the American people, our shared conservative values, and our democratic way of life. I never imagined that I would run for high office, but everytime I came home from deployment things in Minnesota and the country seemed to have gotten worse because of the radical left policies. I’m doing this because of the state of our current leadership. Minnesota is currently being led by two radical Democrats who have done their best to push this state as far left as anyone could tolerate. Something had to be done. With Sen. Tina Smith’s recent retirement announcement, now is a time to leap into the unknown—something I’ve done and found very fulfilling. While Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential election since 1976, we’re not a deep blue state. This election isn’t going to be an easy one for a Republican to win, but throughout my life and career I have always defied the odds. And as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I excel in harsh environments - on and off the battlefield. I love our country, so on my 18th birthday in October 2001, I enlisted in the United States Marine Corps with a deep desire to serve my nation, make my parents proud, and defend freedoms. Twenty-four years later, I’m still looking to serve Minnesotans in service to our nation - that's why I'm running for the United States Senate. Since 2001, I’ve been deployed nine times to 70 countries to defend our shared conservative American values. I obtained a Master's degree from Harvard and a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins University in Security and Nuclear Deterrence. I also received my MBA degree. So when people tell me this will be one of the most challenging things I’ll ever endure, I smile and nod. The simple truth is that I believe that my purpose in this life is to serve others, and I’m just a regular guy from Minnesota who was asked to do extraordinary things who wants to make my mom proud, serve my country, and do good by the people I meet. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

I was raised by a single mother.
I learned to fight with my back against the wall with no way out but through.
So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless.
My mom _**never**_ taught me to hate my fellow Americans.
She always instilled in me the values of _hard work_ and _merit._
**If I told her I was a _victim_ like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke.**
**That’s the America I believe in**. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement.
But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous.
The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life.
Their hypocrisy _disgusts_ me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the _**[real problem](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c905407cf4a44e7096d3e0d9b837ebe1&_e=qCmFhSVpXCIj7XR_TSOOdjVNIt72DzSLVnhTOOokmyxJkKHlsoMIymlz1XXAnJuxX8KraboZdHiDBTKihcHTdMoLNLTgmf4cUKSaAj7ig4pvS8ecffjj5Y10Ll2Pyv8-dIVHfgezDBVk-dmXiczdQ3AtFGRLp9U4uERk1Iu4MnfS6HK6c7cNgEcOASYDz375QL-WUs72tO3pVGEqUMeu1dLGI3NjNyRcxzn8XAzZFy2W3Knjv6CkskNs99itSToO5osKZ8JfDYhIe1VNNPAirn6Ksv9Kewld9rH32r6l_e8eTPokb8NegkZUEJb7aIaXQemD2qLfO68GhPlbH9kMPTWLyN2AfKJ3vrRl6LVx-fDnsOrGAs4Vw_sKZ4X_3gHf5w_5eBRMrtCQoYJnaWlih1Jtt__mbyn3h5hn-pXmMybozWLJcquMX-GuLVbtlGv6CGp8IK8g7GnajekukbQ_92Xb2AJAQ0KnY3Z2f9DXmyCUjHeKh1fNl47AVq03dNcvukEi8gC6j2ZUMvFVlvUstv3qlDmK6nVwNYvzFRHYx-G5uHItLHCzo2OT8vFik-UxBbPfG4-Mdbm5Gx_iMF8pGCfq5s3qnbHV0YuT9PJSHTJIShwu9YfapCuArPl7K4PhQiADWt0WAQvelKhegEiwbnxbMfCU6nH0lyPq0DTCRgsD66KCSxRDfTpWtkXQsFa6ZdZn8MArQjY4XpkPwWOD9_z7NVvcNfOhWjLcctT3dMG3itHDjXeG-AHS5Z7u-TgL5j6hgBipAloxIU_PmgJvUPeoRKbwjdjru_KGhoWu72Q%3D)**_ that I can’t solve on my own.
Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. They’re prepared to spend **millions of dollars** to prop-up a Democrat that could flip MAGA’s hometurf **BLUE**.
I’m committed to being President Trump’s STRONGEST Governor ally in the nation. But I can’t do this alone.
_**[So before the day is over, can I count on your support to keep me in the fight?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c905407cf4a44e7096d3e0d9b837ebe1&_e=qCmFhSVpXCIj7XR_TSOOdjVNIt72DzSLVnhTOOokmyxJkKHlsoMIymlz1XXAnJuxX8KraboZdHiDBTKihcHTdMoLNLTgmf4cUKSaAj7ig4pvS8ecffjj5Y10Ll2Pyv8-dIVHfgezDBVk-dmXiczdQ3AtFGRLp9U4uERk1Iu4MnfS6HK6c7cNgEcOASYDz375QL-WUs72tO3pVGEqUMeu1dLGI3NjNyRcxzn8XAzZFy2W3Knjv6CkskNs99itSToO5osKZ8JfDYhIe1VNNPAirn6Ksv9Kewld9rH32r6l_e-9kX0qat1u8RFYZaDia7ehXKHDVRK3U9Pyi3R6wUUJJnoQyp8_iheRXkhzCgjEUv778vtMHM3yBQbQE03ux-uVCCeQszwFEt9zUyDev5TkBqNhSStEsxsRQ_PWslkTY_FvyZEe3SXgp-Kjbe8D_Mr71ZbafC9vX3-a2LR-nq1hJCiX2pO6nUSzfBF_j6J_dV62k4fhtHAvZfOjJtYAkFBL1kLdnrKnEdvKILCF0tvngyqtQnV6YZ2UieZAduS9gyVLbTiVY4z60Whhw_LzDwS-SBqGo-CFi69YNPnPLrYjtXIZqEYXAwdlrTnDeso7u2yOKCsHWYTMxEmzOBG0TqDDR2PdBFw1nLtrhz1sOEn_utBZ6NcJCnC9GgihatgM-Q3EuigBhtIwW45Paj0i-W7SpDYVA38WC5vk3gTYWg1Z9OuOkdla6zpuqrJQj8IqxWIIzZWYY3UelOqP7G-EqiCMnTvVzsl4_BdvmNDVqPLS61D9tGyBDkgv3sg__YCVswQ%3D)**_

So when the radical left Democrats get up in my face & call me a “race-traitor” after I applauded Trump for abolishing DEI, I’m left speechless. My mom never taught me to hate my fellow Americans. She always instilled in me the values of hard work and merit. If I told her I was a victim like someone in the Woke Mob, she’d probably just laugh like it’s some kind of joke. That’s the America I believe in. And that’s why I’m a MAGA Patriot who loves President Trump and the America First Movement. But after I stood with President Trump as he abolished DEI, the attacks against me have been horrendous. The race-obsessed left just sees me as another Black Man who should sit down, shut up, and vote blue for the rest of my life. Their hypocrisy disgusts me, and I can brush off most of their attacks, but here’s the that I can’t solve on my own. Right now I’m running for Governor in Florida, and truth be told the radical-left is dropping the hammer on me. name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: A final chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5I8ITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life. It inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I am now back again this year as Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. as we celebrate the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps.
---
[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5I9ITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK)
---
[**Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5IaITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK) The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year, but its significance is miles apart. _Every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for in our effort to honor those who sacrificed for our country._ **American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded**** _entirely_****by private citizens like you.** [**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5IbITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._ **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time.**
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5IcITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. [**Friend, thank you for your support of America 's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5IdITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK) Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[ **Support the American Veterans Center**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuemrwIteknop5IeITmaomuq3d&s=DGNBBEFAFJFPHPGK)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

We lose our ability to win the House majority to keep the Trump agenda in check. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Sonali Finance Director | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States

body:
| | |

| | Peter- Right now, Democratic Attorneys General are on the front lines of holding Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their MAGA cronies accountable.

And here in New England, we don’t take kindly to wannabe kings trying to take a sharpie to the U.S. Constitution - **that’s why this Friday, May 16th, I’m hosting a Town Hall in Boston with the Democratic AGs from across New England.**
---
[ Sign Up Here ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107700116/545540840/1030436454?aff=oddtdtcreator&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWM5NTUwZS0wMzMxLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZ6q3x2j36gPgOrdqftLuXgiemoRgfJzb1Wl_Bb-W5Y=&emci=3570950e-f730-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=61c9550e-0331-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17281370)

New England AGs are teaming up for this Town Hall to provide updates on the actions we’re taking to fight back against the unlawful actions of this administration, talk about the path forward, and most importantly, take your questions.

I’ve sued Donald Trump 17 times since he took office in January, and I can promise you this: Dem AGs are a force to be reckoned with**.** Now is the time to stand up and make clear that Massachusetts - and New England - are not backing down.

**[I hope you’ll join us this Friday, May 16th in Boston.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107700118/545540842/1030436454?aff=oddtdtcreator&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWM5NTUwZS0wMzMxLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZ6q3x2j36gPgOrdqftLuXgiemoRgfJzb1Wl_Bb-W5Y=&emci=3570950e-f730-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=61c9550e-0331-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17281370)**

**Andrea Joy Campbell**
Massachusetts Attorney General

name: Royce White
subject: The cowardice is profound
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I own it - they want me to fail... I won’t | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_e=dIZtouNuSE0g_w3BQ0mRsK8Mz906dyhGafvt0l6K9mzNkaG2RsGqN_GTHzXR0nUV3bH9bkQ0L26NlMu7AN3GxRTfKGzrjKHKmSDB4QovnqYPr0r97bRyO2sPfMk9tEt3yWiCttpAm29DB0uL48_ziQOXksGmc_j4LaPqltC7y21qLFO7x4aJgyG5Omr_4VfyjeKnsSZ7QFYiE2YM4ilfUbwUkgRJohn87c85SQ_7aIn1fh60yRbvqkNJl6gOlnT40oDvR47dJuHed0w8oEgqHeeHtIYlOAVJRzF0B20awGh_rVVz5RjnnkGldx3wC1bhh75p_UWowF8puU7zO-bjNg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

Sometimes when you are fighting for what’s right, you’ve gotta fight alone. They think I am alone - but I am doing this with the voices of people who have not been heard by the establishment.

They say I can’t win.

Why? Because a Republican hasn’t won statewide in Minnesota since 2009.
Why? Because only**14 Black Americans** have ever served in the United States Senate.
Why? Because I refuse to play the game their way.

The establishment... everyone thinks I can’t do this, but I am betting on you.

**The pressure is REAL NOW. I am betting on YOU.**

I am doing this because the people know I am genuine, and I am taking a shot at the permanent political class.

**This race is bigger than me.** It's about breaking the cycle of corruption, complacency, and career politicians who’ve forgotten the people they serve. It’s about proving that someone who tells the truth, no matter how uncomfortable — still has a fighting chance.

I’m not backed by lobbyists. I’m not favored by party elites. But I’m fueled by The People — and by the truth.

I need your help, though, because the establishment is waiting for me to fail. [**Can you pitch in $5, $20, or $40 to help me defeat the political class?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_e=dIZtouNuSE0g_w3BQ0mRsK8Mz906dyhGafvt0l6K9mzNkaG2RsGqN_GTHzXR0nUV3bH9bkQ0L26NlMu7AN3GxRTfKGzrjKHKmSDB4QovnqYPr0r97bRyO2sPfMk9tEt3yWiCttpAm29DB0uL48_ziQOXksGmc_j4LaPqltC7y21qLFO7x4aJgyG5Omr_4VfyxVvS1-QaxxtCN7NP8jOCeoo8PQl5xRPhyBPz7cK-yEVLpZadetX7Lgebk2jfu15Zjos_2wuBR5ppkfxP_IAv5biiYMbPoI34_bjHsnr9Hzrb1jcC2dYLxfP_r4YGW2SS0SLyg3Jnqq0nGOlpJhQDCA%3D%3D)

Godspeed,
Royce Alexander White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_e=dIZtouNuSE0g_w3BQ0mRsK8Mz906dyhGafvt0l6K9mzNkaG2RsGqN_GTHzXR0nUV3bH9bkQ0L26NlMu7AN3GxRTfKGzrjKHKmSDB4QovnqYPr0r97bRyO2sPfMk9tEt3yWiCttpAm29DB0uL48_ziQOXksGmc_j4LaPqltC7y21qLFO7x4aJgyG5Omr_4VfyldEUCOxGQtEbA2Q89XkI7UIofL5-Rsuw-f7oxaZ694zInORAXU6jzzoNehkn7Xy2LIuVKyTYbvrwuw1KkXoJaf6x_GSN2cJ8N3Nc8Sl9tB0VP4BqZvvzH8Ht4Q3sZKPequkpakylCIZL8M3_D_-jVQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_e=dIZtouNuSE0g_w3BQ0mRsK8Mz906dyhGafvt0l6K9mzNkaG2RsGqN_GTHzXR0nUV3bH9bkQ0L26NlMu7AN3GxRTfKGzrjKHKmSDB4QovnqYPr0r97bRyO2sPfMk9tEt3yWiCttpAm29DB0uL48_ziQOXksGmc_j4LaPqltC7y21qLFO7x4aJgyG5Omr_4VfyKJveNH6BlI3-_BnLl6o-jFL4YlDMeYZm4hfCZMRnYkVUz30yRe5JqiQdgqQ99TjSsczflzw9IYAD5NbYnSgsWS1rAogBRIs4cErdJgTpw8HdkY9Af6rBrfEoJx8Dxg5J5HZsOcKGvb9LvOQu16NXDw%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---
Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_s=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_t=uSPI6DHxAOz2SOpC_aXxZ4Sc-ZOXNYesaf9iwnlb3i4mjwFyUQkVa_LnKc7LMhaz81tDGS27weta4SQwctmEJYy_L--0J8JMGrxD-g0KCpjPRtPH2vVQf7CzXqDSoUD9)

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a7495130bde3496fb237e5a6e2b3dcc1&_e=dIZtouNuSE0g_w3BQ0mRsGv3s4K60jawFbj8ONTr75Q3a1mPzHu8lJNGkYQ5L68r2145l30xlALIS5QVavrgAkR_EYFz-eQ34caMoBh_PS3uTeTP3rmwcgbmXsHGyH4AEUfkvvS2lgDLBa8MDUdca6nM9AzKihNVR1dA9MFyy6g1YZdX3Yt8FvJvbJrE8vp3UjzW7Wx3U_ciw0QbDOlC490-JK1meR87Eo40u3wtftiWdxgGgCl6g3sXi5qhNtWd)

Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

|

We need your eyes on this, Peter.

National Republicans are hammering George with deceitful attacks in their effort to flip CA-27 back to red and solidify their MAGA majority.

---

**It’s clear George is one of the GOP’s top targets in 2026. As a first-term incumbent, and one of the only Democrats who flipped a Republican-held seat in November, he’s uniquely _vulnerable_ to these attacks.**

clean_body: ****** ************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************ ******** I just finished reviewing your previous survey submissions from 2024, and I have to say -- you really stood out. Your answers were always SPOT ON. It's clear you're a principled conservative who gets the stakes. But since we last heard from you, a lot has changed ... Despite winning back the White House, the fight is far from over. Kamala Harris and the Radical Democrats are already raising millions for their comeback in 2026. And the media? They're using that to try to crush our momentum before the midterms even begin! That's why we're opening the Republican Voter Sentiment Survey - to hear directly from grassroots leaders like YOU. ARE YOU STILL A REPUBLICAN? **** **** **** Thank you, Mary - Team GOP Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: AOC
subject: Use it or lose it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If anyone's breaking the law in this situation, it's not members of Congress.
#
ICE arrested an elected official on Friday.
And the Department of Homeland Security is allegedly looking into arresting members of Congress who were showing up to that same Newark ICE facility for their constitutional obligation to conduct oversight.
If anyone's breaking the law in this situation, it's not members of Congress — it's DHS. **It's people like Tom Homan and Secretary Kristi Noem**.
It is enshrined in the law that members of Congress who show up to ICE and CBP facilities are legally required to be granted access to conduct oversight.
So **if Kristi Noem wants to break the law, that's on her** — but it sure as hell is not someone like Representative Rob Menendez that needs to be arrested.
They think if you can arrest one mayor, then all the other mayors will stop enforcing our rights.
They think if you can make an example of one member of Congress, all 434 other ones will stand back.
**Hell no**.
Our rights are use it or lose it. Our responsibility right now is to use it.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250514.LEbW-p&refcode=em20250514-8854-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8854%2E2526796%2EweL15z)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250514.LEbW-p&refcode=em20250514-8854-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8854%2E2526796%2EweL15z)**
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250514?refcode=em20250514-8854-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8854_2526796_weL15z&akid=8854%2E2526796%2EweL15z)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250514-8854-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=22&akid=8854%2E2526796%2EweL15z)**

IF Donald Trump and his MAGA agenda go unchecked, it could mean MORE attacks on our health care, MORE corruption and MORE chaos. BUT IF Democrats around the country step up and help fund our massive Blue Battlegrounds Fund, we can start repairing the damage that Trump has caused and protect our fundamental rights. = | | = A blue Senate rests on winning battleground states like Georgia. Jon Ossoff is the only Senator up for reelection in a state that Trump won — so he’s a top GOP target. A GOP Super PAC already launched a seven-figure attack ad campaign against him. Democrats can expect millions in dark money from donors like Elon Musk, who know that defeating strong leaders like Ossoff will help them bolster the GOP’s disaster agenda. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s do this, Team Gillibrand * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem **[took off the gloves](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell during a confrontational hearing in which he grilled her on the gang member status of deported illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia.
**[She refused to play his ridiculous game...](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Swalwell first asked Noem about an image President Trump had posted to social media showing Abrego Garcia's hand with "MS-13" tattooed on his knuckles.
"Madam Secretary you agree that the letters 'MS' and the number '13' in Times Roman numeral font, that they are doctored on this photo right?" Swalwell asked.
Noem answered, **["Abrego Garcia was a known member of MS-13.](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** It wasn't based off tattoos, it was based of an entire case against him,..."
Swalwell interrupted Noem, demanding she answer just if the photo was doctored or not. "Madam Secretary I have a 7 year-old, a 6-year-old and a 3-year-old, I have a bullshit detector, I'm just asking you, is this doctored or not doctored?!!"
"I have no knowledge of that photo you're pointing to," Noem answered before punching back at Swalwell's set up. "Are you saying that Abrego Garcia is not a wife beater?! He's not a criminal? He's not a human trafficker? He's not a member of MS-13?! You are vouching for a man who is a known violent criminal, sir!"
Swalwell tried to interrupt, but she refused to let him, "He should have been deported, absolutely! **[And we will not be bringing him back!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch Noem put Swalwell in his place:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8561dc8d-747f-441c-b694-bdc9617276a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Democrat DELUSION: Jamie Raskin Blames TRUMP for "Defunding Police?!" Jim Jordan hits back
GOP Rep. Jim Jordan **[demolished Maryland Democrat Jamie Raskin](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for blaming Republicans for "defunding the police."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Raskin accused President Trump, Musk, and their DOGE team of budget cuts that will hurt local law enforcement and public safety, further accusing Republicans of hypocrisy.
"Don't give me that lecture about 'defunding the police' that our side has never supported!" Raskin said.
In his rebuttal, Jim Jordan immediately called out Raskin's blatant lie.
**["You can try to rewrite history, but it just doesn't work,"](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Jordan said.
Jordan brought up a hefty list, citing the billions of dollars Democrat cities slashed from law enforcement funds in the 'Summer of Love' in 2020 after the death of George Floyd.
**["Don't say you didn't defund the police. You did.](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Everyone knows you did, and you all talked about it and you cheered it on...The bad guys...you were raising money to bail them out! Your presidential candidate was raising money to bail them out! **[So you can have all the revisionist history you want. The facts are the facts](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ," **Jordan said.
Catch Jim Jordan put the HAMMER down on Democrat LIES here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/367aa7a0-9334-4715-9444-4313ae1be6f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"He should have absolutely been deported and we will not be brining him back!!" May 14 | | | | | | | | | | | Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem with Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell during a confrontational hearing in which he grilled her on the gang member status of deported illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia. Swalwell first asked Noem about an image President Trump had posted to social media showing Abrego Garcia's hand with "MS-13" tattooed on his knuckles. "Madam Secretary you agree that the letters 'MS' and the number '13' in Times Roman numeral font, that they are doctored on this photo right?" Swalwell asked. Noem answered, It wasn't based off tattoos, it was based of an entire case against him,..." Swalwell interrupted Noem, demanding she answer just if the photo was doctored or not. "Madam Secretary I have a 7 year-old, a 6-year-old and a 3-year-old, I have a bullshit detector, I'm just asking you, is this doctored or not doctored?!!" "I have no knowledge of that photo you're pointing to," Noem answered before punching back at Swalwell's set up. "Are you saying that Abrego Garcia is not a wife beater?! He's not a criminal? He's not a human trafficker? He's not a member of MS-13?! You are vouching for a man who is a known violent criminal, sir!" Swalwell tried to interrupt, but she refused to let him, "He should have been deported, absolutely! Watch Noem put Swalwell in his place: ATTN: Your prescription could change under RFK Jr. Here 's how. | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, RFK Jr. is hitting Big Pharma where it hurts--their bank accounts. FDA officials are already quitting, the drug companies could lose their ability to advertise... . 5 dangerous drugs use a little-known Big Pharma Loophole... But what happens if RFK Jr. closes that loophole for good? . P.S. This list of drugs could be the biggest blow yet against Big Pharma-- Democrat DELUSION: Jamie Raskin Blames TRUMP for "Defunding Police?!" Jim Jordan hits back GOP Rep. Jim Jordan for blaming Republicans for "defunding the police." Raskin accused President Trump, Musk, and their DOGE team of budget cuts that will hurt local law enforcement and public safety, further accusing Republicans of hypocrisy. "Don't give me that lecture about 'defunding the police' that our side has never supported!" Raskin said. In his rebuttal, Jim Jordan immediately called out Raskin's blatant lie. Jordan said. Jordan brought up a hefty list, citing the billions of dollars Democrat cities slashed from law enforcement funds in the 'Summer of Love' in 2020 after the death of George Floyd. Everyone knows you did, and you all talked about it and you cheered it on...The bad guys...you were raising money to bail them out! Your presidential candidate was raising money to bail them out! ," Jordan said. Derek,

Republicans in Congress just unveiled a plan that would cut funding for Medicaid—just to give a fiscally reckless tax handout to the ultra-wealthy.

Their plan would strip healthcare from 13.7 million Americans, including kids, seniors, and people with disabilities in Western Pennsylvania. It would force hospitals across the country to close and cause premiums to skyrocket.

_All while huge corporations and billionaires would reap the benefits._

**Derek, this is a fiscally reckless grift.**

I won’t stand by while Republicans in Congress cut funding for critical programs like Medicaid just to fund another handout for the ultra-wealthy that would leave us with trillions in debt.

I’m fighting to protect Medicaid from these cuts and for decent healthcare for every American.
**[_**If you’re with me in the fight to defend Medicaid, then I need you to take action today. Sign my petition to show Republicans that THOUSANDS of Americans across the country are against their fiscally reckless plan to cut Medicaid →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107701524/545545038/1289758886?refcode=email_051425_medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTMxNDE4My0wNjMxLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsiDw66V1HqhYabXWDmCG5Iz_zT-4uagppVCvr6_2qA=&emci=c0e12f79-0631-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c5314183-0631-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13185894)**

## A Third of Democrats Hope China Will Win Trade War With Trump – HotAir
What a depressing poll. The Heartland Institute's poll, done in conjunction with Rasmussen Reports, shows us a couple of things we wish we could unsee. First, that a third of Democrats want the US to lose its trade war with China, and another third aren't sure whether they want the US or China to [...] [Read more](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/KzebZ1WDg8b88ouH8M_wh3onq0fJCYl6yGUYsLbn-JfusLn4qPshOuwl8_CyX1JHw8dDhd_9vECaw8XSkgclxszHc2_tNqBdjRlSR5L7kknFu8A1laIVOTlvKjTkeuS2DlPvnsbbx5wZlvVxDki9_2Jo1WIELtNd94U7wssgxKKdEUJ6IdLmfC4AYsHKXZ-8HNclk-VN7sz83HNLiHf7a3xNl7HgAbkr52fij617RzcImpTTIuJNEF1q1fs4ujNw6T5NwstGR5cL1rg0lwGsABn90kKQRCRcqyE5q4eM-vmZsF7hSsJQIvI_CrXYwmJfvsdExMZglPu8S362MB8QDqP7pw23uTzh4UHpSy4u3-gc60E2bJNYblr6PyLk6n3glMtdpFJS9O_UYxrn7C0baJwztOAIgswskR13CyW-995NiXmV1J7jG2cvoWTNS3_23nTAbMXCwDPIo_O_KIS7Y6ollyfcAhhj5BXGoPQQ5cELFOeERLRByh48spiwqX67nER-QBMzXzo4Bimw3qAXtGlf2wChRfaBr1sxQEg_NAnv/uOnxLTxV4GVjZ-5Q4Wa1IdrfCrfYZfbg/8)

## On Second Thought, We Can’t Afford Free Medical Coverage For Illegals – HotAir
Second thoughts, eh? They're very useful ... when pandering politicians sense that the winds have changed. And they are all the more remarkable when first thoughts should have sufficed to deduce the obvious.
