Did you know...

**960,000 Americans will fall victim to a clogged circulatory system this year?
**
...All due to rancid cholesterol clogging their artery walls, restricting blood flow to their hearts, brains and vital organs... with the power to turn a living, breathing human being into a fading memory for their family... and a mere statistic.

But thanks to this nutrient, this once-savage killer is now as harmless as a teaspoon of sugar.

Which means all 75,000 miles of arteries, veins, capillaries and microscopic arterioles found in the human body are now rejuvenated — thanks to its effects...

...allowing nutrient-rich blood cells to reach every organ in the body!

Which means...
* Organs from eyes to ears and hearts and lungs can function normally
* Better memory and recall for continued learning
* Creaky joints soothed and comforted
* Vibrant new energy to do the things you love
* A deeper and more restful sleep
* And much, much more!

While Trump is driving people apart through his attacks on vulnerable

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250514.MHe-2N&refcode=ema20250514-240114&t=1001&akid=240114%2E444211%2EHEksDu ]If you can, will you donate $3 to help keep Beto on the

At our town halls, we don't check for party affiliation. Unlike

subject: We’ve got to get healthier
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
I wouldn't be a Hall-of-Fame college football coach if I let my players get out of shape
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=55e4651d3031409ab354fcdb5bb4b9cd&_e=7gZmW6Y7Nz2_Mwv8XNFKfa-UHUbslB7gxEZSzNtRtYeaF3KRTjPoaPLNPb2Jh1SIMzfZw_QuTMB3J9UqRfyNa6udKNgTMqq8K5YJFDrn0Be5Xp2i4RICno4nnv1206lPX8MbAS583c9wqSrgwMY2WsdgPgC7lP4F4x3XQtvjKsON-v7EUeH6AvPdYd955R54pmKzwY1xH4OCwLeJQ_P-e1qGYH6YmsU5MF8XEd7SfH1p1WlWsHIDdkGqiIu-HMNGkjOw1NEGXnQwcGduBGMvy7VLD2RxJEOnIwhHIX6MieP_fI9jnGYU0ZjnwUz8WKz-r7V2--kUGxcJJUnTJhRTbIIe3ILGTFwUW5f0zkL9vTzbAaEdDqOMOzCV3JK4m5LHhhMMMrhazka4FmHkFNCk0zYIK7L6vHZGRPQPzDsmOSW4JRcHseyXDXGli-pdQfGpdZx6tFits1VcLFDk49hpJn_fJU5IVYxUchOjlRLGdRmlLQxQBRVAzvIV3pZtfoyHbbyFVgwC-MdPu7rCBnCMnBcei8cKei3PLo88gsP3gQFF5bQ_-iQXoI3nsMWwLj6j)
---

Peter,

Before I became a United States Senator, I was a Hall-of-Fame college football coach. I've helped lead the Miami Hurricanes to multiple national championships before becoming the head coach at Auburn and creating a dynasty that ran the SEC for nearly 10 years.

**I could never have accomplished that if I let my players get out of shape and live an unhealthy lifestyle.**

Now, as a U.S. Senator, I feel as if I'm America's coach. And I see a nationwide problem that will lead us to loss after loss - America is overweight, riddled with chronic diseases, and most Americans have to depend on medication after medication to get through their daily tasks.

_This isn 't a winning playbook._

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=55e4651d3031409ab354fcdb5bb4b9cd&_e=7gZmW6Y7Nz2_Mwv8XNFKfa-UHUbslB7gxEZSzNtRtYeaF3KRTjPoaPLNPb2Jh1SIMzfZw_QuTMB3J9UqRfyNa6udKNgTMqq8K5YJFDrn0Be5Xp2i4RICno4nnv1206lPX8MbAS583c9wqSrgwMY2WsdgPgC7lP4F4x3XQtvjKsON-v7EUeH6AvPdYd955R54VxqYpzzC6sLj9_a8HteztDA-C4ayh6oZ3fNJehzEpffnJU3kgEn4BD7hluEkGYIJ4kMyqfv20AmKlWtGiJmQPlrdi0G-_u_-URTPTy2ECKx7mP5Km68yLFbN486yNurL9SkhQ26XiyN9YlmwuJgjSwL1q6RQ5a6ay3887i8QsZwGGHJlEopjbP7LxIzSWzEDALgxsafJKac8oDn-YrQXnl5Msz0Ht3iMBrTA6WkNjso-oJ_nzT6aDAf49NoYyLpsgkpp8htlQCFI-y_WNBnDQDAi3JgRmAbS-3ZcXAeV5cXLCi1bK8d2m1EQVoXKq68dND_aaXDQYqa0gRtf63rC74ZmTdZMRQknDyqyLwgN12Ss_smAx8ZVMjRQ3mgXPkfG)
**I 've recruited Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to help me turn America into a winning program, just like I did at Miami and Auburn.**

Together, we're determined to ensure our food's ingredients are healthy and natural, that vaccines are safe for everyone, and to help every American find a better lifestyle so they can grow old enough to hold their grandchildren.

This isn't something we'll solve overnight. Building a lasting winning program takes years to accomplish.

_**But I 'm up for re-election in 2026, and the Democrats are throwing everything my way to defeat me. If I lose, America will go right back on track to becoming more unhealthy.**_

[**Could you chip in just $10 before my midnight deadline to help me and RFK Jr. Make America Healthy Again?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=55e4651d3031409ab354fcdb5bb4b9cd&_e=7gZmW6Y7Nz2_Mwv8XNFKfa-UHUbslB7gxEZSzNtRtYeaF3KRTjPoaPLNPb2Jh1SIMzfZw_QuTMB3J9UqRfyNa6udKNgTMqq8K5YJFDrn0Be5Xp2i4RICno4nnv1206lPX8MbAS583c9wqSrgwMY2WsdgPgC7lP4F4x3XQtvjKsON-v7EUeH6AvPdYd955R54yr29WE5fEDCZPoUAW287HwVzvRTfbp8CvXlyU4nSiDCJW0ou4rjRWhAzL_xf5Ei3Ywo9lP05uWne0AdwR19lQwEKl5zVAq_VVs4q2O8tgf8M__JcWaOC9jk7hgdIKBp67QkxIisEgYwxR4_qzfbI2_RTWS6OmhHe03wwnABfcpK2_G2aplPO4CDu6fhkqVJysKIIjw9Qn9F53zUXOgevnJdaVNEKs4UQKOXxqV_V6WUBhTa-0INWJztL46mpsTBIsTzoyq9DNLBQOfnyPD8VProX3LlzoYLiEG3o7pOJsJI_nse_4YunTjki1zecHKBgovpC5zI6wVNdtRibLH-MVO-IMnjwpurPTBtA5XeQh26PXMvPKnmwJ8PAkpOHBF6k)

Coach Tuberville

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=55e4651d3031409ab354fcdb5bb4b9cd&_e=7gZmW6Y7Nz2_Mwv8XNFKfa-UHUbslB7gxEZSzNtRtYeaF3KRTjPoaPLNPb2Jh1SIMzfZw_QuTMB3J9UqRfyNa6udKNgTMqq8K5YJFDrn0Be5Xp2i4RICno4nnv1206lPX8MbAS583c9wqSrgwMY2WsdgPgC7lP4F4x3XQtvjKsON-v7EUeH6AvPdYd955R54UpBGEl0Y792kKpLMjlvksJL9booPXu0xZhFUd452pcLMjlgXGpWKTlyl1SMvBOh5HyvbNCzkZNdYS4Kfe_ERN9iMzzRHHKGjWXdrzXWEZHMujZmb7iXfGjyz3VC32sBDu05Rr0xzT_YLpEkvjwl4pXmracIWve1ZacSn3tFC9EsPIVETxlujH6P7RTO_ZZkbv5IgZ-FmHRhsGIhTZIbfyzbiPNT1ni1aXzOjLMDgz5ZJD42A7IgslE7lLAa2xDZhmG61ciKR5lTgU_50kEt9FaYzFuoh7VZCQ5RouLXYVduTRLbjN4l5aQVLPybtP46mFCahwwoRLW2GZfZgT9bhs7h_RKh-imPf5cUNL6kHyZfy8sOZq5ABS4Xx6FzDbHi8)

clean_body: I wouldn't be a Hall-of-Fame college football coach if I let my players get out of shape | Peter, Before I became a United States Senator, I was a Hall-of-Fame college football coach. I've helped lead the Miami Hurricanes to multiple national championships before becoming the head coach at Auburn and creating a dynasty that ran the SEC for nearly 10 years. I could never have accomplished that if I let my players get out of shape and live an unhealthy lifestyle. Now, as a U.S. Senator, I feel as if I'm America's coach. And I see a nationwide problem that will lead us to loss after loss - America is overweight, riddled with chronic diseases, and most Americans have to depend on medication after medication to get through their daily tasks. This isn 't a winning playbook. I 've recruited Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to help me turn America into a winning program, just like I did at Miami and Auburn. Together, we're determined to ensure our food's ingredients are healthy and natural, that vaccines are safe for everyone, and to help every American find a better lifestyle so they can grow old enough to hold their grandchildren. This isn't something we'll solve overnight. Building a lasting winning program takes years to accomplish. But I 'm up for re-election in 2026, and the Democrats are throwing everything my way to defeat me. If I lose, America will go right back on track to becoming more unhealthy. name: Kate Beeken (via Democrats.org)
subject: Breaking: Democrat Wins Omaha’s Mayoral Election, Defeating the Longest-Serving GOP Mayor in the Country
body:
---
Derek, Last night, Democrat John W. Ewing won Omaha’s mayoral election, defeating long-serving Republican incumbent Jean Stothert and becoming the first Black mayor of Omaha. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250514_3444_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3444_22930333_8FmPuH&akid=3444%2E22930333%2E8FmPuH) This win was not luck. It’s the result of strategic Democratic investments made by Nebraska Democrats, the Democratic National Committee, and supporters like you. Democrats continue to overperform in election after election this year — winning heavily Republican districts in Iowa and Pennsylvania, defeating the Elon Musk-backed candidate in Wisconsin, and achieving sweeping down-ballot race victories in Nebraska and Texas. _We are organizing everywhere, and we are winning everywhere._ **[This work is only possible with your help. If you can, pitch in now to help support it:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250514_3444_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3444_22930333_8FmPuH&akid=3444%2E22930333%2E8FmPuH)**

subject: I need to know where you stand... -

body:
| | |
Hey team -- It's Pat, your Research Director at the DSCC. I'm reaching out to you today because I'm worried.

Every day, Trump tries to overwhelm us with new lies, schemes, and conspiracy theories.

**It's chaos _designed_ to make us tune out so he can push the limits of power even further while we're not looking.** Think of it this way: We're only 4 months into Trump 2.0, and it's already felt like a _lifetime_ of nonsense.

**I know it's tempting to stop paying attention -- but Democratic opposition _now_ is absolutely crucial, so we need to make sure this team of grassroots supporters (including you) is ready to oppose him.**

Our Trump Approval Poll is currently live, but right now I'm still missing your response for 5/14. **So please, tell me before it's too late:**

subject: Is there anything we could say to convince you to support Adam?

body:
| Your support powers Adam’s work in the Senate to deliver for millions of Californians.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8581%2E5257348%2Ea5USOR)

Or what if we told you that as Republicans turn a blind eye to Trump’s lawlessness, Adam is working around the clock to uphold the rule of law and hold this administration accountable?

subject: Michigan can’t afford for us to fall short

body:
| | | Peter, We’re halfway through May—and we’re falling dangerously behind. **Michigan is at a crossroads. Under Democrats, crime is up, families and businesses are being crushed by overregulation, and our values are under siege by radicals in Lansing.** I’m running for my family. I’m running for your family. I’m running to _save Michigan_. But here’s the truth: **if we miss tomorrow's critical mid-month fundraising goal, the Left gets one step closer to holding onto this office and forcing their failed agenda on our state.** We’re still name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Congress: NO cuts to Medicaid!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
**Earlier this week, Republicans in Congress unveiled their plan to cut over $800 BILLION from Medicaid** — the program that provides lifesaving healthcare to millions of Americans across the country.
_These cuts could have devastating consequences._
**[TELL CONGRESS: NO CUTS TO MEDICAID](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-medicaid-petition-202505?t=1&akid=8938%2E614464%2EE63qEB)**
**Millions of people could lose their health insurance.**
In a time when so many Americans are living one medical emergency away from bankruptcy, these cuts could cause even more uncertainty and disruption to people + families already struggling to get by.
**So right now, we need to take action.**
**[Please help us fight back by adding your name to our call to Congress: Protect the American people by ending the attacks on Medicaid >>>](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-medicaid-petition-202505?t=2&akid=8938%2E614464%2EE63qEB)**
**[TELL CONGRESS: NO CUTS TO MEDICAID](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-medicaid-petition-202505?t=3&akid=8938%2E614464%2EE63qEB)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdc-email-footer?refcode=em20250514-8938-footer&t=4&refcode2=8938_614464_E63qEB&akid=8938%2E614464%2EE63qEB)**
---
Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=5&akid=8938%2E614464%2EE63qEB).

So right now, we need to take action. Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Tell Home Depot to stop selling this poison plastic
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI0OTUyMzQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDE4NjYwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL THE HOME DEPOT: STOP SELLING POISON PVC

PVC plastic is in things we interact with every day, like flooring, siding,
drinking water, and carpeting. Low-income communities and people of color
experience disproportionately high exposure and harm from PVC. One study found
that levels of these chemicals in multi-unit, affordable housing were two to 18
times higher than in single-family homes.

The Home Depot is the largest home improvement chain in the U.S. and one of the
largest sellers of PVC in the world. It has the opportunity to stop selling PVC
and help prevent the next vinyl chloride disaster. Tell The Home Depot: Stop selling this poison plastic. https://links.messages.lcv. TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, In February 2023, a train carrying toxic vinyl chloride derailed in East
Palestine, Ohio. The spilled vinyl chloride from that train was then purposely
set ablaze. The fire released dangerous chemicals across Ohio and Pennsylvania,
making residents sick from breathing the toxic air. For more than two years, local communities have demanded action to address their
suffering. But not enough has been done. The chemicals on that train traveled across the country and were meant to make
PVC plastic sold by major retailers like The Home Depot. Tell Home Depot: Stop selling this poison plastic. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fEL_ PVC is all around us, Peter. It’s in things we interact with every day,
like flooring, siding, drinking water, and carpeting. PVC is also used in
products such as single-use packaging, children’s toys, and apparel. Low-income
communities and people of color experience disproportionately high exposure and
harm from PVC. One study found that levels of these chemicals in multi-unit,
affordable housing were two to 18 times higher than in single-family homes. Building materials we use in our homes shouldn’t expose consumers, communities,
or workers to carcinogens or other harmful chemicals. Period. The Home Depot is the largest home improvement chain in the U.S. and one of the
largest sellers of PVC in the world. It has the opportunity to stop selling PVC
and help prevent the next vinyl chloride disaster. Your voice truly makes a difference. Join us in demanding that The Home Depot ban this unnecessary toxic plastic to protect our communities and families. https://links.messages.lcv. We know that major retailers are capable of change. The Home Depot has banned
other toxic chemicals in their products, like PFAS in carpets and rugs. We need
them to do it again. Thank you for being with us, Peter. Madeleine Foote

Director, Healthy Communities Program

League of Conservation Voters PS - We need your help now! Tell The Home Depot: Build a safer future and ban this poison plastic. https://links.messages.lcv. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Now there’s a bill moving through the Oregon legislature, [**HB 3103-5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107706664/545561755/319563421?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNGRkMjcwLTE2MzEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dXsSNIeBQjBTJGh4B6215rwHkaTWviCjrLnP8pWuwnQ=&emci=1b0fb12a-8a2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=304dd270-1631-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230), that would increase logging on our public lands, disregarding the Oregon Department of Forestry’s (ODF) current forest values of recreation, clean water, wildlife habitat and climate resiliency. That’s why HB 3103-5 has been labeled as a Major Threat by the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN). If this Major Threat passes, our state forests will be logged at unsustainable levels, the balance between industry and our state values is compromised, and it will be much more common for the ODF to be sued ([read more](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107706667/545561758/724567698?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNGRkMjcwLTE2MzEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dXsSNIeBQjBTJGh4B6215rwHkaTWviCjrLnP8pWuwnQ=&emci=1b0fb12a-8a2f-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=304dd270-1631-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)). HB 3103-5 would also be a very expensive bill, costing about a million dollars in funding to start the program, in addition to costing the state thousands with increased lawsuits against the ODF. Regardless of all these reasons why HB 3103-5 is a terrible bill and a Major Threat to a Healthy Oregon, at the end of the day it’s an unnecessary bill. Sustainable harvest levels are already set by the State Forester with the help of the Board of Forestry. With all the attacks we are seeing on our public lands from the federal government, now is not the time for Oregon to take a step back on our values, and open our forests up. Our forests and public lands are what makes Oregon, well, Oregon. We can’t afford to lose them in this dangerous time. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hi Peter, I
have a personal request: [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]Will you chip in any amount before our
mid-month deadline? I’ll explain more in just a moment.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-may25.bOeIf8&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]DONATE

I’m proud of the positive change we’ve made in the Senate together. From
lowering the cost of insulin and other life-saving prescriptions to
protecting marriage equality, I’ve worked hard to pass legislation that
addresses the issues that matter most to Wisconsinites.

Under the current administration, this work has never been more important.
Donald Trump and Republicans are using their supermajority to chip away at
our rights and slash crucial funding for several programs, including
gutting Medicaid and ripping healthcare away from millions of Americans.

Their end goal? Pass a budget that cuts huge tax breaks for the wealthiest
among us. This selfish agenda is already hurting Wisconsin families and
hardworking people across the country.

Trump’s budget puts billionaires’ interests above fulfilling the promises
we’ve made to our veterans. Federal layoffs and budget cuts made at the
behest of unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, have created more barriers to
accessing VA care and continue to threaten the benefits veterans have
earned.

Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans are using their positions of power to
profit off the backs of the American people. It’s unacceptable.

That’s why we need to flip the Senate majority blue next year. You can bet
dollars to donuts that Elon Musk and his billionaire buddies will do and
spend whatever it takes to elect more yes-men who will bend at the knee
for their interests.

But this team is no stranger to a tough fight. We’ve proved over and over
again right-wing special interests and dark money groups are no match for
the strength of our grassroots team.

Peter, I’m
fighting back against this administration’s harmful agenda every day, and
I’m supporting Democratic leaders who will do the same. That’s why I’m
humbly asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]Will you pitch in ahead of our mid-month deadline? We have several
tough fights ahead of us, and this is the best way to support my work to
hold this administration accountable and support Democratic candidates.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-may25.HxoLSz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-may25.O2akwO&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-may25.-vtP99&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-em-may25.1YkZw0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-may25.CWfXTS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=4719%2E35263%2EivpfEB ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for reading and pitching in today.

More soon,

Tammy

subject: they tried to forcibly remove me…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/3q57uBJ69_EvmT9iOm8b5A~~/AAPPABA~/5sxDIu-PrjR3JtVPln1hhuYC_uofzmQnKWiJD9c0Word3u0tO5LIxPplZZcF3GHCq_BpdvK3RaNHDL05ekjyiD_3Cxqst9UTkTMvyZbjmBVenVWtRvlDvjIsaSW--Q7scfXGFrhe-O4-LR3i9G0aEERNgVv98IJgab_6KM2YUfsEkZdw_X3_GxET-gSU4e9i-0N1wJ1iDhJgIp2qxcWLEpE4sCTBq8iQG2yLhQ2CQM5st7T7xiV6xh9Z19uQxtHnBs5QRYo5yVj7Z-2OdUedNNhTrBdMt02A4SoiOWTehNJKqFHomKg-kETR8rN67yhrN43yCZXBfAskOlglWhR1Fepuks59Bq8-VqUTMB3Uw5A~)
---
| | Peter, remember when the Republican chairman of the House Oversight Committee threatened to forcibly remove me for calling out Trump and Elon for being corrupt? **Well now, they’re blocking my amendment that would _require_ the President to listen to the Supreme Court.** We already knew Republicans didn’t give a damn about corruption. Now, they’re putting it on the record that they don’t give a damn about the Constitution, either. I will always hold Trump, Elon, and Republicans accountable, no matter how hard they try to silence me. But being vocal comes with serious risks. name: Deb Haaland
subject: living in the past
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Shameful.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)
Donald Trump and Republicans just came out with their tax scam — and it’s a direct attack on New Mexicans.
**Trump is trying to pay for tax breaks for the wealthy on the backs of New Mexico’s working families, businesses, and our state’s economy. It’s shameful.**
From slashing Medicaid in favor of billionaire tax cuts and threatening wildfire funding during one of our driest seasons in years, to dealing a devastating blow to industries leading the clean energy boom in our state.
**When I served as Interior Secretary, I focused on creating jobs in clean energy and lowering energy costs for New Mexicans.** We harnessed the wind and sun to generate power and opportunity. These industries brought good jobs to our communities and affordable electricity to our homes.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250514_2_taxscam?amount=5&refcode=em20250514-1951&refcode2=1951_400544_oG7X7L&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)
Now, Trump wants to stop that progress. His tax scheme will make electricity more expensive and kill local jobs. To make billionaires even richer.
**That’s exactly why I’m running for governor.[Can you chip in $5 to power our grassroots campaign and help us protect clean energy jobs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250514_2_taxscam?amount=5&refcode=em20250514-1951&refcode2=1951_400544_oG7X7L&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)**
Donald Trump is living in the past. And while he offers nothing to working families, I’m ready to double down on the clean energy industries that move us forward.
When I’m governor, I’ll work to create more clean energy jobs, fight climate change, and lower energy costs — because **I believe our future is worth investing in, not exploiting.**
But we know Trump, his billionaire allies, and our Republican opponent will spend millions to try and defeat us. We’re going to need a grassroots surge to match them and win this fight.
[**So if you believe in protecting our progress — and building a clean energy economy that puts New Mexicans first — will you chip in $5 right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250514_2_taxscam?amount=5&refcode=em20250514-1951&refcode2=1951_400544_oG7X7L&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250514_2_taxscam?amount=5&refcode=em20250514-1951&refcode2=1951_400544_oG7X7L&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)**
Thank you for being in this with me.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250514-2&t=2&refcode2=1951_400544_oG7X7L&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1951%2E400544%2EoG7X7L)

subject: BREAKING: Medicaid Cuts Approved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28513?t=1011&refcode=email-20250514_v&akid=8464%2E5885482%2EXDrUL- ]Our Revolution logo

BREAKING: Republicans just approved MASSIVE cuts to Medicaid in the House
Energy and Commerce Committee. Peter Willis,
this is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

Medicaid funding is relied on by millions – literally keeping people alive
– and along with our founder Bernie Sanders and allies like Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Our Revolution is mobilizing with everything we’ve got to
Save Medicaid.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28515?t=1061&akid=8464%2E5885482%2EXDrUL- ]Headline: Bernie Sanders Mobilizes Organizers to Fight GOP Budget Bill
in Key Swing Districts

Our team has been on the Hill ALL DAY bird-dogging vulnerable Republicans
to force them to confront the reality of these cruel cuts, and
strategizing with supportive lawmakers on the best way to defeat the bill.
We have been calling and mobilizing progressive voters for weeks to
activate them in this fight.

With the bill set to go to a full vote on the House floor, we’re
activating our 57,000 strong Citizen Army to follow Bernie’s lead and make
every vulnerable Republican understand that voting to cut Medicaid is
political suicide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28513?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250514nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8464%2E5885482%2EXDrUL- ]This is THE most crucial moment for this fight. We only need a handful of
vulnerable House Republicans to back off, so we’re RAPIDLY scaling up the
pressure right now. Can you urgently chip in to help stop billionaire tax
breaks and save Medicaid?

It’s not an exaggeration to say lives are on the line. This bill could
SLASH Medicaid spending by $880 billion, alongside huge cuts to nutrition
assistance and so much more. It would RIP healthcare away from millions,
especially seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income children and
families.

Even some Republicans are admitting this bill risks "plunging our most
vulnerable into crisis" – highlighting the severity, cruelty, and
recklessness behind Trump's budget scheme – and that is the key,
politically, to stopping this bill in its tracks.

clean_body: [ - ]Our Revolution logo BREAKING: Republicans just approved MASSIVE cuts to Medicaid in the House Energy and Commerce Committee. Peter Willis, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Medicaid funding is relied on by millions – literally keeping people alive – and along with our founder Bernie Sanders and allies like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Our Revolution is mobilizing with everything we’ve got to Save Medicaid. [ - ]Headline: Bernie Sanders Mobilizes Organizers to Fight GOP Budget Bill in Key Swing Districts Our team has been on the Hill ALL DAY bird-dogging vulnerable Republicans to force them to confront the reality of these cruel cuts, and strategizing with supportive lawmakers on the best way to defeat the bill. We have been calling and mobilizing progressive voters for weeks to activate them in this fight. With the bill set to go to a full vote on the House floor, we’re activating our 57,000 strong Citizen Army to follow Bernie’s lead and make every vulnerable Republican understand that voting to cut Medicaid is political suicide. [ - ]This is THE most crucial moment for this fight. We only need a handful of vulnerable House Republicans to back off, so we’re RAPIDLY scaling up the pressure right now. Can you urgently chip in to help stop billionaire tax breaks and save Medicaid? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ - ]CHIP IN $9 [ - ]CHIP IN $22 [ - ]CHIP IN $27 [ - ]CHIP IN $46 [ - ]CHIP IN $66 [ - ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT It’s not an exaggeration to say lives are on the line. This bill could SLASH Medicaid spending by $880 billion, alongside huge cuts to nutrition assistance and so much more. It would RIP healthcare away from millions, especially seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income children and families. Even some Republicans are admitting this bill risks "plunging our most vulnerable into crisis" – highlighting the severity, cruelty, and recklessness behind Trump's budget scheme – and that is the key, politically, to stopping this bill in its tracks. [ - ]Video still from the Our Rev team bird dogging Republicans about Medicaid Thousands of us have spoken out and Our Revolution activists have been bird-dogging reps on Capitol Hill. Now we need to dramatically ramp up the pressure on vulnerable Republican House members in tight districts, and to do that we need your support. name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: My Epiphany in the 11th Circuit
body:
Vote. Serve. Pray.
| | | | May 14, 2025 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V3w8YMCG4nRbND5mzNN4kDMB-DsSVFFhDy-o1OwWzikQwaDxBb5-lT8kGWRBTfpQ4bHPH87pyqDOFGODbzgE3MdaLm9IYw11Huhx_yw5G34kKr2HDlIs52FBZ_t5hNxkFgz_ESah-Z3deojzf2uxioRzBwP9cB16jPefzI1SWmmdYq4iqcKD2D2g_eVFXq8YmFsBYllRvrgCCK3q-dTSFn9IvFIExR6ZiCMSi71IQPcWSZ7Q0-QkY3Z5rIWkLEpMdU1JRJAhL_K4bbTLhazdgw1VQG1RRFfcBO5j2tYRAt4AVnQ5yJbIh6Y5gck_iCCrYECLPfNWmHgNOUbvLTYTPo4HldsK5WWbgw5QP1kIgdHGfnqcQCwPe9KdUHBXTPfs9bnCe_R2rhNBTtMhh8FUvi7Gg5hFbu3TzsEaWX2QBolZ7EwbXSO2dIf4KK0WpE6kdIlE6xCaflpj9Bvm95uhE4SiESMdWaLFfe6ADTRvI-5_DMCefathsLypr3IwxSnj2vadp7mRml4dpKPS2ERrirwZLkfpMlZ9eVhuFFJhq3kAvbx0iiK6hQyNwncdrgxDWgmGLl9gPFlkcfQQ_iaompq2McNLxTPzP1BhELwDPePwI8vYZZ80Wd7NvgaXiuK7UEZPZH_dUWCSZJEoEvNImIDJPPtN34rlOMn2qCKFuFpH38MCxnC7lj0pLOF1Xl_aTIQZYBzsuVQeU20iqXNv_f-CVoHMuar1h5KvGWKu_80aFseiOfdxBqnMR_ucOOzVz4odGbKAIqZ3dlmD50soI5hlV1JJlFpn-8EASGu8PVPEO_5wO0Zcd2wPVizzED5P/4gh/Qr1doJ2nSfC_wrvVNWvmxA/h0/h001.sVMtNKjZYwASqHLWzV0uQSICXpAqzA5hmQsTbrfDuZU)

| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6V7ysAqQAXgttWnfvEts3SZl_TBQsZl6bVwJ6x4wITMICvZ8X0ZG5XbD0C4FqJMIEQACbhxB8KKpUmGppZFn6eeerbW0XYn_kce9sbF1fjtTP_XevAUFOiVFwFhXTzQxeA7Go6YWeOeJhKdpjA0i_E4y4KuxZ-H-KViQDqAn4qxta0Z8jzG7d4kVRzdp9FZw4s59z7W5FuhnKtvThRXTEjeO9PUpZM_8gpSVpIPgxUJw/4gh/Qr1doJ2nSfC_wrvVNWvmxA/h1/h001.SmIkDaCRDd_U0EcZhdvwyqwknRHu47YbdsgLUDTfjV0)
---
| Hi Friend,
---
Yesterday, I stood before the 11th Circuit Court of Appeals for oral arguments in _Fair Fight (with the Biden DOJ as intervenor) v. True the Vote_ —a case that could determine whether American citizens have the right to challenge the accuracy of voter rolls.
In my opinion, it’s one of the most consequential election integrity cases of the last decade. [[You can read the background here.]](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6e_tt3v5FcyxfBAwX8eOipG-H55VEtnqTi4wGwcp_TD9aaXPbKiNzRB1Y4uDeeAj0xVzi3BSCV-EPZZ-uZHZuxd5ubFwXLWUxEsnQTjnN2yG8PtGa4cfYg9yir2J518vHYk5H_b_5_1lp8yUYPHzcmXmXbux1-bkEnH-AOql9R2PBxVxwritKyQnGnbifBTUirKXCtTFa2An3HyuNjSMJk4jDjS6WJ9g8-rXhBbH0zT7WNqtSrvYMit0za1nEolfSILDG9Sm-lqv4BLPHfR6DMg/4gh/Qr1doJ2nSfC_wrvVNWvmxA/h2/h001.nllHoO2_lKowsBBglDqf-66AhMkyx0uSYYnmsOjbtMI)
Legally, this chapter is nearing its end. We won in federal court. Fair Fight appealed, represented by none other than Elias Law. Now, we wait. It will likely be several months before our three-judge panel rules.
_Side Note: It was my first time in this Court. I didn’t know what to expect—but I left inspired. The judges were sharp, professional, and deeply engaged._
It’s not the time to discuss the journey to that courtroom, but the day will come and when it does I look forward to sharing the full story with you _(oh, what a story it is.)_
### So, Here’s My Epiphany
Lawsuits like the one we are currently in ... will soon be a thing of the past ...
A bit of background - since 2010, True the Vote has helped citizens engage in one of the most basic acts of civic stewardship: cleaning up the voter rolls. For that, we’ve been targeted relentlessly.
It used to baffle me. Why the hostility? Why the legal threats, the lawsuits, the smear campaigns? Why fight so hard against simple record matching?
Over the years, I came to understand that the refusal to fix voter rolls was never about logistics. It’s about control. And control thrives in engineered chaos.
For years, the fundamental brokenness of our electoral system has been very profitable for people who operate from the shadows.
But that era is ending.
Technology is moving faster than politics. **Smart paper ballots. Real-time eligibility checks. Immutable audit trails.** These aren't far-off dreams. They're on the near horizon. And when they arrive, it won’t be because government handed them to us. It will be because _you_ demanded better.
The future of election integrity is secure, scalable, citizen-powered— it’s coming fast and y _ou_ are helping make it possible!
You’ve stood with us when it was hard. You gave when others walked away. You believed in a future where elections could be secure, transparent, and truly representative of the people. That future is now.
We may be closing one battle, but the movement we’ve built together is just getting started. Exciting days ahead.
Keep the faith. Never quit.
Ever onward -
|
---
**P.S. We are raising funds to a) keep moving forward with the lawsuits and b) improve our portfolio of election integrity tools (IV3, VoteAlert, Scan. Check. Protect., LegiTrack, and volunteer toolkits).**[**If you can help us with a donation, we would greatly appreciate it.**](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6UAj3E_p8cNGXIOwo9MdaP4uURHu2CF_xBMsTaXvArHujZCYcWDflXvAHZOdWogeY67YYVzOuRaIaHqb0EQF0i6ti96rrq3S5noXyuTduKaOyQYyhlJRRQb0SI_v0dznX42-QD1T0mgOquuwkOj7NGo3IrpnzSBGVcF-d9amRccPqK3iMkn5c30tO2vyr5P1yQSj69egzT13VNAFW-wP4KM0x6zWVqj-sNMrdeFjaw-x/4gh/Qr1doJ2nSfC_wrvVNWvmxA/h3/h001.sg5y-dCe1jmk5qFv3xRe7q2OVOVwqwkD2y3iYjhVAZ8)[****](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6UAj3E_p8cNGXIOwo9MdaP4uURHu2CF_xBMsTaXvArHujZCYcWDflXvAHZOdWogeY67YYVzOuRaIaHqb0EQF0i6ti96rrq3S5noXyuTduKaOyQYyhlJRRQb0SI_v0dznX42-QD1T0mgOquuwkOj7NGo3IrpnzSBGVcF-d9amRccP2nrkB38caJHbXL6j-upv6ResVqYBAb9QnEL11c5Bx6PJxUvKJTXlkfmA2CrpKFJS/4gh/Qr1doJ2nSfC_wrvVNWvmxA/h4/h001.B7I6KyuFY76fYPyg34XXbaApmoDxYOCYiFcpo5JO46A)**Our average donation is $43. Truly I tell you - every single donation is important to us. Every dollar is immediately put to work. Thank you, as always, for your kindness and your consideration.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: You and me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have a responsibility right now, in this perilous moment for our nation, to build a powerful movement in defense of democracy, justice, and America’s working class.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1633%2E791427%2EVWnwq3)

It’s tough times for many in America today.
Far-right fascism is indisputably on the rise.
Trump’s administration is tearing down core protections like due process.
He’s using ICE like a personal, political secret police.
His tariffs are causing economic chaos and rising prices.
Republicans are getting ready to kick 8 million Americans off Medicaid.
And billionaires like Elon Musk are only getting richer and richer.
Things are bad. But I know at least two people who can do something about it: **You and me.**
You see, every movement starts with just a handful of committed people, and grows into a force to be reckoned with as more people join the fight.
Just like how our campaign started with only a few donations, maybe of $5 or $20 each, until eventually thousands of people start chipping in to power our work.
We have a responsibility right now, in this perilous moment for our nation, to build a powerful movement in defense of democracy, justice, and America’s working class.
Will you join me?
**[Please, make a contribution to my campaign today. The donations that this team provide to our campaign are absolutely crucial to our mission of standing up to Trump and fighting for our progressive values.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250514-1-180&t=2&akid=1633%2E791427%2EVWnwq3)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/770?c0=io-em-may25.SLMQAx&refcode=em250514-1-180&t=21&akid=1633%2E791427%2EVWnwq3)**

clean_body: We have a responsibility right now, in this perilous moment for our nation, to build a powerful movement in defense of democracy, justice, and America’s working class. It’s tough times for many in America today. Far-right fascism is indisputably on the rise. Trump’s administration is tearing down core protections like due process. He’s using ICE like a personal, political secret police. His tariffs are causing economic chaos and rising prices. Republicans are getting ready to kick 8 million Americans off Medicaid. And billionaires like Elon Musk are only getting richer and richer. Things are bad. But I know at least two people who can do something about it: You and me. You see, every movement starts with just a handful of committed people, and grows into a force to be reckoned with as more people join the fight. Just like how our campaign started with only a few donations, maybe of $5 or $20 each, until eventually thousands of people start chipping in to power our work. We have a responsibility right now, in this perilous moment for our nation, to build a powerful movement in defense of democracy, justice, and America’s working class. Will you join me? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Team — Donald Trump is ready to take a wrecking ball to the progress we’ve made to protect our environment — and his budget proposal is just more proof of that. Billions of dollars cut from clean water programs, national parks, disaster relief, and climate research. Attacks on environmental justice and science. And a blatant attempt to roll back investments that communities in Hawaii and across the country _depend_ on. It’s outrageous. And for the people of Hawaii, it’s personal. I’ve spent my career fighting to protect Hawaii’s land, waters, native wildlife, and cultural heritage while working to support local farmers and sustainable agriculture. subject: Wow

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=309%2E181023%2EoccfxC)
Hey team, it's Nikki, Jocelyn's campaign manager.
I’ll be honest: We knew the DeVos family would get involved in the Michigan governor’s race.
**_We just weren't expecting them to pump $5 million into our Republican opponent’s campaign this early._**
This is what we’re up against:
An ultra-wealthy GOP family that thinks it can buy election results through massive campaign checks. They’ve supported countless GOP candidates in Michigan, including John James twice when he ran for Senate before.
It’s not right, and Jocelyn Benson is running for governor to level the playing field for all Michiganders.
Regardless of your family’s income level or zip code, you should have a governor who will fight for you. Who will work to improve public schools and increase opportunities for us all — not just the fortunate few.
**It’s not going to be easy going up against this $5 million from the DeVos family. It’s only a matter of time before they come after Jocelyn and what our campaign stands for.**
That’s why I’m humbly asking:
[**Will you pitch in $10 or any amount right away to help us stand up to the DeVos family and their massive campaign checks?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250514_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=309%2E181023%2EoccfxC)

name: Team Bennet
subject: How are Trump’s tariffs hurting you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy]
Hi folks,
It’s been over a month since President Trump’s "Liberation Day," when he imposed across-the-board tariffs, that pummeled retirement accounts and shook confidence in the U.S. economy.
We’ve only just started to experience the consequences of Trump’s so-called "liberation." Small business owners have been forced to freeze investments and pause hiring, and consumers are seeing their wallets stretched even further.
Let’s not forget: Trump’s tariffs represent one of the most significant tax hikes on American families that we’ve seen in a long time.
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy]
They are yet another burden on the small business owners, working parents, and retired seniors trying to live their own American dream.
Trump's chaos can bring real pain and stress to everyday Coloradans—people who were already struggling to afford housing, healthcare, childcare, and groceries.
That’s why we want to hear from you.
Michael wants to know how your life has been affected by Trump’s economic policies, so that we have all the information we need to fight back. Will you take a moment to fill out our survey on the impact of the Trump tariffs here? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy]
TAKE OUR SURVEY [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/trumpeconomy]
Thank you,
Team Bennet
